Your ambitions will change radically over the next few weeks, so prepare yourself mentally now so you are ready to hit the ground running when opportunity comes your way. Ignore those who try to divert you towards less challenging aims.

Some of the things you have been doing of late have not been cost efficient and now you must be ruthless and cut back on your goals. If today’s new moon brings an opportunity to move in a new career direction then don’t hesitate, just go!

No, life is not conspiring against you and what occurs today is not more evidence that you are on the downward side of the curve. Stop feeling sorry for yourself and look beyond everyday disappointments, because the long-term prognosis is exceedingly good.

You can learn a lot about people by just watching them and something you notice about a colleague will make you realize they are smarter and more ambitious than you thought. Maybe you should get together and make up a team.

The message of the stars today is that you don’t need to limit yourself to one location or one particular group of friends. The more you are on the move and trying new things the more opportunities, for love and success, you will discover.

What is it that you value most in life? Give that question some thought and when you come up with an answer – which must be honest – go all out to get more of it. The new moon means that almost any wish you make will be granted.

When others need assistance you will give it with no questions asked, but you would be wise to keep your wits about you because there may be some people who seek to take advantage of your charitable nature. Be generous but be sensible too.

Yours is one of the birthdays of the year and if you put your mind to it there really is nothing you cannot accomplish. Use your mind to identify the goals that mean the most to you, then follow your heart until you reach them.

Changes planet Uranus is ending its retrograde phase in your sign, so you are sure to face one or more upheavals over the next few days. Fortunately, they are the kind of upheavals that will reset your thinking in positive and productive ways.

Get the week off to a flying start by doing something that is calculated to make those around you sit up and take notice. Once you have got their attention you can wow them with your amazing ideas and your ambitious objectives.

Changes on the work front will create new opportunities that you can take advantage of this week, but you will need to stay alert as you won’t be the only one looking to succeed. You’re better than your rivals, so don’t let them get ahead of you.

You may be sad that something important has gone out of your life but you can already see signs that something even better will be coming in soon to replace it. What occurs over the next 24 hours will revive your passion for adventure.

The fact that you have so many choices now appears to be making life more complicated than it needs to be, so focus only on the objectives that mean the most to you. Move in the direction of your dreams a step at a time.

If you make a serious effort to patch up disputes with partners and loved ones over the next 48 hours it won’t be long before you are on the same wavelength and marching toward your No. 1 goal. You’re still on the same team.

The fact that you are finding it hard to make up your mind about something suggests you must give it more time. There is no cosmic reason why you have to make a decision right now, so stop fretting and put it out of your head.

With mind planet Mercury now in your sign and the sun joining it there next week the tide is clearly turning in your favour. Give yourself permission to get out and about and have fun this weekend, knowing that even better times are on their way.

The cosmic powers will never confront you with challenges you are unable to handle and if you keep that fact in mind you will keep going and never give up. Your task for the year ahead is to toughen up and discover your deep inner strength.

The sun’s move into the career area of your chart this week means you need to keep your eye on the prize on the work front, because you won’t be the only one who is looking to get ahead. Define your goals then really go after them.

You have a lot of excess energy that you need to get rid of and as the sun is about to begin its journey through the most adventurous area of your chart that is unlikely to be a problem. Don’t go too far though and start being reckless.

As the cosmic pointer moves away from your opposite sign you should find it easier to deal with partners and loved ones and work colleagues without a big falling out. Cooperation is essential now, especially where joint money matters are concerned.

You may feel a bit sad that something you value has gone out of your life but don’t let your tears blind you to the fact that something even better is now coming in. Change is a fact of life, so accept it and make it work for you.

Focus on your own dreams and desires over the coming year and don’t worry so much about what the people around you need. The message of the stars on your birthday is that you are at the centre of the universe and events must revolve around you.

The sun’s move into the area of your chart that governs your social and professional standing marks this out as a very important day. Over the next few weeks you will get many opportunities to better yourself and you must take advantage of them.

Something you thought was a supersized problem just a few days ago will now shrink to a level that can be easily handled. The fact is it was never that huge an issue in the first place, so act as if it no longer exists.

Relationships of an emotional nature have been at the forefront of events in recent weeks but now the sun is changing signs business and financial matters will become equally important. You must be extra careful when dealing with other people’s money.

What a friend or loved one suggests you do this weekend may sound like fun but if you look at their proposal carefully it will become apparent that there are dangers involved. It won’t put you off but at least you will know what to expect.

You may have your doubts about a plan or project that everyone else is enthusiastic about but the planets suggest you are being far too negative. Give it a go and don’t be surprised if the challenge turns out to be exactly what you need.

Go your own way, do your own thing and don’t worry in the slightest what others might think about it. Oh, you weren’t going to worry? That’s good, because this is one of those occasions when your own supreme self-confidence will guarantee success.

The sun in your sign links nicely with Mars, planet of ego and energy this weekend, so get up and get at them and show the world what star quality looks like. If you lead from the front a lot of really fun people will happily follow you.

Creative activities are under wonderful stars on your birthday, so make this the year when you break free of restrictions and establish yourself as a serious artist. The potential has always been there but now at last it can be unleashed.

Start making plans that will take you from where you are in life now to where you most want to be in the future. It won’t be long before you get the chance to turn your dreams into realities, so keep smiling and keep believing.

There is always something worth fighting for in life and what occurs today and in the run-up to Friday’s lunar eclipse will point you in the right direction. A cause of some kind needs people like you, people who are not afraid to rock the boat.

If you have been in a risk averse frame of mind of late that will change well before the end of the month, but for the time being you are right to play safe. Don’t gamble with your future just because you want to impress certain people.

If you read between the lines today you will be able to work out what is motivating someone, which in turn will make it easier to avoid a clash of personalities. You don’t have to be on the same side but you don’t have to be enemies either.

Get tough with someone who has taken too many liberties but don’t make such a big issue of it that it causes long-term bad feeling. Let them know that once you have said your piece that is, as far as you are concerned, the end of the matter.

There will be at least one and maybe several occasions during the early part of the week when you have no option but to dance to someone else’s tune. You don’t have the power to change the situation, so just accept it and adapt to it.

Just because you have bags of energy at the moment does not mean you have to spread it around in all directions. If you focus all your physical and mental intensity in a single direction today you will accomplish something quite remarkable.

You may want to be a nice guy but sometimes you have to lay down the law and this is one of those times. Let whoever is giving you a hard time know that you never give more than two warnings and they are on the second one already.

If a friend or colleague points out where you have been going wrong you won’t much like it, but they are actually trying to do you a favour, so take their advice in the spirit it is given and make the necessary changes. Then thank them for caring.

You need to stop worrying what other people might think of you and be true to your nature. That applies to all areas of your life but especially to the way you interact with people on a social level. You don’t have to be a party person.

The message of the stars today is that you must do whatever it takes to avoid making silly mistakes. If that means withdrawing from the world for a bit then so be it. Sometimes it’s fine just to hunker down and await better times.

Make the most of the sun in your sign to push ahead with your plans but make sure you also take the needs and interests of other people into account as well. Life is not a zero sum game – it’s more than possible for everyone to be a winner.

You may at times find it hard to believe in yourself this year but if you act as if you cannot fail your mind will create the circumstances that bring opportunities to your door. Whether you think you can, or think you can’t, you’re right!

Today’s Venus-Mercury union in your sign should be beneficial, but as Venus is going through its retrograde phase you would be wise not to take anything for granted. What the universe gives with one hand it can easily take back with the other.

If someone you work or do business with appeals to the generous side of your nature today you must keep up your guard. Most likely there is something they want from you they cannot be bothered to get for themselves. Don’t give it to them.

It will pay you to be vague about what you are up to today. If others get to know of your plans they may try to muscle their way in so they can share in the spoils – which is exactly why you must keep them in the dark.

If a partner or loved one does something that takes you by surprise today the most likely reason is because you have not been paying attention. Sometimes you can be a bit too laidback for your own good, which could leave you playing catch-up.

You want to get ahead in the world but the planets warn if you cut corners or break rules to impress people today your reputation could go downhill fast. If you can’t play by the book it might be best not to play at all.

You may believe that you have insights into a situation that other people have overlooked but there is a real danger you are kidding yourself. If that is the case then what occurs around the time of the lunar eclipse on Friday is sure to burst your bubble.

There are very few certainties in life but one of them is that when you are doing well you attract the kind of people who want a free ride. That appears to be happening now. There is no good reason why your sacrifices should benefit others.

If you expect to get straight answers to simple questions over the next 24 hours you will most likely be disappointed. On the work front, especially, employers and colleagues will be rather evasive and, yes, it’s because they have something to hide.

If the definition of stupidity is making the same mistake again and again while expecting a different outcome then one of your friends must be very stupid indeed. Make it your priority today to clue them in to reality and tell them they need to change.

The more others pour cold water on your plans the more inclined you will be to believe it’s because they are jealous and want to see you fail. You could be right, but more likely they are trying to save you from yourself. Maybe you should listen.

If you spend too long weighing up the pros and cons of your next move you may end up staying right where you are and wasting the entire day. Make a decision and stick with it even if it turns out later on to be less than perfect.

If you are not in the mood for work then don’t force yourself. This is one of those occasions when if you have no interest in a task then almost certainly you will make a bad job of it, so be smart and postpone it for a while.

Heart planet Venus and mind planet Mercury join forces on your birthday, so words will come easily to you, especially words of love. But you must always be honest about your feelings – don’t say things because you think it’s what others want to hear.

You will need to be firm today when dealing with people who think you can be easily persuaded to see and do things their way. Let them know that in areas where you are the boss you won’t put up with outside interference of any kind.

You appear to have overlooked something of major importance and need to discover what it is so you can go back and find a way to fit it into your plans. If you can’t work it out for yourself ask a trusted friend to advise you.

You will get the chance to impress some very important people today but don’t claim to be able to do things you know you cannot. Saturn in the career area of your chart is a make or break influence, so be honest with everyone, including yourself.

If you try to force someone to act in ways they don’t agree with they will inevitably rebel, so make allowances for your differences and focus instead on areas where you see eye to eye. You still have more in common than things that divide you.

Listen carefully to what a partner or work colleague has to tell you today because they can see connections that you could easily miss. No one expects you to know everything about what’s going on, so why would you expect it of yourself?

Today’s sun-Saturn link will bring criticism from people you live and work with that is not in the least bit welcome. You can, if you wish, ignore it but deep down you know they are telling you what you need to hear, so don’t be too touchy.

It would be easy to believe that someone is out to get you but the planets indicate there are no secret enemies lurking around the next corner. You need to get a grip on your imagination. Focus on facts and leave the fantasies to lesser minds.

Differences of opinion are inevitable but they don’t have to be major and they don’t have to come between you and the people you love. Make allowances for those who see things from a different perspective, just as they make allowances for you.

You may want to push ahead with a creative activity of some kind but today’s sun-Saturn link is likely to place obstacles in your path. Maybe you should take the hint and tread water for a while. Maybe this isn’t the right time to act.

There may be several routes open to you at the moment but there is only one route that will take you straight to your goal. What occurs over the next 24 hours will point you in the right direction and then all you have to do is march.

Keep your money in your pocket today and keep those who want to spend it for you at arm’s length. Saturn in the financial area of your chart warns that once you start doling out cash you won’t be able to stop – and your funds are not unlimited.

The sun in your sign makes you both assertive and ambitious but as it is currently linked to Saturn, planet of restriction, your options for action may be few and far between. But who says you have to act immediately? Give yourself a rest day.

Saturn’s influence on your birthday is a double-edged sword: on the one hand it brings focus to your desires; on the other it makes you doubt your own abilities. Keep telling yourself that you were born to win – and your thoughts and words will make it a fact.

Try not to take what happens over the next two days seriously. It may seem like there is chaos and confusion in every direction but only because so many people are running around like headless chickens. If you know what you want you’ll be okay.

You may think you can handle a difficult task on your own but the approaching lunar eclipse means you could find yourself overwhelmed if you try. There are plenty of people who are willing to assist you, but you’ve got to ask them first!

This could be an emotional few days for you Gemini and events on the home front are likely to be challenging. Keep telling yourself that it will all come right in the end and make sure loved ones can see you are still in control.

Keep what is going on in the world around you in perspective. Tomorrow’s eclipse could bring a nasty shock, or two, or three, your way but if you stand back and look at events logically you will see there is nothing to get worked up about.

Although tomorrow’s lunar eclipse takes place in the financial area of your chart there is no evidence to suggest that others will be trying to cheat you. Having said which, it won’t do any harm to keep one hand on your wallet at all times!

A crisis of confidence is likely over the next two or three days, so keep telling yourself that you are still on the right track and still heading for success. It may take longer than expected to reach your objective but you’ll get there in the end.

Stop looking over your shoulder and start looking at what is in front of you. Those secret enemies you seem to believe are stalking you are just phantoms of your hyperactive imagination, so banish them from your mind once and for all.

Do you really care how other people will respond to what you say and do? Of course you don’t, so why are you wasting precious time trying to second guess how they might react? Focus on your No. 1 goal and ignore everything else.

Tomorrow’s lunar eclipse in the career area of your chart is going to make some kind of setback look ten times worse than it really is, so promise yourself now that you will stay calm and carry on as usual. Nothing and no one can hurt you.

You need to accept that some people are determined to look on the dark side of life and that nothing you say or do is going to change their outlook. Put some distance between you so there is no chance their negativity might rub off on you.

Relationships could get a bit tricky over the next few days, so promise yourself that no matter what loved ones might say you won’t overreact and make things worse than they need to be. Smile serenely and pretend that nothing bothers you in the slightest.

There is no point trying to work with people whose outlook on life is completely opposed to your own. The message of your birthday chart this year is that you will travel faster and further if you travel alone. Don’t let anyone hold you back.

Be careful you don’t get carried away today and start making claims that cannot be backed up by facts. The lunar eclipse in the work area of your chart warns your reputation could suffer if colleagues believe you are trying to mislead them.

Today’s sun-Uranus link suggests that something both unexpected and fortunate will occur between now and the weekend but the lunar eclipse warns you must take nothing for granted. Your luck may be in but that does not mean you can take foolish risks.

According to the planets you are worrying about something over which you have no control. What occurs over the next 24 hours will hopefully convince you that is a complete waste of time and energy. Only a positive outlook will bring positive results.

If a colleague starts laying down the law and demanding that you do things their way you are perfectly within your rights to refuse. On the other hand you are going to need their support in the days and weeks to come, so don’t be too dismissive.

You may be tempted to go to extremes in some way today but if you do the long-term consequences won’t be to your liking. On this occasion you would be smart to limit your words and actions to what you know won’t cause a riot.

Today’s lunar eclipse in your sign is an obvious pointer to the fact that you cannot afford to get involved in any kind of feud, either in your personal life or at work. Even if you appear to come out on top you could still be a loser.

It may seem as if you are on the road to fame and fortune but the planets warn there is something you have missed that could disrupt your plans for days, weeks, maybe even months. You cannot afford to take anything for granted.

If someone gives you a hard time today you are advised to take it in your stride. Even if they are well out of order you won’t gain anything by getting angry and hitting back at them. Stay calm and show them their efforts mean nothing to you.

If you give up on something now you will regret it later on when you look back and realize how close you were to making a breakthrough. You cannot expect everything to work out how you want it to and when you want it to, so be patient.

The more pushy you are over the next 24 hours the less likely it is you will make much progress. Instead of trying to get others to work as hard as you do just accept that different people have different goals and do things in different ways.

The more you try to help other people the less grateful they appear to be, so stop trying so hard and let them sort out their own affairs. Yes, they will make a complete mess of it but that may be the only way they learn.

Your thoughts create your reality, so keep believing that you are moving ahead at the right speed and will reach your goal very soon. Ignore what the doubters and cynics might say about your prospects – they don’t know what you are capable of.

Not only is there a lunar eclipse on your birthday but changes planet Uranus is well starred as well, so there will be major upheavals this year both at home and at work and that’s good. Those who stand still stagnate. Those who move fast prosper.

You cannot afford to take an indifferent approach to what you are working on this weekend. As mind planet Mercury turns retrograde in your sign today you will have to consciously force yourself to take your tasks seriously. There can be no half measures.

The more you think about something the more confusing it seems to get, so take the hint and put it out of your mind, at least for the next 48 hours. Some time before the sun changes signs on the 20th it will start making sense again.

Don’t waste your time worrying about what has gone wrong in your life. There is no way you can turn back the clock and change things, so accept the situation for what it is and move on to the next big challenge – it won’t be long in coming.

You have been very much on the ball lately and there is nothing on the cosmic horizon to suggest that is going to change. You will, however, have to deal with a dispute that has nothing to do with you, because others see you as an honest broker.

No matter how unsettling the past few weeks have been you have lots to look forward to and when the sun moves in your favour on the 20th the efforts and sacrifices you have made will pay off in a big way. Keep smiling and keep striving.

Because it took place in your sign yesterday’s lunar eclipse hit you harder than most people, so be good to yourself this weekend and take things easy. No matter what some people may say you have nothing to prove, to the world or to yourself.

Something will happen over the next few days that restricts your options and forces you to focus on matters you would prefer to ignore. Get your act together, do what needs to be done and show others you are still very much on the ball.

The events of the past few days have left you feeling a bit shell-shocked but Scorpio is nothing if not resilient and you will soon bounce back. Anyone who thinks the knocks you have taken will slow you down is in for a big surprise.

Most of the things you have been worrying about are of no real importance and what occurs next will remind you that overall life is still a lot of fun. Do something that lifts your spirits this weekend and watch as it lifts other people’s spirits as well.

You may be of the opinion that certain individuals are not pulling their weight, and you may be right, but it’s not your business to make an issue of it. Employers and other important people have noticed as well and won’t be slow in taking action.

If you get the chance to finish something of a creative nature you must seize the opportunity and get it done. You can still have a fun weekend but you will get more enjoyment from doing a necessary job well than from taking it easy.

If you did something hurtful during yesterday’s lunar eclipse then you must act fast to heal the rift it caused. Don’t be afraid to say sorry and don’t give others the impression that you are just going through the motions – they have to believe it.

As Mercury turns retrograde on your birthday your thoughts could get a little muddled at times over the coming year. Make sure every decision you make is based on facts and figures that cannot be disputed. It’s better to be boring than wrong.

When the sun enters your birth sign on Thursday your overall attitude will become a lot more positive than it has been of late. Whatever has been worrying you will no longer look like such a big deal – and the simple fact is it never was!

There are so many things going on in your world that you may be having trouble trying to work out what should be classed as “good” and what should be classed as “bad”. It doesn’t matter – it’s all experience that can be turned to your advantage.

If someone in a position of power makes you an offer of some kind today you would be wise to wait until later in the week before giving them an answer. If they try to force you into making a choice now chances are it’s not right for you.

Mars in your sign makes you impatient to succeed but it won’t be until the sun moves into the career area of your chart later in the week that you get the chance to show what you can do. In the meantime, there’s no need to be pushy.

A few days from now the sun will move in your favour and you will get the opportunity to start moving your life in a more adventurous and advantageous direction. Over the next 24 hours limit yourself to making plans – but make them big!

You may need to backtrack a little today as the planets indicate you took a wrong turning a few days ago. Don’t be stubborn and keep moving in the same direction because that will only make the return journey harder later on in the week.

Good news is coming your way and will arrive around the time the sun moves into your opposite sign toward the end of the week. Listen carefully to what the people you trust most have to say, because they can see the bigger picture.

There have been times of late when you clearly bit off more than you can chew but you are still here and still going strong so it’s no big deal. On the other hand, it would be foolish to keep taking on tasks that are too much for you.

There is such a thing as blind luck but more important by far are the decisions you make and the choices you take along the way. Keep believing that you were born to succeed, and keep doing the things that can make it happen.

It is of the utmost importance that you stay calm today, no matter how infuriating other people may be. Even if you are boiling mad on the inside you must present a face to the world that looks ice cold. That will scare your enemies the most!

You will encounter setbacks of one sort or another today but there is no point getting worked up about them. They may seem important now but they will fade into insignificance later in the week. In the greater scheme of things you’re doing okay.

If you find that you lack enthusiasm for a particular task then junk it and focus on something that seems more to your liking. The Sun is coming to the end of its stay in your sign, so don’t waste your time on stuff you don’t really enjoy.

There will be so much going on in your life over the coming year that when you successfully finish one challenge you will scarcely have time to draw breath before moving on to the next. That’s good – you’re at your best when the pressure is on.

You have done so many favours for so many people in recent weeks, so it’s no surprise you are feeling a bit rundown. Give yourself a couple of days off, because the sun’s change of signs on Thursday will bring more challenges your way.

Your feelings for someone have gone from one extreme to the other in recent weeks and it’s time you got yourself back on an even keel. Start by recognizing that you cannot afford to let your heart rule your head every moment of every day.

It’s a good thing that you enjoy surprises because the planets are lining up something that will shock you in a positive way. Someone you thought you knew everything about will reveal their big secret over the next few days, and it will blow you away!

If there is something about your life you would like to change then think about it seriously today and tomorrow and be ready to make it happen when the sun crosses into the career area of your chart on Thursday. The bigger the change the better.

You may not get along with someone on a personal level but that does not mean you cannot co-operate with them in a professional capacity. It could in fact work in your favour in that you don’t waste time on unnecessary and distracting small talk.

If you must be critical of someone’s efforts today make sure your words are designed to be constructive rather than destructive. The more you build up their confidence now the more likely it is they will make a better job of things later on.

If you are asked to undertake a job you have no experience in today it might be wiser to turn it down. That won’t be easy, of course, as you always hate to say “No” but on this occasion it could save you from a lot of grief.

Usually you are very good at hiding your true feelings, especially when they are negative, but that may not be possible today. In a way that’s good because if you don’t make a bit of a fuss now those feelings could get worse over time.

The more you try to understand why a loved one is upset about something that seems trivial to you the further away from an answer you will get. So stop trying, put some distance between you and let them enjoy feeling hard done by.

The past few weeks have been quite exciting and there is no reason why the next few weeks should not be exciting as well, but you will soon have to take on more responsibilities on the home front, so don’t plan quite so many social events.

It may come as a shock to discover that a friend has done something so out of character but that’s because you don’t know them as well as you thought. Stop trying to project your own values on them and see them for who they really are.

Trust your own feelings today and don’t go along with the crowd just because you don’t want to be the odd one out. If what others are proposing strikes you as risky then simply refuse to take part. You can say “I told you so” later on.

You need to shut down that nagging voice in the back of your mind that is always urging caution. Yes, of course, you can’t just take risks left, right and center but you will need to be adventurous this year if you want to make serious progress.

A new solar year is about to begin. You don’t have to do anything special but you must strive to maintain a positive frame of mind. What you accomplish over the next few weeks could change your life for the better for many years to come.

The sun moves into the most sensitive area of your chart tomorrow and today’s sun-Neptune union could also leave you feeling a bit vulnerable. Don’t try to keep your feelings secret. If you let loved ones know what you need they will get it for you.

If there is something in your life you are not 100 per cent happy about then start looking at ways you can change it. If you can’t come up with any good ideas yourself try asking a friend who knows you well – they may have a few suggestions.

Cosmic activity in and around the career area of your chart will make you increasingly ambitious over the next few days, but as both Mercury and Venus are moving retrograde at the moment you must think before you act. Risk-taking is best avoided.

One of the best times of the year begins tomorrow when the sun enters the most adventurous area of your chart. Anywhere you feel you have been held back in life is where you must now focus all your energy. All things are possible.

You need to accept that you will have to be more realistic about your aims over the next few weeks. One of the reasons you won’t be able to move ahead at top speed is because your money situation won’t allow it. Sort that out first.

Partners and colleagues will want more of a say in joint activities when the sun moves into your opposite sign tomorrow and if you are smart you will let them come up with a few suggestions – some of which may actually be worth following.

According to the planets you have a large backlog of work to get through, so clear your mind of all other interests and distractions and focus on what must be done over the next few days and into the weekend. Get on top of your workload now.

The sun’s move into the most dynamic area of your chart tomorrow means it is time to stop feeling sorry for yourself and start making plans that can make your future a great place to be. What is it you want most from life? Go after it now!

You need to let loved ones know how you feel and the sun’s move into the domestic area of your chart tomorrow will make that easier. However, as communications planet Mercury is moving retrograde you must choose your words carefully – don’t scare them!

You may be inclined to reject a social invitation because you have too much work to do but don’t be hasty. You have been so busy of late that both your mind and your body are in need of some down time. It’s okay to enjoy yourself.

A sun-Neptune link in your sign will bring deeper insights into what has been going wrong in your life, and how to put it right. If you get the chance to make use of that information over the next 24 hours don’t hesitate – act immediately!

Neptune, planet of spirituality, is strong on your birthday this year, making you acutely aware that you need to get along with all sorts of people and in doing so make the world a much better place. Yes, one person can make a major difference.

The sun’s move into your birth sign means you should be looking ahead and preparing for something big to happen. That something may not be entirely clear at the moment but it will come more into focus as the days go by, so stay sharp.

If you look back over the past 12 months you will come to the conclusion that your life has changed beyond recognition and mostly for the good. That awareness will cheer you up and make you believe that even more is possible – and it is!

The sun’s change of signs today means that some of the ideas you come up with will be realistic and radical at the same time. Some of your insights may even be touched by genius. Make sure you are the one who benefits from them.

The sun moves into the career area of your chart today and changes in the way you work, and maybe even the place you work, will be on the agenda. Don’t be too eager to alter things though as there may be a few surprises in store.

You may be a bit short of cash at the moment but that cannot be allowed to hold you back from pursuing your dreams. If you want something enough you will get opportunities to move toward it soon, and it won’t cost you a cent.

Keep what you are planning to yourself today because if the wrong person hears about it they may try to make things difficult for you. Fortunately, you are not the sort to be too open about what you are doing and who you are seeing. Keep them guessing.

Cosmic activity in your opposite sign will encourage you to get your act together and make sure that you are the one who benefits most from joint activities. Some of your colleagues are super competitive and you will need to be competitive too.

The fact that you have strong opinions about a situation will put you at odds with someone whose views are very different to your own. It might be smart to stay out of this person’s way for a day or two. Open conflict is best avoided.

You don’t have to do anything special today but you do need to set your sights high and promise yourself that under no circumstances will you be lowering them. The more others say you are risking disaster the more adventurous you will be.

Differences of opinion are inevitable over the next few days, so take them in your stride and don’t let other people’s histrionics get to you. The more they cry and moan the more you will laugh, because it really is a bit of a joke.

If someone tells you to go one way today you will inevitably move in the opposite direction. The danger is they could be saying the opposite of what they want you to do because they know you will disagree. Watch out you don’t get double bluffed!

What you own and earn will be at the forefront of your thinking today. It’s good that you are looking ahead and investigating ways to boost your income but put aside time for family and friends as well. It’s not all about dollars and cents.

Not only must you stand up for your own interests this year but you must stand up for people who are not as fearless as you as well. The more you help those who can’t help themselves the more the universe will send peace and prosperity your way.

This will be a good weekend for social activities but you could get into the party spirit to such an extent that you neglect your responsibilities on the home front. A little planning will go a long way, so think ahead and allocate your time wisely.

Cosmic activity in the most sensitive area of your chart could make you a little too cautious this weekend. Aim to get the balance right between pushing ahead when the odds are in your favour and holding back when they appear to be against you.

You know better than to upset people whose power is greater than your own but that does not mean you should keep quiet when you can see that an injustice is taking place. When the time comes when you feel you must speak up, do so fearlessly.

Go out of your way to impress employers and senior colleagues over the next 48 hours. Not only will it give your confidence a boost but it could lead to a new career opportunity, one that takes you quite a bit higher up the ladder of success.

You may not be able to explain how you have reached a certain conclusion but you trust your instincts enough to know it is the right one. It might not be so easy convincing other people of that but since when did you need their support?

The assistance you need will arrive at the last possible moment this weekend. No matter how deep you may have slipped down a hole of your own making someone will reach down and offer you a helping hand. Don’t be too proud to grab it.

Don’t be afraid to put your reputation on the line if you think you have a chance of moving up in the world. Even if your efforts don’t work out as well as you had hoped you will have earned yourself another opportunity further down the line.

By now it should be obvious that some of the methods and routines you have relied on for years no longer cut the mustard and need to be replaced. Identify what they are and consign them to the dustbin of history. Be ruthless, mostly with yourself.

Don’t waste your time arguing with someone who is clearly incapable of looking at life from your point of view. You are who you are and they are who they are and on this occasion there is can be middle ground. It’s not the end of the world.

The sun’s journey through the domestic area of your chart will make it easier to resolve problems of an emotional nature. However, there will still be occasions when loved ones behave in a wholly irrational manner, so be ready for that.

Your body language will be so expressive this weekend that words won’t be needed at all when dealing with people who know how to interpret your every smile and frown. Those who don’t know will have to master a very steep learning curve.

Focus on the fun side of life this weekend and ignore those who say that with so many bad things going on in the world it’s wrong to enjoy yourself. On the contrary, by being a good example you can help others have fun as well.

If the past 12 months seemed a bit tame by your standards then the coming year will more than make up for it. So many unexpected and exciting things are about to be unleashed on your world that boredom will be something you forget even exists.

Big things will be happening over the next few weeks but for best results you must be open to all possibilities. Changes will be good for you but they may not always seem beneficial to begin with. Go with the flow and let the universe guide you.

Don’t try too hard to convince people that you know what you are talking about because that will make them suspicious. The best way to earn their trust is to act first and let them see you can walk the walk as well as talk the talk.

What appears to be a setback during the early part of the week will morph into something much more positive later in the week, so stay calm and accept what fate sends your way. One way or another you will reach your No. 1 goal.

You will face some pretty tough obstacles over the next few days but you have what it takes to overcome each and every one of them. The more of an effort you make now the less daunting those obstacles will appear to be later on.

It may seem as if your options are limited at the moment, and maybe they are, but the long-term prognosis is extremely good, so keep believing that the right opportunity will arrive at just the right time and your belief will help make it a fact.

If you want something badly enough this week you will find a way to get it, although you may have to tread on a few sensitive toes along the way. That could make certain individuals a bit resentful but life is not a popularity contest.

The best way to get what you want is to make sure that the people you live and work with get what they want as well. What’s good for you will be good for them, and what’s good for them will be good for you. It’s win-win!

If you focus your attention in one particular direction over the next 24 hours you will make the kind of progress that usually takes weeks or even months to achieve. Scorpios have such powerful minds that all things – yes, all things – are possible.

A disagreement of some kind could end up being expensive, especially if you are convinced that you are the one in the right. Maybe you are, from your point of view, but this is one of those situations where there may be several variations of the truth.

As a project seems to be in a state of limbo at the moment this would be a good time to take a break and replenish your physical, mental and emotional batteries. You don’t have to be on the go all day, every day, so slow down a bit.

Opportunities will come thick and fast over the coming week but if you want to make the most of them you must be selective. It will be more productive to choose one aim and stick with it than chopping and changing every few days.

Don’t worry if you get a bit touchy over the next 24 hours because even a saint might lose their cool with everything that is going on around you. If you allow yourself to get upset it could affect your judgment, which will benefit your rivals.

Your confidence will be sky-high over the coming year but with mind planet Mercury going through its retrograde phase on your birthday you must make sure that self-belief is justified. It won’t be enough to just say you’re a winner, you’ve got to act like one.

Some people say that what does not destroy you only makes you stronger and you will get the chance to put that claim to the test today. The bigger the challenge the more you will have to raise your game to win. Defeat is not an option.

There may be times today when you wish you were some place else but the fact is you are in exactly the right situation at exactly the right time to learn the lessons the universe is trying to teach you. Forget about wishful thinking and act!

You have a talent for sensing which way the wind is blowing and if it is blowing in a direction that could spell trouble then you must take evasive action. Above all you need to avoid getting sucked into other people’s meaningless feuds.

Be careful what you say over the next 24 hours because retrograde Mercury’s link to Pluto could bring the kind of attention you would be wise to avoid. Even if your remarks are clearly said in jest others are unlikely to see the funny side.

If anyone tries to hold you back from what you want to say or do you must let them know in the most direct way possible that you won’t be giving up your freedom of expression or freedom of movement. Make them wish they had kept quiet.

The more you allow yourself to fantasize about what you want to be doing in the near future the more likely it is those fantasies will become your reality. Pluto, your ruler, linked with mind planet Mercury will bring extra power to your thoughts.

A positive outlook on life is an absolute must at the moment. Even when things seem to be going badly for you just keep telling yourself it is part of a higher cosmic plan and that it won’t be long before it all makes perfect sense.

You must come to terms with the fact that nothing stays the same forever and that whatever changes are taking place in your life they are there for a reason. If you quiet your mind and ignore outside chatter the universe will reveal its secrets.

Listen carefully to what friends have to tell you this year but make sure you put their claims to the test. They may be more clued in about certain events than you are but that doesn’t mean their advice is infallible. Trust your own instincts first.

You will get the chance to make your mark over the next few days but you must be selective about the goals you are aiming to reach. Remember, just because an offer sounds good on the surface does not mean it is the right thing for you.

Everything in life moves and changes according to natural cycles and no matter how hard you try to change those cycles you will always be brought back to the course that was preordained for you personally. Work with your destiny today, don’t struggle against it.

The world seems a brighter and happier place than it has been of late and the reason for that is you no longer care what comes next. But giving up making long-term plans does not mean giving up on success – just live in and for the moment.

If you are looking to move up in the world then what occurs over the next few days will bring opportunities that can make it happen. But don’t jump at the first offer that comes along, because there will be even better offers arriving later on.

You need to broaden your horizons and you need to learn to look at the world through eyes that see the positive rather than the negative. There is a reason for every event under the Sun. Keep telling yourself that and you will come to believe it.

Your feelings could get a bit intense today, so watch what you say and who you say it to. Even if there is an opportunity to make someone who deserves it look silly you would be wise to let it pass. You don’t need to start another feud.

Opposites often attract but sometimes the attraction is short-lived and love can easily turn to hate when things go wrong. Bear that thought in mind today and don’t allow yourself to get too deeply attached to someone new in your social circle.

The sun is in the work area of your chart will make it easier for you to focus on details and sort out those practical things on which the bigger picture depends. Don’t waste your time and energy on other people’s extravagant dreams.

There is so much happening on the creative front at the moment that you may be finding it hard to focus on mundane things such as your friends and your family life. But you must give them the attention they need and deserve. It’s not all about you.

What can you do to bring harmony to your domestic affairs? For starters you can stop trying to get loved ones to act in ways that feel right for you but most likely feel wrong for them. A little understanding will go a long way today.

The tempo of life is picking up dramatically and soon you will be speeding along and living the dream. But no matter how busy you may be on the work front you must make time for social activities. Friendships make good times even better.

It would be smart to wait until the solar eclipse at the weekend has come and gone before making any long-term financial plans. Only then will you know for sure what activities are most likely to bring enjoyment and profit in equal measure.

If you can focus your mind in a particular direction, and back it up with total emotional commitment, you can expect a huge leap forward in both your personal affairs and your career. Don’t waste a single second on trivial people and trivial activities.

You have no intention of just sitting there while others say things about you that are simply not true. You may be a nice guy by nature but sometimes you have to show you have a nasty side too. Make sure the world gets the message.

Something you discover about a friend will shock you today but after you think about it a bit you will have to admit the signs were there all along but you did not want to acknowledge them. Next time, accept what your eyes and ears tell you.

As values planet Venus moves back into the career area of your chart today this is probably not the best time to make a major change. Leave things as they are for now and trust that when the time comes to act the universe will guide you.

The answer to a problem that has been confusing you for ages will pop into your head today and you will kick yourself for not having been able to work it out earlier. Don’t be too hard on yourself though – you’re not the only one to overlook the obvious.

The best way to deal with a money issue of some kind is to leave it alone and let it sort itself out. With Venus and Mercury going through their retrograde phases any changes you make now may have to be changed back again later on.

Do whatever it takes to stay on good terms with everyone you interact with, be they loved ones, work colleagues or even total strangers. If you offer them a smile instead of a frown they will be encouraged to smile too, and that’s a wonderful thing.

Venus, your ruler, moves back into the work area of your chart today, which suggests you will need to retrace your footsteps and fix something you got wrong a while ago. It’s probably not a serious mistake but you can’t just leave it as it is.

Your enthusiasm for a project may have gone off the boil in recent days but that may just be the universe’s way of telling you it needs to simmer for a while. Forget about it for now and be ready to come back to it early next month.

Anyone who tries to push you into doing something against your will is going to regret it in a big way. As one of the zodiac’s fire signs you know how to bite as well as bark and won’t hesitate to bare your teeth over the next 24 hours.

You won’t solve an emotional problem by running away from it but you might solve it by facing up to facts and then working out what your next move should be. Capricorn is supposed to be a practical sign, so make a stand and make it right.

As retrograde Venus moves into the financial area of your chart today it will become apparent that you have miscalculated your purchasing power. Like it or not you are going to have to make cutbacks, starting with what you spend on other people.

If one area of your life seems to have slowed down to the extent that it has almost stopped you should take that as a sign that you have been doing something wrong. Think about what that might be and then hit the reset button.

Allow your imagination to guide you this year but make sure that the conscious part of your mind remains in control. If you give your daydreams and fancies a free hand they could lead you in directions that may not be in your long-term interests.

Tomorrow’s solar eclipse in your sign is a magnificent cosmic omen and whatever you choose to begin over the next two or three days is sure to be a huge success. No matter how outrageous your dreams may be they WILL come true!

If you get the chance to help someone in need today you must take it, not only because it is right that you should assist those who have been less fortunate in life but also because the universe will reward you handsomely for your generosity.

Do as you please today and don’t listen to those who say you are taking too many risks or biting off more than you can chew, because they are wrong. The upcoming solar eclipse will make even the most difficult of tasks feel easy.

If you honestly believe that you are being undervalued on the work front then now is the time to kick up a fuss about it. Let people in positions of authority know that you are no longer prepared to do an excellent job for so little recognition.

If you follow your instincts today they will lead you in a direction that you thoroughly enjoy. Because the approaching solar eclipse takes place in the most adventurous area of your chart you really can’t put a foot wrong at the moment.

According to the planets you have been far too generous of late and need to cut back on what you do for other people. That applies as much to your generosity with money as it does to your time. You don’t have to pay for everything Virgo!

Before you ride to the rescue of someone in distress today you need to make sure of two things: first, that they really are in distress; second, that they really do want rescuing. It’s good of you to care but it may not actually be necessary.

You are in such a forceful mood that few people will have the power to stand against you, and even fewer will want to try. That’s because they know that when you are in this frame of mind compromise is a word you don’t understand!

Creatively and romantically the next few days will be special and if you can find a way to link your love life with your artistic pursuits then they could be some of the best days of the entire year. Set your sights high then reach for the stars.

Because tomorrow’s solar eclipse takes place in the domestic area of your chart this is the perfect time to resolve any problems you may have with family members. No matter what may have been said or done you CAN now move on from it.

You will have plenty to say for yourself today and over the weekend but you must make sure that every word that comes from your lips is designed to help people feel better about themselves. You will feel great that they feel so good.

If you are considering taking a financial risk then the approaching solar eclipse will point you in the right direction. It will also point out where the pitfalls might be, so don’t just race ahead blindly, listen to what your inner voice tells you.

Go your own way and do your own thing over the coming 12 months and don’t listen to those who urge caution. They may be happy with average goals in life but you are determined to make your mark on the world – and you will!

Try not to overdo it this weekend, because if you go to extremes you could draw unwelcome attention from people who would like nothing better than to see you fall on your face. You may not care much about that now but you will do later on.

If there is something that needs dealing with, something that may be of a less than savory nature, then get on to it now while you have the power of the solar eclipse on your side. Pretending that something does not exist is not an option!

Be careful what you say this weekend because not everyone will appreciate you being so free and easy with your opinions. The most important thing is that you are in a position to back up any claims you make with rock-solid evidence.

You may prefer to keep a low profile over the next 48 hours but events over which you have no control are unlikely to allow that. A great many people will be watching you and they will expect you to perform at your very best level.

Just because you can be outspoken doesn’t mean you have to be and if you are smart you will keep some of what you were planning to say to yourself this weekend. Why risk upsetting people when there is nothing to be gained from it?

If you focus too intently on your own affairs this weekend you could miss something of massive importance that is taking place in the wider world. Keep your eyes and ears open and be ready to take advantage of potentially beneficial changes.

This weekend’s solar eclipse will bring you into contact with someone who, while they may not be on exactly the same wavelength, can be of use to you in a personal or professional capacity. You can easily ignore what you see as their faults.

The more you put off a task you know you won’t enjoy the more of an effort it will be to get started on it, which you must do sooner or later. Roll up your sleeves and get on with it now with help from the solar eclipse.

Although most things are coming easy to you now that does not mean you can take it easy. On the contrary, now more than ever you must double your efforts because for every sacrifice you make the universe will reward you 10 times over.

If there is still a residue of bad feeling on the home front then bring everyone together this weekend and talk through the issue that is dividing you. Most likely it’s not such a big deal at all and a little understanding and forgiveness will clear it up.

Forget about chores and responsibilities this weekend and focus instead on what is taking place in the world outside your door. If you are unhappy with a lot of what you see then make it your business to put some of it right.

If you start something new this weekend it will have the power of the solar eclipse behind it and that means you highly unlikely to lose. Activities of a creative or artistic nature will go especially well and could make you a lot of money.

A solar eclipse on your birthday means that almost anything you turn your hand and mind to over the coming 12 months is going to work out brilliantly. Never mind about the near misses of the past, you’re going to hit the bullseye this year!

Be careful what you wish for today because your power to give life to ideas that previously had existed only in your mind is stronger than you think. Make sure that what you think you want to possess is going to be good for you.

Focus on what really matters as the new week begins and ignore all the trivial things going on in your immediate world. It may not be easy but if you concentrate on what is important to you and those you love you won’t go far wrong.

Whatever you happen to be working on at the moment you must strive to make the best possible job of it. Important people are watching you closely and wondering if you really are the right person to be given so much responsibility. Don’t let them down.

Mars in your sign does wonders for your self-confidence and you won’t hesitate to let others see what you are capable of today. Having said which, don’t go over the top and start behaving in ways that others might see as false bravado.

You know you have nothing to hide but someone you work or do business with has got it into their head that you have been less than truthful with them of late. Does it matter? Not really, but find a way to ease their fears if you can.

You have a tendency to make things difficult for yourself when they should be easy and with so much retrograde activity taking place in your opposite sign that is something you need to watch out for. The simple solution is usually the best solution.

The sun in your opposite sign means that no matter how much you might want to tackle certain tasks on your own they are more likely to be a success if you join forces with like-minded people. Many hands really do make light work.

You may think you can get away with anything today, and maybe you can, but if you are smart you will operate only within accepted guidelines. The less you attract attention to yourself the more enjoyable your ride through life will be.

If loved ones put pressure on you to spend more time with them today you must make the effort. Venus, planet of harmony, in the family area of your chart can be and should be a beneficial influence – but you will need to work at it.

You may be of the opinion that your critics are all talk and no action and can safely be ignored but can you be certain of that? The planets warn you would be wise to watch your back over the next 24 hours, just to be sure.

Whatever plans you make during the early part of the week will have to be revised and maybe even changed later in the week, so leave yourself some wiggle room. If you are not being forced to commit yourself then why would you want to?

You appear to have strayed a little bit off course lately and with both Mercury and Venus moving retrograde through your sign there appears to be no way back. Don’t worry, you will see the light when the time is right. In the meantime, relax.

You are not the sort to work quietly behind the scenes, you want to be out there front and centre where your devoted fans can see you, and you will get numerous opportunities to do just that this year. Put on a show and make it spectacular!

There is a danger that you could be too generous for your own good today and although you may not lose out in the short term you will regret having been so charitable later in the month. Only give to those who truly deserve your assistance.

Try not to let your personal feelings get in the way of your ambitions today. If you decide not to work with someone because you don’t much like them it could set back your career plans by days, weeks or even months.

If someone in a position of authority casts doubts on your abilities today you won’t be happy about it, of course, but don’t let your irritation show. Most likely they are trying to wind you up a bit so you get angry and make a mistake.

Venus is once again moving through one of the best areas of your chart but as it is also going through its retrograde phase you need to be careful. You may believe that you can handle any kind of crisis on your own but don’t overestimate your abilities.

If you make even a small change in your routine or methods today the effects could snowball and get huge by the end of the week. Your best course of action by far is to leave things as they are, for the time being at least.

The more overwhelming life seems to be the more you need to step back from events so you can perceive it all from a wider perspective. Most likely your only real problem at the moment is you have too many things on the go.

Your attraction to someone you work with will be hard to disguise today. If you are smart though you won’t be too open about your feelings because while love planet Venus is moving retrograde you may not get the response you desire.

The fact that you are so much better at a task than your workmates does not mean you must shoulder the entire burden. If some of your colleagues are not up to the job then make it your business to show them how they can improve.

Domestic issues of one sort or another will come to the surface over the next 24 hours but it’s unlikely you will be able to do much about them. Loved ones are not in the mood to listen to your sensible proposals, still less to act on them.

You like to pretend that you have an ultra thick skin but in fact you can be pretty touchy at times. With mind planet Mercury going through its retrograde phase you may have to make a superhuman effort not to react to provocation today.

If you splash out on something that catches your eye today you could find yourself short of cash come the end of the week, so keep your money in your pocket and window shop for a bit. The urge to spend big is just a short-term craving.

If you throw yourself into a new project over the next 24 hours there is a real possibility that you will be looking for a way out before the end of the week, so be sensible and rein in your enthusiasm. You’re already doing too much.

There could be some tension between your professional ambitions and your personal affairs over the next 12 months. The way to resolve that tension is to manage your time wisely and not favour work over family matters. People must come first – always.

You may be confident that you have what it takes to succeed at a difficult task but others appear to be less than convinced. What can you do to prove to them that you are the real deal? Do it quickly before they lose interest.

No matter how good an idea that pops into your head out of nowhere may be you are advised to keep it to yourself for the time being. Your rivals are not above stealing your insights and inventions, so it will pay you to be a bit secretive.

If you approach what occurs today with a cool and rational mind then it won’t be such a big deal. While others are running this way and that in total panic you will be working out what needs to be done. Why make yourself sick with anxiety?

Some of your plans may seem a bit far out to friends and family members but to you they make perfect sense and you have no intention of changing them just to make others feel comfortable. Their world needs shaking up.

You need to be aware that your thoughts cannot be totally trusted at the moment. In fact, while mind planet Mercury continues on its retrograde path you would be wise to check and double check every idea you have. It’s possible you could be wrong.

The more advice you get from partners and colleagues the more inclined you will be to ignore it all and you are right to do so. Only one person in the world knows what is best for you and that is the person you see in the mirror.

You may feel that you need to prove yourself to colleagues and employers but you are wrong. They are well aware of who you are and what you are capable of, so don’t waste time and energy putting on a completely unnecessary show.

You have overlooked a small but important detail and need to retrace your footsteps so you can find out what it is. If you ignore it in the hope that it won’t really matter it may matter more than anything else in a few days time.

Listen to what your inner voice is telling you today and don’t be afraid to act on its advice. Also, be open to a loved one’s body language as they may want you to know something for which they can’t seem to find the right words.

Usually you are pretty good at reading between the lines but for some reason this talent seems to have deserted you and you clearly don’t have the first idea what is going on. Maybe that’s not a bad thing. Maybe, on this occasion, ignorance is bliss.

If a friend or colleague you usually trust makes what sounds like a reasonable suggestion today then let them know you are interested but refuse to commit yourself. The planets warn they may actually have no idea what they are talking about.

Honesty is a must over the next 24 hours, especially when dealing with people on whom you know you will have to depend in the near future. If they find out later on that you have kept the truth from them they won’t be too pleased.

You may be confident that you have what it takes to succeed at a difficult task but others appear to be less than convinced. What can you do to prove to them that you are the real deal? Do it quickly before they lose interest.

This doesn’t have to be a stressful time, in fact if you ignore your fears and commit to having fun it could be one of the most enjoyable weekends for a long time. Let others wallow in their worries and woes while you embrace joy and excitement.

A little self-restraint will go a long way this weekend, so avoid extremes and resolve not to let anything or anyone get to you. Affairs of the heart are under excellent stars but take care you don’t make your partner jealous for no good reason.

Do something that helps you feel good about yourself and which diverts your attention away from any money worries you may be having. Get away from your usual surroundings and get together with people whose positive outlook on life reflects your own.

Venus, planet of love, links with Mars in your sign this weekend, but as Venus is going through its retrograde phase your feelings could be a little too passionate at times. Be careful you don’t scare away someone who could be the perfect match for you.

Give yourself permission to enjoy yourself over the next 48 hours and also promise yourself that no matter how potentially embarrassing some of your actions may be you won’t feel guilty about it. You’re a Leo – people expect you to be larger than life.

If you go out of your way to help someone in need this weekend the universe will go out of its way to help you later on when you are the one who is down on your luck. In the greater scheme of things good deeds never go unnoticed.

Someone you meet while out and about will make a big impression on you and there is even the possibility that you will fall madly in love. Don’t let your hormones lead you by the nose though. Common sense is a must.

The fact that the odds are against you won’t faze you in the slightest this weekend. On the contrary, it will spur you to even greater efforts so you can show you are up there with the best of them. You don’t know the meaning of defeat.

Life has been a bit too predictable for your liking in recent weeks and you intend to do something about it. Start by inviting friends and loved ones to accompany you on some sort of magical mystery tour. Who knows where you might end up!

If you want to impress people this weekend the best way to do it is to show that personal relationships mean more to you than material riches. You can be a bit too driven to succeed at times. It’s love, not money, that makes the world go around.

The planets indicate you have nothing to worry about and everything to look forward to. Despite what some people say the world is not about to come crashing down, in fact it has rarely looked better. Change your perspective and start smiling again.

Your head and your heart will be on the same wavelength this weekend but is it the correct wavelength? As both Mercury, planet of the mind, and Venus, planet of love, are moving retrograde you would be wise not to take anything for granted.

A Mars-Saturn link on your birthday will endow you with a strength of purpose you never thought possible. The bigger the challenges that come your way the more you will enjoy overcoming them. The more you overcome them the happier you will be.

You may panic a bit today because you feel that time is running out and that you have not achieved as much as you should have but the good news is you are wrong. You are actually well on your way to lasting success, so stop fretting.

A difficult phase will end later in the month when the sun moves into your sign but for now your best bet for peace of mind is to hunker down and let the events of the world pass over your head. You don’t HAVE to get involved.

Friends and colleagues will be singing your praises over the next 24 hours but don’t let it go to your head. Above all, don’t let the fact that others are bigging you up encourage you to take the kind of risks that will inevitably go wrong.

Something will happen today that seems like a setback and maybe it is, in a very narrow way, but if you stand back far enough so you can see the bigger picture you will realize that it’s no big deal. Life is good and about to get even better.

You may be tempted to say what you think friends and family members want to hear but if you are smart you will only tell them the truth as you see it, even if that truth might seem a bit harsh. Pulling your punches won’t do them any favours.

If you get the chance to sit back and let friends and relatives look after you today then take it and don’t feel in the least bit guilty. Think of it as the universe’s way of repaying you for all the sacrifices you have made for others.

You don’t have to be overly radical in the changes you make in your life but you do need to make sure they are changes that will last. If you merely move things around at the margins it’s unlikely you’ll make much of a difference.

Keep reminding yourself that for every question there is an answer and that you have a talent for getting to the root of a problem. Ultimately there is no such thing as chance or coincidence – everything in life occurs for a deep cosmic reason.

You are a confident person by nature and with the sun moving through the most dynamic area of your chart your self-belief will reach new heights this week. Try not to be too abrasive though when dealing with what you see as lesser minds.

Issues of a personal nature will take a bit of untangling over the next 24 hours but if you show loved ones that you are determined to work through those issues they will give you whatever assistance you need. Your happiness is their happiness too.

The message of the stars today is that it will pay you to talk a bit less and listen a bit more. No matter how convinced you may be that you know best there is sure to be something you have missed, so show a bit more humility.

Your confidence may be high at the moment but confidence alone can only take you so far. If you find that your efforts in one particular direction are falling short maybe you should take that as a sign that it’s not the right direction for you.

The only danger this year is that you could get a bit too serious about your own emotions and allow your feelings to overrule logic and common sense. The best way to be happy is to believe you deserve it. Don’t take life too seriously.

The temptation to break rules and cut corners today will be strong and it’s unlikely you will be able to resist it. Hopefully nothing bad will come of it but if someone in a position of authority gets upset you will have to admit your guilt.

The fact that certain people have not been pulling their weight is not an excuse for you to do less, in fact it is an invitation to do even more so the powers that be can see you are a cut above everyone else. Their laziness is your opportunity.

Now that your ruling planet Mercury has ended its retrograde phase you can safely make an important decision regarding your career. You have thought about it a lot over the past few weeks – now turn those thoughts into a plan for action.

This is not the right time for second thoughts – whatever it is you decided to start doing a couple of weeks ago is what you must focus on now with the absolute belief that it CAN be made to work. Have confidence in your own abilities.

The message of the charts today is that you must do whatever takes your fancy and completely ignore those who say you are being irresponsible. Maybe they are right, maybe you are, but if you play safe now you will regret it later on.

Make an effort to be nice to everyone over the next 24 hours, even to people who clearly don’t deserve it. Their words and actions must not be allowed to influence you to the extent that you change your ways of dealing with the world.

If you need help of any kind today you must speak up and let friends and colleagues know. Asking for assistance is not a sign of weakness but a sign that you are aware of your own limitations – and in a very real sense that is a strength.

Your mind may be full of good ideas but you cannot make use of them all, so decide what two or three things inspire you the most and focus on those alone. Better still, focus on a single goal and only move on from it when it’s been reached.

If your conscience tells you that what a friend is doing is wrong then you must speak up and let them know. You don’t have to make a huge issue of it, and you should certainly keep it between the two of you, but silence is not an option.

You have never been one of the herd or the mob and there is no reason why you should change your ways now. In fact, if you are smart you will observe how the majority of people are behaving and choose a very different course for yourself.

Whatever challenges you face over the next 24 hours you can find ways to overcome them. It may even be the case that because you are forced to come up with new solutions you are able to turn some of those challenges to your advantage.

It may feel as if nothing is beyond you but don’t start thinking you are invincible and can do as you please because the universe will see that as an invitation to prove you wrong. Never forget that you are human like everyone else!

A Venus-Uranus link on your birthday will tempt you to push boundaries and take chances this year. It may also bring into your life a person who challenges your values in some way. They can teach you a lot but you don’t have to believe every word they say.

You have some major issues to deal with at the moment but if you are smart you will put them on the back burner for a while and commit yourself to having fun. You can get serious again around the time of the full moon on the 13th.

Be careful what you wish for today because if you want something enough the universe will go out of its way to give it to you and you may find you are not yet ready for it. Stick with what you know you can handle for the time being.

Jupiter in your chart is tempting you to do something irrational and maybe it is right, maybe you should. You have never been one for playing safe and there is no reason why you should do so now. Take a chance and make it a big one.

If you try to appease someone who is giving you a hard time they will see that as a sign you can be easily intimidated. Find a way to send them a clear and unequivocal message that you will not allow them to kick you around.

Try not to be quite so intense today. As your ruler Pluto is on good terms with Venus the less pushy you are the better. You can be quite charming when the mood takes you and if it takes you today you’ll have a ton of fun.

You may be enthusiastic about a cause of some sort but you cannot expect friends and family members to share your passion. By all means get more deeply involved today but don’t make the mistake of trying to force others to join you.

Something that looked difficult yesterday will look ridiculously easy today and you will give yourself a mental kick for missing the obvious solution. Don’t be too hard on yourself though as you may be the only one who managed to work it out.

Let loved ones know how you feel today but keep what you say on a friendly level. Pluto’s influence in your sign means that passions are running high at the moment and if you come on too strong you could face an uncomfortable backlash.

Forget about pleasing other people today and do only what makes you feel good. That may sound a bit selfish but the fact is you have done enough for friends, colleagues and even family members and must now look out for yourself.
