Don’t let trivial issues and trivial people distract you. You have a lot to do and only a limited time in which to do it and the last thing you need is to be sidetracked by idiots with ideas that won’t last a minute in the real world.

If something hasn’t worked out for you then so be it. There will be other opportunities to shine and what looks like a minor tragedy now could look like a stroke of good fortune later in the month. The universe knows what you need.

You may be about to take an important decision but before you do you must make sure you have examined every bit of information that could make a difference. Yes, of course you can trust your instincts, but the facts are important as well.

If you enjoy your work then keep at it and pay no heed to those who say you are wasting your time on an issue that is of no real importance. They may actually be right but if it brings a smile to your face that’s good enough.

If you make an effort to help a friend in need today that friend will go out of their way to return the favour later in the month when it is you who needs assistance. No good deed ever goes unrewarded, not that you are looking for payment.

Make sure each step you take today is planned in advance and don’t try to push yourself to go further or faster than feels natural. Your rivals are watching closely and if you stumble or make a minor error they will use that to trash your reputation.

You can probably bluff your way out of the tight situation you now find yourself in but a better tactic would be to hold up your hands and admit that you are out of your depth. No one expects you to be perfect, so don’t expect it of yourself.

Strive to stay on good terms with partners and colleagues today, even though there will be times when their actions are so ridiculous that you want to scream in frustration. It takes all sorts to make a world and not everyone can be as switched on as you.

You know that someone is taking your generosity for granted and you know you should do something about it, but what? Let them know you possess information that could be embarrassing if it were to become public knowledge. It’s called blackmail.

The sun in your fellow earth sign of Taurus means you hold all the best cards and now you must decide how to play them. Instead of laying them all down for one big win try spacing them out. Several smaller wins could add up to more.

The sun’s position in the domestic area of your chart means you can and you must spend more time with the people you love than the people you work with. All relationships are important but family ties come before everything else.

You will be confronted with a situation that you do not have the experience to deal with, so be smart and call in someone who can guide you. It’s not a sign of failure that you need to rely on expert advice, it’s a sign of maturity.

Self-belief is the key to success and you have oodles of the stuff. Set your sights high and once you have reached one goal move on quickly to the next. You may fail once or twice along the way but you will succeed more often than not.

Two different people will give you two different explanations for what’s going on but neither of them will appeal to you. Look at the facts for yourself and draw your own conclusions. Just because someone is an “expert” does not mean they are right.

Take whatever occurs in your world between now and the weekend and make it work for you personally. Allow your instincts to guide you and don’t worry if your ideas clash with other people’s beliefs. You’re right, they’re wrong, that’s it.

Don’t dismiss what friends and family members tell you today just because it runs counter to what you want to hear. You can be a bit headstrong at times and the planets warn if you push ahead with a poorly conceived plan the results won’t be good.

If you want something done today you will have no choice but to do it yourself because friends and colleagues have their own priorities and are under no obligation to junk them in favour of yours. Don’t worry, you’ll work better on your own.

Someone in a position of authority will challenge you today and because you don’t take criticism easily there could be a degree of tension in the air. Ultimately though they have the power and you do not, so don’t push it too far.

Steer clear of other people disputes and refuse to get involved in anything that does not take you closer to your own personal and professional goals. If you choose sides it is inevitable that you will end up a loser in some shape or fashion.

You may be inclined to think more with your heart than your head today but at some stage you will need to get real about a dream of some kind. If you abandon that dream now a better dream will come along to replace it very soon.

If a joint venture of some kind is not working out then move on from it. There is no reason to blame either the other person or yourself – it is just a simple fact of life that sometimes these things are not fated to work out.

Keep your more outrageous thoughts to yourself today. It’s true that you like to be provocative but it’s also true that you go over the top at times and the planets warn if you do that now the consequences won’t be to your liking.

Yes, you are a winner. Yes, you’ve got what it takes. Remind yourself of those facts often and keep plugging away at your long-term objectives. Under the surface some major changes are taking place in your world and, yes, you are making progress.

Forget about what happened in your life yesterday and the day before that, and what might happen in the future, and focus entirely on the here and now. If you can fix your mind in the moment, and keep it there, remarkable things will occur.

You may be inclined to disregard what someone in a position of authority tells you today but that could cause problems later on when you need their assistance to get ahead in the world. Why should they help you when you ignored them?

Someone you meet on your travels will catch your eye and maybe your heart as well. If it’s true that opposites attract you could find yourself getting close to someone whose charms are very different to your own – and remarkably the relationship will work.

Someone you think of as a friend will say something today that annoys you intensely. It may be the case though that they can see things that you cannot, so be open to what they tell you. They could be doing you a very big favor.

If you listen too much to other people’s advice today you could end up facing in several directions at once and ultimately getting nowhere. Pay attention to what friends and family members have to say but let your instincts guide your final choices.

If you don’t feel like getting involved in a project you either don’t know much about or don’t think is going to be a success then walk away from it right now. No one but you has the right to decide how to use your time and energy.

A business endeavour is at the point where you have to decide whether to invest more into it or whether to cut your losses and call it a day. Only you can make that decision but it must be made before the start of next week.

Jupiter in the career area of your chart urges you to be ambitious but a nagging voice at the back of your head says not to take chances. It doesn’t have to be one or the other though – you can aim high without being silly about it.

Your confidence will soar today and all kinds of crazy ideas will get into your head. Fortunately, as the sign of harmony and balance it’s unlikely you will do anything too outrageous or dangerous – though it won’t stop you wanting to!

Something you felt unable to say to a friend in the past must be said now. Forget about how your words might hurt their feelings and be 100 per cent honest in your appraisal of what they are up to. One day they will thank you for it.

The more others praise you today the more suspicious you will be of their motives, but there is really no need. According to the planets they genuinely do believe you are the best thing since sliced bread, so feel free to enjoy the adulation.

You must learn to delegate more. No doubt it is true that you can do most things better than your colleagues but you cannot do them all at the same time, so trust others to at least make an adequate job of what you cannot do yourself.

Jupiter in the most dynamic area of you chart means you have it in your power to turn an average success into a major one. Aim for nothing less than excellence in everything you do today and over the weekend, and expect it from other people too.

Family matters are under excellent stars now and any disagreements you’ve had with loved ones over the past week or two can easily be resolved. Remind yourself often that you are on the same side and should be looking out for one another.

A change of direction is a must this year as you have reached the end of your current journey and need a new challenge. Make a break with the past and make it one that cannot be reversed. Move forward fast and don’t look back.

If a colleague asks what you think of their efforts this weekend they won’t like your answer. You are in one of those moods when you have no intention of easing back on your ability to identify other people’s faults. It’s unlikely they will ask you again!

As communications planet Mercury joins the sun in your sign this weekend you will find your voice and let everyone know what you think about recent events. You have never been one to pull your punches, so chances are you will upset a few people.

You will be more reserved than normal over the next 48 hours and that’s a good thing. There is a lot to get your head around at the moment so you won’t want to mix with people who make the kind of noise that makes it difficult to think.

Try not to read too much into a situation that is really quite simple. Just because someone seems less loving than usual does not mean they have any less affection for you. It just means they have other issues to deal with, so give them some space.

As Mercury moves into the career area of your chart this weekend you will have plenty to say for yourself on the work front but be careful you don’t say too much. You can be rather opinionated at times and colleagues won’t appreciate being criticized.

You may have total faith in what you are doing but not everyone is convinced it will work out for the best. If you want to win over the doubters you will need to do something drastic over the next 48 hours. Start delivering on your promises.

Don’t take anything for granted this weekend where business and financial matters are concerned. The planets warn if you assume that you won’t be cheated you most likely will be, so make sure everyone can see you are too sharp to trick.

If you want friends and colleagues to understand what you are trying to say this weekend you will have to spell it out for them in short words. Not everyone is as dumb as you seem to think they are but there is no point taking chances.

You don’t have to do something dramatic to get yourself noticed over the next 48 hours but you probably will. Enjoy the shocked look on people’s faces when they hear you say things that almost everyone else is afraid to give voice to.

As Mercury, planet of the mind, moves into the most creative area of your chart this weekend some of the ideas you come up with will be touched by genius. If you can envisage new ways to get ahead in the world then go for it 100 per cent.

If you are prepared to overlook someone’s bad points and focus only on their good points this weekend you may be surprised to discover that you make a pretty good team. Most likely they are making an effort to overlook your bad points as well.

It may seem as if you are out of step with the people around you, and maybe you are, but so what? If friends and colleagues want to sign up to the herd mentality that’s up to them but you don’t have to let others dictate to you.

You already know what you want to accomplish over the coming year and with Mercury moving into your sign on your birthday you can now draw up a plan of action that will make it happen. The path to success will be fun as well as profitable.

If you can think it you can do it, even though today’s full moon will place obstacles on the path between you and your goal. Plan long-term and move toward your ultimate objective a step at a time. Make progress each and every day.

Although there is a full moon in your opposite sign today that does not mean you can withdraw into your shell and wait for the storm to blow over. The more you interact with other people the more you will understand their behaviour.

Success is yours if you want it but it won’t come easy. Cosmic activity in the work area of your chart means you will have to push hard to make progress but if you are willing to put in the effort the universe will richly reward you.

Make sure you are in full control of whatever situations you find yourself in today because someone who resents your popularity won’t hesitate to take advantage of any mistakes you may make. Watch your back but watch where you are walking as well.

As today’s full moon takes place in the domestic area of your chart you should aim to spend more time with loved ones and less time on getting ahead in the world – for now. You can make up lost ground on your rivals later on.

Self-belief is a must today as some of the things you hear being said about you could throw you off course if you take them to heart. Pay no attention to other people’s criticisms and push ahead with your plans with courage and confidence.

Your material and emotional values are likely to be at odds during the early part of the week and you will need to find ways to satisfy them both. If helping other people costs you money then so be it. Doing the right thing is its own reward.

The full moon in your sign means you are going to be at loggerheads with people whose outlook on life is the opposite of your own. If you can, keep some distance between you. If you can’t, try not to let their stupidity enrage you too much.

Don’t take anything for granted over the next 24 hours because the full moon is going to throw everything up in the air and there is no telling where it will all come down again. This a time to hedge your bets rather than take a gamble.

The more others say you need to get in on the latest big thing quickly, or lose out to your rivals, the more you should hold back and wait to see how the situation develops. It could be that the latest big thing is the last thing you need.

No matter how ambitious you may be you need to be cautious today as the full moon will pressure you to take chances that could prove destructive. It won’t be until much later in the week that it becomes clear what your next move should be.

If you leave tasks that need to be done to the very last minute today the results will be anything but satisfying. Push yourself to get on top of your workload early in the day, then relax later on while your rivals are still struggling.

Your willingness to reach out to other people, both at work and in your private life, will determine what kind of year this is going to be. Just because friends and loved ones and work colleagues are demanding does not mean you cannot get along.

If something goes wrong today and you are at least partly to blame just hold up your hand and admit that you made an error of judgment. No one expects you to be perfect and friends and colleagues will respect your honesty.

The harder you try to figure something out the more it baffles you, so quit trying to make sense of it and pretend that it is of no significance. The best way to get at the truth is to let it come to you when the time is right.

You won’t be able to avoid an unpleasant situation today, so prepare yourself mentally and emotionally to deal with it as best you can. Others will be impressed by your ability to carry on as if nothing can surprise or shock you.

If you try to hide your feelings today you are sure to fail, so be honest about what is upsetting you and let others help you sort it out. It doesn’t have to be you against the world, not with so many good people eager to assist you.

You may not see eye-to-eye with someone in a position of authority today but don’t make a big thing of it. Do whatever it is they ask of you and make the best possible job of it. It will be their fault if it goes wrong, not yours.

If you can’t put your finger on what is wrong with your world at the moment it may be because you are trying too hard. Focus on something less challenging and let your subconscious mind work it out for you. The answer is actually quite simple.

The more you try to make sure nothing goes wrong today the more likely it is that something will, so stop putting so much pressure on yourself and react to events rather than try to dictate them. Life is supposed to be fun, so smile more and worry less.

You have never been the sort to approach a task in a slapdash manner but not everyone is as disciplined as you and a colleague will try to persuade you to lower your standards today. Don’t do it. Get a new partner or work on your own.

You may think you can muddle through and still make a success of what you are working on but the planets warn that won’t happen. You need a road map that will take you from where you are now to your destination, so draw one up quickly.

A rival may have more power than you but they don’t have your brains, so think ahead and work out how you can outwit them, then apply that knowledge to what you are doing. Stay calm, think clearly and refuse to be intimidated.

If a friend or loved one is having difficulties getting their message across you must make it your business to assist them. According to the planets they have something important to say, something you can profit from, so help them find the words.

You don’t have to take a friend’s advice about an ongoing problem but deep down you know you won’t succeed without it, so let them direct you and don’t feel bad that you could not figure it out for yourself. You cannot possibly know everything.

Sometimes you can come across as overly assertive, even aggressive, and that is something you must watch out for today. Just because someone has a different way of doing things does not mean they are wrong, and they are certainly not evil.

This could be one of those rare and wonderful days when everything goes right and it feels as if the universe is behind you 100 per cent. Take advantage of the situation and do your best to share your good fortune with everyone you encounter.

Whatever the majority opinion happens to be today you will take the opposing view, for no other reason than you want to stir things up a bit. Don’t go too far though and support ideas that are false simply for the fun of it.

No one is out to get you and no one wants to see you fail. Sometimes you think the worst of other people for no good reason and if you allow that mindset to take hold today you could cut yourself off from a potentially profitable alliance.

Don’t spend all your time and energy on work today. In fact, make it your No. 1 priority to get together with people you love and do some fun things together. Your chores and responsibilities will still be there waiting for you tomorrow.

The more others complain that life is unfair and that nothing ever seems to go right for them the more you will just get on with what needs to be done. Hopefully your example can help them to be more positive and productive in the future.

You may disagree profoundly with a colleague’s opinions but that does not mean you can’t get along with them. In fact, if you make an effort to swap viewpoints today you may be surprised by how much you learn from each other.

Make a point of doing only those things that bring you personal pleasure. Some people may insist that you need to knuckle down and get serious about your work but they are wrong. Today is a day for enjoying yourself to the max.

Refuse point blank to take on any more duties and responsibilities. You have enough on your plate as it is and don’t need to add to the pressure. Finish what you are already working on today before even considering doing something extra.

You are in no mood to play a supporting role, either on the work front or in your social sphere. As one of the zodiac’s cardinal signs you possess the kind of star quality that lesser lights cannot hope to compete with. Keep shining!

If someone who has let you down more than once asks you to trust them today you must have none of it. They may be sincere this time but you cannot afford to take the chance that they are either lying or have overestimated their own abilities.

If something needs fixing today the safe option would be to call in an expert and get it done right. You could have a go at it yourself of course but what happens if you get it wrong? At the very least the cost will be double.

Money matters are under encouraging stars on your birthday, so look for ways to boost your income and don’t be afraid to take the occasional risk. Most importantly though you must listen to what your inner voice tells you. It could make you rich.

You must not allow your heart to rule your head today, not even if friends and loved ones beg you to see things their way. If their way is clearly the wrong way you have a duty to point that out to them. It’s to their long-term benefit.

If you have to tread on a few toes or put a few noses out of joint today then so be it. You may be a nice guy by nature but you have important things to do and cannot afford to let other people’s stupidity stand in your way.

You may have no end of duties and obligations to fulfil but you need to make time for fun and games as well. You do your best work when you have a smile on your face, so remind yourself what a wonderful life this is and get cracking.

Don’t worry if you feel a bit down in the dumps today because what happens over the weekend will liven things up and present you with the type of opportunities that make you glad to be alive – which is what you should be every day.

Because others trust your judgment so much whatever you say to friends and family members over the next 24 hours will be seen as the truth, so make sure you know what you are talking about. And if you don’t know something just say so.

You need to stop tormenting yourself about something that happened in the dim and distant past. You may have been partially to blame but the consequences were minor and there is no need to punish yourself for it. It’s all part of the rough and tumble of life.

Don’t try to ignore a situation that clearly needs to be dealt with in a forthright and forceful manner. The fact that someone made an error no longer matters. What does matter is that you help them to find ways to make it right again.

Try not to push yourself too hard today because if you do you will quickly discover that the more effort you put in the less you will get back in return. Also, a more relaxed approach to daily events will do wonders for your mood.

You enjoy a good debate but if you don’t feel this is the right time for a deep discussion then don’t force it. Even a curious and quarrelsome Sag sometimes needs to switch off their mind and let the events of the world pass them by.

If you cannot be bothered to defend your own interests then you really cannot expect other people to do it for you. You need to snap out of your current lethargic mood and get busy making sure your position in the world is secure.

You have never been the sort to give up on something just because it is difficult so why are you considering it now? The planets suggest you are very close to making a breakthrough and will hate yourself later on if you stop trying now.

If you need to ask someone to do you a favour today then come right out with it and don’t worry that they might refuse. Chances are they have been hoping you will call on them to assist you and will help out with no questions asked.

Sometimes it’s okay to be a bit selfish and there will be times over the next 12 months when you really must put your own interests first no matter what that might mean for other people. What you do for yourself will benefit them too later on.

If you feel like you need a break then take one and ignore those who say you have no time to slow down. You do in fact have all the time in the world, so be kind to yourself and make sure you greet the weekend feeling relaxed.

You may have to do some serious digging to find out what is really going on in your everyday environment. The more friends and neighbors try to tell you there is nothing to be worried about the more concerned you should be!

Is a family matter worth getting worked up about? Almost certainly the answer is NO, so refuse to let your fears get the better of you and act as if everything will work out for the best in the end. Strangely, it usually does in these situations.

If someone you work or do business with criticizes you for no good reason today you cannot afford to let them get away with it. If you fail to stand up for yourself on this occasion they will see it as a sign of weakness, so speak up.

Mars in your sign makes you even more assertive than you usually are but there is a danger you could go too far and give others the impression that you think of yourself as some sort of dictator. That’s a good way to spark a revolution!

You may not be the sort to waste precious time on activities that don’t have a measurable end but even a Virgo needs to relax once in a while. Kick off your shoes, turn on the TV and give yourself permission to chill for an hour or three.

Keep your plans to yourself today because the less other people know about what you are up to the more likely it is you will make a success of it. The planets indicate this is one of those occasions when you should work on your own.

You may lack some of the material resources that your rivals can call on but you have what they do not possess: strength and stamina and self-belief. Focus on your No. 1 goal and act as if it’s success is a forgone conclusion.

You need to be careful when dealing with people in positions of power because if you say something that is even remotely critical they won’t take kindly to it. For your own self-protection keep your thoughts to yourself for the time being.

You seem to be leading a charmed existence at the moment and long may it continue. Your run of good luck is more likely to persist if you stick with your top objective rather than chop and change. Why tinker with a winning formula?

If that little lightbulb in your head sparks into life today you must drop whatever else you may be doing and chase after that new idea. As someone who likes to move with the times you won’t be afraid to change course completely.

You need to take what a partner or loved one tells you today very seriously indeed. You may be inclined to believe that they are overreacting but the planets warn it could be you who has failed to recognize what is really going on.

The negative thoughts that have been holding you back will disappear as if by magic this weekend. Things that previously seemed like obstacles to your progress will now be seen as stepping stones to success. Life is good and getting better by the minute.

If you approach the weekend free of limiting beliefs the results will be spectacular. The union of the sun and Uranus in your sign is a cosmic promise that some really good things are coming your way. Be ready to take full advantage of them.

The more you try to move in a certain direction the more something you cannot see or feel or understand seems to get in your way. Maybe you should take the hint and stop trying so hard. Sit back, relax and let events carry you along.

What occurs over the next 48 hours may throw your plans into disarray but if you could stand back and see the bigger picture you would realize that is actually a very good thing. In a strange way a little bit of disruption will be hugely liberating.

What is so far outside your experience and your comfort zone that you know there is no point going after it? Well that is what you should now be aiming for. Changes planet Uranus will make all things possible for you this weekend, so make it happen.

Because Virgo is such a practical sign you tend to believe that everything you do in life must have a purpose, but the message of the stars this weekend is that you will accomplish more if you don’t make plans. You will have more fun as well.

Don’t worry too much if the people you have to deal with this weekend act in ways that seem foolish or irrational. It’s likely that from their point of view you look equally silly, so live and let live and expect the best rather than the worst.

You may be a creature of habit but every now and then you go right the other way and do something shocking. You don’t have to be reckless over the next 48 hours but you do have to remind people that you should never be taken for granted.

The more you are told that something you are working on cannot possibly succeed the more you will go out of your way to prove the doubters wrong. On the work front especially your ideas will be touched by genius and your reputation will soar.

If your rivals want to show off this weekend that’s up to them but you won’t feel the need to play to the crowd. You really don’t care what other people think of your aims and ambitions, so why risk making a spectacle of yourself?

Your ruler Uranus is energized by the sun this weekend, which means you will strive to free yourself from what has been holding you back. By all means chuck out the junk in your life but don’t give up on relationships that could still be of use.

Give your mind permission to roam this weekend. The more you let your thoughts drift this way and that the more likely it is you will hit upon an idea that can transform not only your own life but the lives of loved ones as well.

You may not want to offend other people but some of the things you have to say over the next few days are unlikely to go down well with those who would prefer to avoid the truth. Call it as you see it and to hell with the consequences.

It might be best to keep your thoughts to yourself today, mainly because if you let slip an idea that others think is good they could try to steal it from you. Adopt your strong, silent persona and don’t say a single unnecessary word.

The fact that you have fallen behind a bit in your chores over the past week or so no longer matters. The sun’s move into your sign tomorrow means you will have bigger fish to fry, so let others take care of the small stuff.

It may look as if your luck has run out but if you allow your mind to get into that sort of negative groove you may never get it out of there again. Focus on what is going right in your life – there’s plenty you can be proud of.

You will find it easy to get things done today and even easier tomorrow and the day after that. Most tasks you can deal with on your own but there will be one job that requires a team effort to succeed, so ask for help when you need it.

If you don’t like what has been happening on the work front then you must speak up about it. The sun’s move into the career area of your chart tomorrow makes this a promising time for your long-term ambitions, but you’ve got to be brave.

Any risks you have taken with money over the past few weeks will either pay off or cost you dearly over the next few days. Whatever the outcome you must then move on from your old goals and focus on something new and exciting.

The fact that some people do not approve of what you are doing not only won’t deter you but may actually make you even more resolved to rock the boat. Your determination to succeed means you won’t allow yourself to be dictated to.

The message of the stars today is that if you waste time on matters that are of no real consequence you may lose the support of partners and loved ones and colleagues. A more serious attitude to life in general is an absolute must.

There is no reason to be suspicious of what colleagues are up to on the work front. Once the Sun changes signs tomorrow you should be able to see that there is a method to their apparent madness. In fact they are every bit as sane as you are.

The more people you can win over to your side the easier it will be to turn a big idea into big profits. Explain to friends and colleagues in plain and simple language why backing your latest proposal is as good as money in the bank.

You have a tendency to focus on minor details while overlooking the bigger picture but that needs to be turned on its head. Look beyond your immediate environment and take note of what is going on in the world, and how you can profit from it.

The recipe for success for the coming 12 months could not be simpler: the harder you work the more progress you will make. Have nothing to do with people who encourage you to ignore rules and cut corners – they’re losers one and all.

It’s now time to step up the pace and leave your rivals behind. The sun’s change of signs today will boost both your physical and mental energy and make it easier to tackle tasks that daunt other people. You’re an Aries – nothing fazes you!

If a loved one gives you a hard time today it will pay you to find out why. Most likely they are not being obstructive for the fun of it but because they believe you should be spending more time with them. Try not to be so emotionally distant.

As the Sun moves into your sign today your expectations, both of yourself and of other people, will reach new levels of excellence. Don’t try to go it alone though – teamwork is essential if you want to make the most of everyone’s talents.

You may not take a friend’s plans seriously but that could turn out to be a mistake later in the week when they achieve something that you could have been a part of. In future, try to accept the fact that other people have good ideas too.

If you allow minor setbacks to get you down today they could turn into major obstacles, at least in your own mind, towards the end of the week. Keep telling yourself that all things are possible, and most likely they will be.

As the sun moves into the area of your chart that governs your status today you must come to terms with the fact that some people are above you and some people are below you in the pecking order. Know your place and make it work for you.

You have been far too serious about life in recent weeks and need to find ways to approach everyday events from more light-hearted angles. The Sun’s move into the most adventurous area of your chart suggests it’s time for a change.

Loved ones will be very demanding today and some of the things they expect you to do for them will test your patience to the full. Let them know that you won’t be doing anything of an unethical nature, no matter what the rewards may be.

Reject negative thinking in all its guises and believe that you have what it takes to be the biggest and the best at what you do in life. Your can-do attitude will take you far and rub off on friends and colleagues too. Climb some mountains together.

At some stage today you will need to admit that you have been far too lenient when dealing with someone who continually lets you down. The fact that they cannot or will not keep up with your expectations means it’s time to go on without them.

Artistic activities are under excellent stars now the sun is moving in your favur again, so get out your paint box or your guitar and create a new masterpiece. It may or may not impress the experts but what really matters is that it delights you.

If you are thinking of starting a new project you should let loved ones in on your plans and invite them to help you. By doing things as a team your understanding of each other’s moods and needs will grow and you will move closer together emotionally.

A sun-Saturn link on your birthday means you must look at everything you do over the coming year in terms of costs and benefits. If you want to raise your status in the world you cannot afford to waste a single minute on matters of a trivial nature.

If you tell colleagues and rivals they must obey the rules then you must obey them as well. There will come a moment today when you are tempted to take an unethical shortcut but you must resist. If not, they will call you a hypocrite.

You need to be more daring when it comes to dealing with matters of a financial nature. No, that is not an invitation to take the kind of risks that could cost you a fortune, but why not be a bit more adventurous in your choice of investments?

With both the sun and Jupiter moving through your sign you will find it easy to move on from the past. True, there are still lessons you can learn from yesterday’s failures but you must focus more on the opportunities of today and tomorrow.

If you have confidence in your abilities and are willing to take a few risks you will soon accomplish something remarkable. As one of the zodiac’s Water signs you have a tendency to be too humble for your own good. Show some ego for a change.

If you make a good impression on people in positions of power over the next few days they will go out of their way to smooth your own path to the top. Why? Because when they look at you they can see a kindred soul, brimming with ambition.

Do you meet a challenge head-on or do you run away and hide? When it’s put like that the answer is obvious as you don’t want to look like a coward but you may be tempted to opt out of a confrontation today. Don’t. Stand and fight.

If you have set your sights on a specific goal you must keep at it until it is done. If you get distracted by other matters you may never get the chance to come back to your original aim. Be ruthless with your focus and time management.

This is not the right time to be open about thoughts and feelings you know could have a damaging effect on how other people see you. It’s good that you want to be honest but easing your conscience could have major consequences.

Whatever you choose to do over the next 24 hours some people will criticize you for it, so you might as well resolve to push ahead regardless and close your ears to their complaints. Seriously, why should you care what other people think of you?

A creative endeavour of some kind is going well and one final push will take it over the line. The harder you work today the less likely it is you will be playing catch-up come the end of the week. Go for it and get it.

Now that the sun has joined Jupiter in the most dynamic area of your chart any restrictions that have been holding you back will disappear and you will be free to follow your dream. Why just one dream though – why not several?

If you spend too long sizing up an opportunity of some kind today you may find that it passes on to one of your rivals. The moment you get the chance to improve your professional or financial position you must go for it without hesitation.

Major changes in the world around you will be reflected in your own lifestyle over the coming year but that is far from a bad thing. With every change there will be a new opportunity to grow on both a personal and a professional level. It’s all good.

Any obstacles you encounter today will be dealt with quickly and efficiently. You are in one of those moods when you are driven to show the best side of yourself, not least because there may be a potential love interest watching your every move!

You seem to believe that invisible forces are working against you, but it isn’t true and you need to get over it. Sit some place quiet today and count how many things you have to be thankful for, then treat yourself to a more positive outlook on life.

For too long you have lurked in the shadows where the world cannot see your magnificence. Over the next few days though you must thrust yourself front and centre and put on the kind of show that leaves even your detractors open-mouthed in wonder.

You are under no obligation to let others know where you are going and what you are doing. In fact, go out of your way to keep them in the dark. The less they know about your plans the less opportunities they will have to derail them.

This should be one of the best times of the year for you. With Mars and the sun both moving in your favor there is really nothing you cannot do now. And with love planet Venus on your side as well you won’t lack for attractive travelling companions.

Jupiter’s influence in the career area of your chart indicates good things if you are brave enough to step outside your comfort zone and try something new. Don’t worry that your efforts might fall short, worry only that they might never start at all.

A good deed you did for a friend or colleague at some point in the past will come back to you in a nice way today. With your ruling planet Venus aligned with Mars the universe will balance the books in a decisive and delightful manner.

You may be tempted to join the latest craze because you think only the early adopters will make money from it but don’t be hasty. The planets warn it’s not quite as good as some people claim it is, so observe from a distance for a while.

The world is so full of interesting activities and interesting people that you could easily use up the next 24 hours without doing anything substantial with your time. But is that really so bad? No, it isn’t. You don’t have to make every minute count.

You seem more at ease with yourself at the moment and that’s good because the challenges that come your way over the next few days will be best dealt with if you are feeling relaxed both in body and mind. Life is to be enjoyed.

The path you are following may be meandering and there may be better ways to get from where you are now to where you most want to be, but stick with it. A more favourable path will open up before you very soon, so be patient.

Someone you meet on your travels could change your life for the better but you won’t notice them if you walk along looking at the ground while pondering your problems. Instead, look straight ahead and smile at everyone you pass in the street.

A Venus-Mars link on your birthday will do wonders for your love life, whether you are currently single or in a relationship. If you are open about how you feel others will be open with you and a real meeting of hearts and minds will take place.

You will be a bit restless today and certainly won’t be happy if others expect you to stay in one place for any length of time. You know that your chores and duties can wait, so don’t be intimidated by those who say you are being irresponsible.

The more someone tries to win you round to their point of view today the more you must stand firm and let them know that your very different outlook on life won’t be changing, not now, not ever. Bulls are supposed to be stubborn.

The cosmic picture is so much in your favor now that you can get just about anything you desire, but that does not mean you should chase after everything. Only pursue those goals you know will deliver real value to you and your loved ones.

You may not want to upset someone in a position of authority but if you don’t speak up about an injustice of some kind it will make life harder for you in the long-term. Cancer is a cardinal sign and cardinal signs are supposed to be courageous.

Not everyone approves of the way you are currently living but do you care about that? Of course not. Mars in your sign gives you boundless self-confidence and if others expect you to change your ways they are going to be disappointed.

No matter what you say over the next 24 hours family and friends will take an opposing view. The best way to deal with their negativity is to ignore it and move ahead confidently without their assistance. None of their predictions will come true.

You want to get out and about and have a fun time but some people think you should be tackling more serious issues. Maybe they are right but you really don’t care. A moment in which you don’t smile is, to you, a moment wasted.

Like everyone you have a skeleton or two in your closet and something embarrassing could become public knowledge today. Don’t try to ignore it. Instead, embrace it and own it. It’s one of those things that makes you more interesting than most other people.

Someone who has ideas and opinions at odds with your own will come looking for an argument today and you are in just the mood to give it to them. The ensuing battle of words and wits will be hugely enjoyable, even more so when you win!

The more others say you are stuck in your ways the more you will agree with them. You are at your best when following a familiar path, so make it clear you have no intention of signing up to the latest big thing. You may laugh at it though.

You may think you can take on the world and win, and maybe you can, but why set your sights so high that you increase by tenfold the chances that you might fail? Set yourself challenges that move you up just a step at a time.

You may be one of the more agreeable members of the zodiac but there are times when even you have to draw a line and refuse to deal with those whose values you find repulsive. One particular group of people must be kept at arm’s length today.

You may be tempted to streamline your affairs over the coming year but don’t go to extremes. Instead, be pragmatic and aim to reform your life just a day at a time. That way you are less likely to throw out things you are still going to need.

Even if you feel rich at the moment you cannot afford to throw money away. You may be tempted to go on a spree this weekend but with Saturn about to enter your sign there could be unforeseen and unwelcome consequences, so show some restraint.

As mind planet Mercury joins forces with Uranus in your sign this weekend your craving for excitement will go through the roof. Don’t stop to think if an idea that pops into your head is a good one, just follow it all the way to the end.

Hopefully the fact that you have doubts about someone’s loyalty will be enough to stop you from confiding in them over the next 48 hours. If you do open up without thinking you could find your big secret is all over the internet come Monday morning!

Someone you usually find it hard to get along with will be all sweetness and light this weekend. Can you believe their change of attitude? Is it some kind of trick? Don’t be so suspicious. They just want to build a more positive relationship.

Something surprising will occur on the work front this weekend and it will be the kind of surprise you enjoy. Who knew that someone in a position of authority felt so warmly about you? Well now you do, so make the most if it.

If a new fad or fashion grabs your attention this weekend there is a danger that you will lavish far too much time and attention on it. It may be a lot of fun but there are still plenty of mundane matters that need taking care of.

As the sun is now moving through the most adventurous area of your chart you won’t want to stay with the same old people in the same old places, so get out and about and have a great time. And start thinking seriously about your next vacation.

If a loved one confides in you today you must respect their desire to keep what they tell you strictly to yourself. You can, though, make suggestions as to what they should be doing next. Be radical in your thinking but don’t try to make decisions for them.

You will need to slow down a bit this weekend, not just physically but mentally too. Your mind has been on the go non-stop of late and there are clear signs of fatigue that you must not ignore. Do something that requires minimal deep thinking.

Anyone who thinks you are set in your ways will now have to admit there is an adventurous side to your nature as well. Do something over the next 48 hours that not even your nearest and dearest would expect of you. Maybe something romantic?

If a friend or colleague is feeling low make it your business to cheer them up. A few kind words from you could be all it takes to get them smiling again, and you will get a kick from helping them fall in love with life again.

Even if you have all the facts and figures on your side you are unlikely to win an argument with someone who is just too stubborn to accept there is a better way of doing things. Leave them alone and let them learn from their own mistakes.

A sun-Pluto link on your birthday makes this the perfect time to let go of the past and start building a wonderful future. The more emotional baggage you can dispose of now the happier and more successful you will be over the coming year.

You need to let the doubters know that no matter how big the obstacles that are in your path may be you have what it takes to smash right through them. Be like the Bull, your symbol, this week – lower your horns and charge!

As Mercury, your ruling planet, joins the sun in your sign today you know what you want, you know how to get it and you know that no force on Earth can keep it from you. Life is good and about to get many times better.

You are trying to please too many people and in the process pleasing no one at all. The only thing that matters now is that you please yourself first, because if you are unhappy with your life everyone else will be unhappy as well.

You may have to flex your muscles a bit today so as to remind those who have forgotten that you are far from being a weakling. You probably won’t have to do anything drastic, just bare your teeth and roar a little. They’ll get the message.

If you discover something about a friend or colleague that you know they would rather stay secret then be smart and keep it to yourself. Don’t even let them know that you know, because that alone could put a barrier between you.

What other people think about what you are doing is of no importance, the only thing that matters is that you are happy with your efforts. The moment anyone tries to question your motives or your methods is the moment you must say “goodbye”.

If you want to change your life for the better you are going to have to give up something that is holding you back both mentally and emotionally. Once you have created a big enough space something fantastic will come in to fill it.

Life is too short to waste time worrying about whether you are doing the right thing, driving the right car or getting to know the right people. Follow your heart and know that wherever you end up that is exactly where the universe wants you to be.

You may be tempted to hit back at a rival by saying something about them that, while true, is also a little unkind. You are better than that though, so hold your tongue and focus on following your own dreams rather than trying to scupper theirs.

You may have to tread on a few toes to get from where you are now to where you most want to be but that’s okay. Life is too short to worry unduly about people who don’t think and move fast enough to get out of the way.

You must come to terms with the fact that you are no longer in the driving seat and that loved ones will be calling the shots for a while. Don’t make a big deal of it though as the decisions they make will undoubtedly be for the best.

What you hear today may or may not be music to your ears but it will be the truth, so pay attention to what others are saying and don’t just dismiss it as tittle-tattle. In among the gossip and idle chatter is information you need to know.

There is no point complaining about what is going on in the world if you are not going to try to do something about it. Make it your business today to get involved with a cause that is dear to your heart. Back it with a donation too.

Today’s new moon in your sign will encourage you to take the kind of risks that other people find terrifying. But you are not other people, you are a hugely ambitious Gemini who has big plans for the future – and the future is what you choose to create.

Do you need to use an extreme solution to solve what is really quite a simple problem? Of course not, so back off from what you were planning and give it a bit more thought. As it’s not a new problem there could be an off-the-shelf solution.

There is no point chasing after an objective you know you are never going to be able to reach. Instead, choose a goal that is closer to home and focus your time and your energy exclusively on that. Small steps can take you a very long way.

You know there must be limits to your ambitions but the planets say you can achieve much more than you seem to believe. Today’s new moon will prompt you to raise your sights and set new limits that are way above the restrictions of the past.

Today’s new moon means you can afford to sit back and let life come to you. There are times in life when if you consciously choose to make less of an effort the universe will sweep in and make it for you. This is one of them.

Think for yourself today and ignore those who warn you should change your opinions because the experts know better than you. If your sixth sense says those so-called experts don’t know what they are talking about it’s your sixth sense you must follow.

Don’t expect much enthusiasm for what you want to do today because partners and loved ones have their own ideas and are not about to change them to satisfy you. Maybe you should drop your own plans and go along with theirs instead.

Try not to spend too much time on details today because it is the bigger picture that matters. Your current project is just one piece of a giant cosmic jigsaw and your task now is to work out what the final picture is going to look like.

A new creative activity will grab your interest today and it won’t be long before it becomes a central feature of your world. Not only will it be a lot of fun but it could also bring in some serious money. There is always a market for genius.

Fixing other people’s problems will take up quite a bit of your time today, so try not to commit yourself to anything new on the work front. You may think you have the strength and stamina to do it all but you are just kidding yourself.

Intense cosmic activity in the area of your chart that governs travel and social activities means you will be even more friendly and outgoing than usual today. Avoid people whose outlook on life is defined by negativity – they are a drain on your energy.

The sun, Mercury and Jupiter in the money area of your chart makes this a good time to look at your financial situation and start making plans for a richer and more enjoyable future. Think lucky and you will be lucky, it’s really that simple.

After being on such an emotional high over the past few days it follows that you could feel a bit down over the next 24 hours, but it is only a temporary blip in your surge to the top. Overall you are still on an upward trajectory.

You don’t have to conform to other people’s expectations and be the life and soul of the party. You have a great deal on your mind at the moment, so you cannot afford to waste time and energy on people who don’t know how to be serious.

All things are possible for you now and if you can believe that with both your head and your heart the events of the next few days will seem nothing less than miraculous. To start with, a new friendship will inspire you to reach for the stars.

When you want something enough no one and nothing is able to stop you, and because you desire to move up in the world all your efforts must now be focused on your career. Powerful people will admire your ambition, and maybe fear it a bit as well.

If you can visualize what it is you are trying to accomplish there is no doubt at all that it will soon be a reality. The more you can focus your thoughts on a single ambition the more likely it is your dream result will take shape.

Do you have what it takes to compete at the highest level? Of course you do! Make it your business between now and the weekend to act as if the fruits of success are already coming your way. As you think, so it will be.

You will have to deal with someone today who is every bit as ambitious as you are and the potential for conflict is clear. However, if you can put aside your competitive instincts for a bit you can find ways to work together that benefit you both.

If you approach a task you don’t have much enthusiasm for in a positive frame of mind it may turn out to be an enjoyable experience. What you do matters less than the manner in which you choose to do it, so choose energy and excellence.

You may not care much for rewards and applause but you are going to get plenty of both over the next few days. How long you remain in the spotlight will depend on how well you handle yourself while every eye in the house is on you.

The more advice you get from family and friends and colleagues today the more inclined you will be to ignore it and that’s a good thing. As one of the zodiac’s most intuitive signs you know you can trust what your inner voice tells you.

If you make a promise of some kind today and then fail to deliver on it your reputation will sink like a stone. You may not like saying “No” to people who need your assistance but sometimes it’s the only sensible course of action.

You are being far too hard on yourself when it comes to assessing how well your creative efforts compare to what other people are doing. The planets indicate this would be a good time to remind yourself that you are human like everyone else.

The more friends and colleagues praise you to the skies today the more you must guard against all that approval going to your head. The universe will bring you down to earth with a bang if you start to believe you are better than everyone else.

Take what other people tell you today with a large grain of salt, because they could be trying to butter you up for their own ends. You don’t need their acceptance to feel good about yourself, you just need to carry on with what you are doing.

Don’t overreact to something you hear on the grapevine today because it won’t be true and may even be a ploy by your rivals to demoralize you. Your affairs are moving in the right direction and at the right speed, so stay calm and don’t change a thing.

Stick with the plan and the schedule you have been following these past few weeks, even if there seems to be a better way of proceeding. According to the planets you are more than halfway to your goal, so turning back now would be a huge mistake.

If you are forced to change your schedule today don’t make a big deal of it. Even if you have to put off doing something you were looking forward to there will be plenty more opportunities to get it done before the start of next week.

By all means visualize where you would like to be and what you would like to be doing a year from now but don’t spend so much time on your daydreams that you neglect to actually start working on them. Take it one small step at a time.

You enjoy making changes, especially when you are bored, but the planets warn you need to leave most things as they are for the time being. One thing you should change though is your tendency to expect people to know what you are thinking.

Being the practical sort you know that the first thing to do when you find yourself in a hole is to stop digging. Not everyone in your team seems to be that sensible though, so you may have to forcibly take their spade away from them.

Just because a friend or relative is being evasive about what they are up to does not mean they are doing anything illegal or immoral. Maybe they just want to be able to get on with it without you constantly advising them how it should be done.

Life can sometimes be amazingly random, so embrace whatever fate sends your way today and make a point of getting the best from it. While others are grumbling about how unfair it all is you will be sailing along with a smile on your face.

No matter how chaotic the world around you may be at the moment it won’t stop you pushing on towards your ultimate goal. Mind planet Mercury will make it easy for you to focus on what matters to you personally – as for the rest, just ignore it.

You may not be in the mood to listen to advice but don’t be too stubborn about it because friends and family members can see things that you appear to have missed. Adopting a contrary viewpoint may not be in your best interests.

The sun’s union with Mercury in your sign will clarify your thinking and enable you to focus with laser-like intensity on what you most need to do. Anyone who thinks you can be persuaded to tone down your ambitions needs their head examined.

You need to get over the fact that something you attempted did not work out the way you intended. Just because you got it wrong does not mean you were wrong to try it. Now move on and try something even more adventurous.

You don’t need to be told by others how wonderful you are, you know that already, but it’s nice to be reminded that friends and loved ones value your presence in their lives. Now let them know that you value them every bit as much.

Mercury, your ruler, joins forces with the sun today, making this the perfect time to get your head together about the direction your life needs to be moving over the next few months. The clearer your career goals the closer you will be to success.

If you feel the need to rock the boat a bit today by all means do so. You are under no obligation to desist from saying things just because they might upset people of a sensitive disposition. Maybe that’s their problem, maybe they need to toughen up.

If you are smart you will readily admit that you don’t know everything and that it’s okay to learn from the people around you. Leave your ego at home today and seek out knowledge that can enrich you both emotionally and financially.

You may not be the most cautious member of the zodiac but cosmic activity in your opposite sign means you must take account of what loved ones and work colleagues are doing before pushing ahead with your own objectives. Don’t work against them, work with them.

With so many opportunities available to you now you may be confused as to what is the best route to take. Sit quietly for a bit, away from the hustle and bustle of daily life, and listen to what the intuitive side of your mind has to say.

A Sun-Mercury link in the most dynamic area of your chart means now is the time to organize your thoughts and set yourself goals of a creative nature. The universe is very much on your side at the moment, so don’t hold back in your plans.

You may think you know someone very well but what they do today will shock you into understanding that you have been taking them for granted. Don’t take it personally if they do the opposite of what you suggest. Let them make their own decisions.

Make it your business this weekend to clear the air of any bad feelings at home and at work – then everyone can start as friends again come Monday morning. Forget what other people said about you and invite them to forget what you said about them!

Not everyone can be as rational in their thinking as you, so make allowances over the next 48 hours for some of the stupid statements that friends and family members come out with. Treat them like you would treat a child, with amused indulgence.

The fact that your heart is not really in what others expect of you is of no importance. The only thing that matters is that you go out of your way to make them happy – because if they are happy they won’t make life difficult for you.

The fact that you helped out a friend in a crisis does not mean they will help you out in a similar way. If they say they are not in a position to assist you don’t argue about it. The planets indicate that could work in your favour.

If some of the people you love get excitable this weekend make it your business to calm them down by explaining that whatever it is that got them upset it means nothing in the greater scheme of things. Help them take a more philosophical attitude to life.

A task you thought was going to be simple could turn out to be one of the hardest things you have ever done. That will make it all the more satisfying when you make a resounding success of it, which of course you will.

If you find yourself in the spotlight this weekend don’t try to escape it – instead, put on a show and make sure everyone knows what a hugely talented Libra you are. It’s not always enjoyable being in the public eye but it could be if you embrace it.

Someone who can use their influence to help your career will move into your life over the next 48 hours and you must not let them move out again without taking advantage of what they can offer. Don’t hide your ambition, flaunt it instead!

There is no point reacting to criticism if it comes from people you don’t respect. Whatever it is they say about you this weekend just treat it as a joke and let them know you won’t be changing your ways, not for them and not for anyone.

The more other people try to wind you up this weekend the more you must call on your powers of self-control. The only reason they are trying to upset you is because they know you will outshine them. Stay calm and refuse to take the bait.

If you are beginning to have doubts about what you are doing then it might be a smart move to make a tactical, if temporary, retreat so you can think it through from a safer position. A sight adjustment to your plans is probably all that’s needed.

Make an effort to see a dispute of some kind from the point of view of the people who oppose you. It can be all too easy to label others “the enemy” just because you have contrasting ideas. Difference is what makes the world go around.

Don’t let the fact that you recently said something you regret spoil the whole week for you. If you have feelings of remorse the only way you are going to get past them is to seek out those you wronged and say sorry. Make sure you mean it.

You should know by now that there is no such thing as something for nothing in this world. If you gained handsomely from someone’s generosity the universe will expect you to be generous in return. How can you make them happy today?

Do what you can to help a friend in need but don’t put yourself out to such an extent that your own plans suffer. This may be one of those occasions when the best advice you can give them is to toughen up and sort it out themselves.

You can sometimes be too nice for your own good and the planets warn it would be a mistake to let someone off the hook for an offense they should be penalized for. If you don’t feel able to punish them then just ask someone who will.

You may be an outgoing Leo but you need to spend some time alone today to get your thoughts in order. Only then will you be able to push ahead with your plans while ignoring your critics, of which there may be more than a few.

This is a great time to approach employers and other powerful people and let them know about your latest big idea. Don’t wait for them to invite you to speak, take the initiative and let them know who you are and what you can do.

The time is fast approaching when you will be in a much better position to push ahead with your plans, so get both your personal and professional houses in order and be ready to seize the initiative when the moment arrives. Leave your rivals trailing.

You have been endowed by the universe with an incredibly strong willpower and if you go after a goal of some sort over the next few days there is no doubt you will reach it. Try not to tread on too many toes along the way though!

If a partner or loved one makes a mistake of some kind today you are advised to pretend you did not notice and to carry on as usual. They will know that you know, of course, but your sensitivity to their plight will earn their considerable gratitude.

You can at times be a bit too serious and your main aim today should be to lighten your mood so you can enjoy life more. Time spent with a friend who makes you laugh could be the best investment you have made in a long time.

Be open about what you intend to do over the next few days and invite loved ones to join you in the journey. Because you are such a self-contained individual others tend to see you as overly aloof and that’s an image which needs improving.

The more upheavals there have been on the home front of late the more receptive partners and loved ones will be if you offer them an olive branch. You don’t have to admit it was all your fault but you do have to shoulder some of the blame.

There are more important things in life than making money and climbing the greasy pole to success and over the coming year you will find yourself pursuing goals of a more spiritual nature. Remember: The more you help others the more the universe helps you.

It may be true that you have all the facts on your side but that won’t stop friends and colleagues saying and doing stupid things. Some people cling so tightly to their illusions that day becomes night even though the sun is still shining.

You may think that other people should be taking on more of the workload but just telling them to do it won’t change a thing. You need to find a way to make it financially painful for them if they carry on avoiding their responsibilities.

If you get too involved in your daily routine you could miss out on a creative opportunity of some kind. Do what has to be done and do it well but keep one eye open and don’t be afraid to drop everything if a better offer comes along.

As one of the zodiac’s more sensitive signs you are usually good at spotting when a family member is feeling low. If that is the feeling you sense today you must do what you can to raise their spirits. Start by reminding them how much you love them.

Your leadership skills will be much in demand over the next 24 hours, so much so that you may have to ration yourself! Help those who clearly need it the most and tell those you can’t help today to ask you again tomorrow.

The fact that you gained from someone else’s misfortune is no big deal so long as you did not engineer that misfortune for them. Life gives and life takes and over time we all get what we need and deserve the most. Tell them that.

Your confidence is such that you honestly believe you can do almost anything, but take notice of the word “almost” because one or two objectives may still be beyond you. Later in the week though they will come within reach as well.

You may be concerned that you are not making the most of your chances but don’t worry about it too much because there will be other opportunities to shine. Come the end of the week you will be spoilt for choice.

If you owe someone a favour you must pay it back quickly. Even if they say they don’t expect anything in return you can be sure they will want something from you in the future. It may cost less if you repay the favour now.

You may be pretty straightforward in your dealings but some of the people you are going to have to deal with between now and the end of the week will be sneaky in the extreme. Keep your wits about you and don’t let anyone make decisions for you.

If you want to make your life both simpler and happier then a major clear-out of your possessions is a must. Find a new home for anything that no longer serves a clear purpose for you but which could be of benefit to other people.

If someone you work or do business with keeps making life difficult for you then get ruthless and tell them your partnership is at an end. You don’t need them today, you won’t need them tomorrow and you probably didn’t need them yesterday either.

As an air sign you are good at adapting to new situations and that will be a factor in your favour over the coming year. Others may be worried by the frenzied pace of change but for you it will be exciting and full of opportunity.

You may think that a problem of some sort requires a complicated solution but you could not be more wrong. Stand back from the situation and view it as a whole rather than from one particular angle. The answer will jump out at you.

Your desire to help a friend or work colleague get themselves out of a hole may be well intentioned but the planets warn you would be wise to keep your distance. This is one mess they must be encouraged to clear up themselves.

The moment a negative thought enters your head you must grab it and eject it and refuse to let it creep back into your thinking. A positive attitude is an absolute must today, especially when dealing with matters of a personal nature.

Listen to your inner voice today and make sure you follow what it tells you to the letter. Ignore those who say you should be doing this or doing that and trust the higher part of your nature that already knows the answers you need.

You will have to split your time between working on a creative task you enjoy and a chore you dislike. Put as much effort into the latter as you do the former, otherwise you may have to go back later on and do it again.

You are right to have your suspicions that a friend or colleague is being less than honest with you, so keep your wits about you and don’t let them get away with anything illegal or unethical. Your reputation is on the line as well.

The more you know about a new partner or colleague the less likely it is their actions will take you by surprise, so do some research and make sure you are well prepared. The planets warn you cannot afford to leave anything to chance.

The cosmic wheels are turning in your favor again and between now and the start of next week your outlook on life will improve by leaps and bounds. Start thinking about your next big adventure, and who to take with you on the journey.

Focus on improving a personal relationship and put anything to do with your money situation or your career on the back burner. Someone you love dearly feels you have been neglecting them of late, so make amends over the next 24 hours.

A challenge of some kind needs to be dealt with immediately, so put your social life on hold for the rest of the day while you sort it out. The more of an effort you make now the less likely it is to flare up again later on.

Do what you can to impress someone in a position of power but don’t go too far and fall all over yourself to get in their good books. They can sense a fraud a mile off, so be honest about your intentions and don’t overstate your abilities.

When both Mercury and Jupiter move in your favor at the start of next week you will feel much happier about your long-term prospects. Until then, keep a low profile and work on improving your mind rather than your reputation or bank balance.

The only thing that can come between you and your dream is the irrational belief that you don’t really deserve to succeed. Not only do you deserve it but even your rivals can see it is your turn to sit on top of the world – so get climbing!

You have always been a leader rather than a follower and that’s a good thing, but the planets warn you need to tone down your tendency to rush into situations you know little about. It could be a rival has set up a trap for you.

Are you Nice or are you Nasty? No doubt you are a bit of both but you will need to come down hard on someone today who has been taking liberties. Then, when Venus moves into your sign tomorrow, you can be Nice again.

The best way to deal with a rival is to look for areas where the two of you can agree and maybe even work together. By focusing on what brings you together rather than on what keeps you apart your rivalry won’t be such a problem.

Most likely you will clash with someone in a position of authority today but under no circumstances can you afford to back down. If you show even a hint of weakness they will be on your case constantly over the next few days.

Mars in your sign makes you hugely ambitious but as Venus, planet of harmony, is about to enter the career area of your chart you will move up more quickly if you make friends rather than enemies. It’s not you against the world!

If a friend gets into a spot of bother today by all means help them out, but make sure they know this is going to be a one-off event and if they make the same mistake again you won’t be there to rescue them next time.

If you insist on being different then you must allow other people to be different as well. That will, of course, mean having to accept that when they do something you do not approve of you let it go, so long as it doesn’t harm you personally.

The message of the stars today, and for tomorrow and the weekend, is that if you want to get important things done you must join forces with people whose aims are not a million miles from your own. Together you can do wonderful things.

Anyone who thinks you are so easygoing that they can take advantage of you is making a big mistake. You are in one of those moods where you will forgive and forget only up to a certain point – after that they had better watch out!

Stop worrying about things that are not worth the effort. Life is good and about to get many times better, so ignore the one or two little things that have gone wrong of late and get ready for something really big to go right.

You won’t be short of opinions and you won’t by shy about pointing out where other people’s thinking is completely messed up. You rarely suffer fools and the clowns you have to deal with over the next 24 hours will get no leeway at all.

A work-related problem can be easily resolved by making an effort to see it through the eyes of someone who disagrees with you. You’re not actually that far apart in your outlook, so come up with a creative solution that satisfies you both.

Jupiter in your sign links with Venus on your birthday, which means you will accomplish more over the coming year when you strive to work with people rather than against them. A pleasant and productive daily environment is a must for success.

It’s good of you to want to help a friend who is down on their luck but don’t do it all for them. It is possible to be too generous, both with your time and your money, so make sure you know where to draw the line.

As Venus, planet of love, moves into your sign today the bad feelings you had about someone will quickly disappear. Then you will be able to see they are not the monster you thought they were. Hopefully they will see you in the same light.

There is a danger you could get carried away with your own sense of genius and do things that have little if any chance of succeeding. It’s good that you have high expectations of yourself but you must stay in touch with reality as well.

All things are possible if you want them enough and if you are prepared to join forces with people who share your ambitions. You are smart enough to know you cannot reach the heights on your own, which gives you an advantage over your rivals.

If you take a risk of some kind today it could pay off, but don’t go mad and start making choices that are as likely to fail as succeed. Listen to what your inner voice tells you and let it guide you in the direction of your dreams.

It will pay you to go off on your own for a while so you can get your head together and get your heart rate down to a more comfortable level. You can’t think straight while your senses are being bombarded by other people’s problems.

Venus, your ruler, moves into the wealth area of your chart today, which is sure to bring opportunities to enrich yourself but could also encourage you to splash out on luxury buys. Where money is concerned you will need to show some constraint.

Opportunities to improve your lot in life will come thick and fast over the next few days but to make the most of them you need to get past any bad feelings you may have about other people. A positive outlook will smooth your path to success.
