Does the project you are working on still fill you with joy? If not, it may be time to start thinking about swapping over to something that does. Even a Sag can get stuck in a rut occasionally, so do something drastic to get out of it.

Put principles before profit today and make sure everyone you have dealings with, both personally and professionally, does the same. If your conscience tells you that what others are doing is morally wrong you must have nothing to do with them.

This is the ideal time to turn your attention to family matters and to make sure the people you love most are aware of your feelings. Sometimes you can be a bit aloof but you can also, when the mood takes you, be incredibly romantic.

Social activities and travel plans are under excellent stars, so don’t sit at home waiting for others to call, get out there and show the world what a wonderful human being you are. Your positive aura will draw people to you like moths to a flame.

Try not to set yourself goals that are going to take it out of you physically. Instead, pursue targets that require you to use your head and your heart rather than your legs and your arms. Be smart and get others to do the heavy stuff for you.

The fact that some of your colleagues are refusing to move with the times is good news for you. While they are dragging their feet you can be speeding ahead and taking advantage of new technologies and new opportunities. The future is NOW.

Social opportunities will come thick and fast this weekend and hopefully you will be adventurous enough to make use of them. Not only will your life be a lot of fun but some of the people you meet will become valuable contacts.

Can you trust what other people tell you? That depends on how well you know them and how often you have taken their advice in the past. Generally speaking though the planets are very much in your favour, so don’t be afraid to take a chance.

You don’t have to be assertive or aggressive to get ahead in the world, you just need to take note of the way the wind is blowing and make sure that is the direction you are travelling in too. And remember: the universe wants you to succeed.

You are not about to sit on the fence and watch the world go by, not when there are so many wonderful opportunities available to you in the world at large. Ignore those who say you should be cautious and take a big leap into the unknown.

You may be inclined to shoot the messenger if what you hear today is not to your liking but that would be unfair. If anything you should thank them for making sure you are up to speed with what is going on. Knowledge is power.

As mind planet Mercury moves into the career area of your chart this weekend this is the perfect time to figure out what your ambitions are going to be for the next few months, maybe even for the rest of the year. Dream the impossible dream.

You may be somewhat reserved by nature but with the planets about to move in your favour you need to get out into the world and make things happen. Act as if you are super confident and others will believe it and treat you with extra respect.

You may be tempted to wave the big stick and order those who are subordinate to you to do this and do that but there is really no need. They will be more than happy to follow your instructions if you stay calm and ask nicely.

Cosmic activity in and around your opposite sign makes this the ideal time to get friends and family members together for a serious chat about how you can help each other now and in the future. Never forget that you are on the same team.

You appear to believe that someone is out to make life difficult for you, but according to the planets that isn’t so. In fact, if you adopt a pleasant attitude with everyone you meet you may be surprised to learn just how many friends you have got.

Any differences of opinion you have with partners and colleagues can and must be put behind you over the next 48 hours. With luck planet Jupiter moving in your favour early next week minor disagreements cannot be allowed to come between you.

The planets indicate that if you are more open and trusting in your dealings with the world you will reap handsome rewards. Artistic activities are under especially good stars this year, so give yourself permission to try something new and exciting.

Be careful what you say over the next 24 hours because if you let slip information that your rivals can benefit from they won’t hesitate to do so at your expense. You can be a bit too talkative at times, so zip that lip for a while.

Others may say that the latest fashion is a bit of harmless fun but because you have your doubts you don’t intend to get involved. By this time next month they may well be singing the praises of the next big thing after this one.

The planets warn there is a real possibility that what you are being told by someone you trust is completely wrong. Most likely they are not trying to trick you but they may have been tricked themselves. Don’t let that happen to you.

Try not to be envious of someone who earns more than you or occupies a position of power that you want for yourself. You can though learn from their experience as to how they reached this exalted position and apply those principles to yourself.

If you act on a hunch today there is a 50-50 chance it will pay off – but also a 50-50 chance it will go wrong and cost you money. So the question you need to ask yourself is: Do you feel lucky? Most likely you will go for it.

You will learn something about a friend or a work colleague today that in hindsight you wish they had managed to keep secret. But once you know what they are up to you will have to make a choice to either support them or oppose them.

The approaching full moon occurs in the social sector of your chart, so you will be inclined to get out and about and have a good time. Don’t go too far in your partying though or you could suffer a financial as well as a physical hangover.

You are advised to act on the assumption that some of the people you do business with either don’t know what they are talking about or are deliberately trying to mislead you. This is one of those occasions when your Scorpio suspicion is fully justified.

You have been remarkably positive and enthusiastic in recent weeks but tomorrow’s full moon in your sign could bring you down to earth with a bump. Try to avoid situations where you know you will be encouraged to take risks for the fun of it.

The message of the stars today is that you would be wise to keep your plans to yourself, especially those that are designed to improve your standing on the work front. Envious eyes are watching you closely, hoping for opportunities to trip you up.

You can be a bit of a dreamer at times, which is good, but if you take it too far over the next two or three days you could find yourself imagining things that are never going to happen. Keep those dreams rooted firmly in reality.

Although the planets are on your side at the moment the approaching full moon could bring an unexpected and unwelcome event your way. No matter what occurs today you must stay calm and deal with the situation logically. Avoid negative emotions.

Do only what you want to do today and let those who are trying to push you in a new direction know you won’t be playing ball. It’s okay to be a bit selfish, especially when the moon is full, so only do what brings you personal advantage.

The more you try to understand a situation that has little to do with you the more complicated it seems to get, so be smart and put it out of your mind completely. You did not cause it, you cannot change it and it is not your responsibility.

As today’s full moon takes place in your opposite sign you cannot expect others to agree with your plans and ideas. That could become a big deal if they actively try to modify them for you. Be smart, and tough, and refuse to change a single thing.

Don’t worry if you find it hard to get through to friends and loved ones today, because everyone will be having communication issues under the influence of the full moon. Give it a day or two and you will be on the same wavelength again.

Sometimes you can be a bit too rigid in your thinking and that can cause problems when events don’t work out the way you expected them to. If what you expected to happen today does not take place just give it a few more days.

Full moons can be dangerous because they pull us in opposing directions and make it difficult to make sensible decisions. For the next 48 hours or so the best decision is probably no decision, so take a raincheck and come back to it later.

Your confidence could take a bit of a dent today, especially if the full moon wrecks your travel plans. Take the hint and sit tight for a while but be ready to move again when the cosmic outlook changes toward the end of the week.

There is so much confusion at the moment that you may be having a hard time working out which way is up and which way is down. Don’t worry. Gravity will sort things out over the next 24 hours. Hopefully it won’t be too hard a landing.

It’s not like you to believe you need to prove yourself but the full moon in your sign has brought a few doubts to the surface and now you are looking for ways to make an impression. But why? The people who matter know what you can do.

Stop looking back at how things used to be and start looking forward at how you want them to be in the future. You have a lot more control over your destiny than you imagine, so focus your mind on your number one desire and make it happen.

A minor setback could easily develop in your mind into a major catastrophe, so you need to remind yourself that in the greater scheme of things all events have their essential place. Whatever your current problem may be, it’s really no big deal.

Today’s full moon will encourage you to put the worst possible interpretation on what is taking place in your life. Stand back from both your family life and your career and take a look at the bigger picture. It’s actually rather pretty.

A birthday full moon means you have to become more of a multitasker. With practice you will find that focusing on two things at once is not only possible but can even be beneficial. When you get bored with one you can switch to the other.

Your enthusiasm for a project of some kind may have been dented by recent events but you must keep at it. Mars-ruled Aries is by nature an energetic sign but you sometimes lack staying power and that’s what brings success in the long-term.

The more people say you cannot possibly reach the goal you have set yourself the more you will go all out to prove them wrong. Your never-say-die attitude will keep you moving in the right direction today, even if the pace remains slow.

If you allow yourself to be hurried into making a quick decision about a money matter it could end up costing you more than you can afford. Refuse to be rushed and make sure you check all the facts and figures before deciding on your next move.

Principle is always more important than profit and if you keep that fact in mind today you won’t have to look back in a few weeks time and regret a decision you made. A short-term financial loss is preferable to a long-term loss of faith in yourself.

The more pressure you find yourself under today the more you will enjoy it because it allows you to show just how tough a cookie you can be. Anyone who thinks you will back off for the sake of an easy life clearly doesn’t know you at all.

The planets warn you must not overestimate your abilities, especially on the work front where your every move will be scrutinized by someone whose assessment could make or break your dreams. On this occasion effort will count for more than skill.

Friendships are under excellent stars at the moment and if you take the initiative between now and the weekend you will have a whole lot of fun. Don’t wait for others to lead the way – it’s your turn to blaze a trail and make things happen.

If you let your negative feelings about a colleague influence the decisions you make then some of those decisions are sure to be wrong. No matter what they say or do today it must not be allowed to affect your judgment.

The influence of yesterday’s full moon in your sign has not yet passed, so be careful about who you choose to trust. It could be the case that someone is feeding you false information in the hope that you will make a fool of yourself.

You have so much to be thankful for but still you choose to focus on the mistakes of the past. It’s time to put those errors – the kind that everyone makes – to bed once and for all so you can allow the creative side of your nature to flourish.

The more inclined you are to involve yourself in someone else’s problems the more the universe will send you signals that it’s not a good idea. If you choose to ignore those signals you could find their problems becoming your problems too.

Set yourself targets you know you can reach and don’t be tempted to aim too high either in your career or in your personal affairs. You might like to think you are some kind of superhero but you will only be kidding yourself if you do.

In the greater scheme of things there is no such thing as coincidence, so when strange things happen over the next 12 months try looking beyond the obvious to work out why they occurred. Then join the dots and enjoy the picture they make.

Focus on what is important to you personally and let the rest of the world take care of itself. Mars, your ruler, remains in the most dynamic area of your chart only a few more days, so use that energy to create something both magical and profitable.

Sometimes it’s good to give people the benefit of the doubt but the planets warn you could be asking for trouble if you let a colleague get away with something that is so obviously wrong. Let them know you are not in a forgiving mood.

Do you take up an offer that could be worth a lot of money but could also mean a lot more work, or do you give it a miss? On this occasion it might be better to decline the invitation. There will be other opportunities to shine.

The harder you push yourself the more progress you will make, but there is also a danger that you could burn yourself out and have nothing left to give over the weekend. Be smart and find a middle way that doesn’t take so much effort.

Mars moves on from your sign next Tuesday, so if there is anything of a creative or professional nature that needs finishing you are advised to get on with it without further delay. Get motivated and get it done right away.

Jupiter in the friendship area of your chart will make this Friday the 13th a good deal luckier than you expected it to be. Whatever it is you need just speak up and let others know – and they will go out of their way to get it for you.

Why has fate singled you out for so much good fortune? Who knows and, frankly, who cares! The only thing that should matter to you now is taking full advantage of the wonderful opportunities that are coming your way. You would be a fool not to.

Jupiter in the most adventurous area of your chart means you can and you must let your instincts guide you. Don’t listen to those who urge caution because they don’t know what they are talking about. Deep down you know it’s your turn to shine.

There is no reason why you should put up with a friend or colleague who consistently fails to live up to your high standards. Let them know the time has come to go your separate ways. Wish them well but don’t be soft and change your mind.

If you make a decision about a financial matter today you won’t know for sure if it is the right one until well into next week. Be logical in your approach and don’t let your feelings for other people sway your thinking. Sometimes you have to be ruthless.

If a friend comes to you for advice today or over the weekend make sure you tell them the truth as you see it, whether or not they want to hear it. Don’t be the sort of person who sweetens the pill just because it might taste bitter.

The sun will shine on you today, even if everyone else seems to be under a dark rain cloud. Jupiter in your fellow Water sign of Cancer is a magnificent omen and whatever you choose to do with your work and leisure time will work out well.

You sometimes find it hard to make up your mind which direction to go but there will be no such doubts over the coming year. You can see in your mind’s eye exactly where you want to travel and what you want to do when you get there.

This is one of those weekends when there will be both good news and bad news. The former will outweigh the latter if you maintain a positive attitude both in your private life and in your career. Think success and you will enjoy success – it’s that simple.

Although there is no reason to be pessimistic about your prospects what occurs this weekend may sow a few doubts about the direction in which your life is moving. Don’t get too worked up about it though – you know it will all come good in the end.

You will get the chance to see someone you have admired from afar up close and personal this weekend and it will be an enjoyable experience. Just remember that, like you, they are far from perfect, so don’t expect too much of them.

Do you give in meekly when faced with overwhelming odds or do you fight for what you believe to be right? This weekend’s Mars-Uranus link will put you in a combative mood but you need to remember that you don’t have to fight over everything.

Put your own needs first over the next 48 hours and ignore those who say you should be doing more for other people. Selfishness may not be a virtue but sometimes it is necessary for chasing after goals that are close to your heart.

You will have to take on a task that no one else seems interested in this weekend and you are advised to make a really good job of it. If you rush it just to get it over and done with your reputation for excellence is sure to suffer.

Two very different events will occur this weekend but there is a link between them and if you can work out what it is you will enjoy a huge advantage over your rivals. While they wander this way and that you will be heading straight for your goal.

Don’t take what you hear personally this weekend, even if it is obvious that someone is trying to talk you down. The fact that they have to resort to low tactics means they don’t have what it takes to challenge you directly, so you have already won.

Jupiter, your ruler, squares up to Saturn this weekend, which among other things means you will be confronted with a situation that requires a sustained response on your part. Don’t be fooled into thinking it can be solved with just a quick fix.

Yes, you have been working too hard. Yes, you need and deserve a break. But no one is going to give it to you, so push your in-tray to one side and don’t come back to it until Monday – or even Tuesday if you fancy a long weekend.

The only thing that might spoil the weekend is if you allow yourself to get involved in a quarrel with someone whose outlook on life is the opposite of your own. You cannot change their views and they cannot change yours, so why waste time arguing?

You need to accept there isn’t much you can do about a loved one’s irrational behaviour, except maybe to be there for them when the inevitable crash comes and they need a helping hand to get up off the floor. Let them make their own mistakes.

If you are in any way unhappy in your present environment then by all means move away for a bit. Time spent in a different place with a different group of people will remind you why you are blessed to be who you are and where you are.

You would be wise to steer clear of extremes today, especially on the work front where rivals will pounce on any remark you make or action you take that can be distorted to make you look bad. Watch your own back, because no one else will.

There may be times over the next 24 hours when you get a bit emotional about what is going on in the world. Try to control your feelings so you can channel them into constructive activities that benefit both yourself and other people.

Do you have a guilty conscience about something you said or did not say recently? According to the planets you do but the good news is that friends and work colleagues don’t care in the slightest – so why worry about it at all?

Don’t be surprised if someone whose opinions you disagree with profoundly defends your right to express what you believe in today. You may have very different ways of looking at the world but like you they know that free speech is essential.

Do you want fame or do you want fortune? You do, of course, want both and what occurs over the next few days will point you in a direction where you can enjoy the best of both worlds. Don’t listen to those who say you are being greedy.

Mars moves into your sign tomorrow, adding to the power of several other cosmic influences. Opportunities to improve your life on every level will come thick and fast and you must not hesitate to make use of them. It’s what the universe wants of you.

You may have no intention of watching what you say, especially when there are so many important matters that need to be debated, but don’t go too far and say stuff that alienates not just your enemies but your allies as well. Know when to stay quiet.

Relationships are under favourable stars at the moment and the planets indicate you will be making a lot of new friends this week. Just remember you don’t have to agree on every last issue to get along together on a human level.

Changes on the career front will unsettle you this week but the fact is your easygoing mindset is in need of a shakeup. Everyone knows you are capable of achieving great things but they won’t happen unless you make better use of your talents.

If you find yourself caught up in an embarrassing situation today just pretend it does not matter and focus on something else. Act as if you are not in the least bit bothered what other people might think about you. Better still, mean it.

There were times recently when you felt unappreciated by some of the people you work and do business with. Now they will make it up to you and shower you with praise for the efforts you have made on their behalf. You have earned their respect.

You are under no obligation to limit your ambitions just because people higher up the professional ladder say you must stay at your current level. If they won’t let you move ahead at your own pace then find somewhere more attractive to work.

The message of your birthday chart is that you need to find a sensible balance between having fun times with people who share your carefree outlook and finding ways to help those who are less fortunate than you. It doesn’t have to be a 50-50 split.

Envy may not be the best of emotions but it can be the catalyst that gets you to strive harder. With Mars, your ruler, moving into the work area of your chart today it’s okay to look at a senior colleague and aim to do better than them.

Try not to attach too much importance to what you are told by other people today, especially if they are the sort of people who enjoy putting other people down. Ambitious Mars’ moves into the most dynamic area of your chart making you almost unbeatable.

If you allow minor irritations to get to you today they will divert your attention and your energy away from the issues that really matter. On the home front especially, refuse to get involved in problems you know are not really problems at all.

You need to toughen up and let rivals and competitors know they won’t get the better of you no matter how hard they try. You don’t have to be overly aggressive but you will need to bare your teeth so they know you mean business.

You have been so active of late that it was inevitable that you took a few wrong turnings and made a few mistakes along the way. The good news is you are still well on course to reach your No. 1 goal, so don’t waste time on regrets.

The world may be coming apart at the seams but with Mars moving into your sign you won’t care in the slightest. Why? Because you recognize that the more things fall apart the more opportunities there will be for you personally. Yes that’s selfish, but so what?

You cannot hope to be in control of events every minute of every day, so stop being so hard on yourself and ease back a little over the next 24 hours. A more hands-off approach will work better for you both at home and at work.

You may not be the most outgoing member of the zodiac but as Mars is now moving into the friendship area of your chart you should find it easier to open up to people you meet along the way. You may even discover they are just like you.

People in positions of authority may have their doubts about your abilities but Mars in the career area of your chart will endow you with so much self-belief and so much get-up-and-go that those doubts will soon disappear. Aim for the big time!

Everything seems right with your world at the moment and long may it continue, but some of the people you are closest to are not exactly bubbling with joy. What can you do to cheer them up? Maybe you should start by listening to their woes.

The fact that you feel uncomfortable about what’s going on in your social circle will spur you on to do something about it. The course you choose to take won’t make you popular but it will do the most amount of good for the people who really need it.

Don’t waste your time arguing the toss with someone whose outlook on life is at odds with your own. Their way of looking at the world is so different from your own that a meeting of minds is all but impossible. Just stay out of each other’s way.

As Mars moves into one of the more sensitive areas of your chart on your birthday you must keep a lid on your emotions. You will find there is no such thing as getting just a little bit angry about events. You cannot afford to lose control.

The more criticism comes your way today the more determined you must be to ignore it. Others may be right to point out that some of your recent decisions have been overly selfish but what has it got to do with them? Nothing, that’s what.

If something of a negative nature occurs not once or twice but several times in a row it should be obvious that someone is deliberately making life difficult for you. Work out who it is and then make life difficult for them in return.

You are putting yourself under a great deal of pressure, especially on the work front where you seem to believe that everything you say and do must meet with the approval of your colleagues. In reality though you don’t need their support at all.

If you know what you want and you have at least a rough idea how to get it then no power on Earth can stop you. It does not matter in the slightest that others don’t believe in you, because you have total faith in your own abilities.

Friends and family members may say you are heading in the wrong direction but you know what you are doing and have no intention of changing your ways. Later on you can say “I told you so”, but for now just ignore them.

Some people take life way too seriously and one such individual’s “woe is me” attitude is so trivial that you actually find it quite funny. Don’t hide your amusement, let them see that you have no sympathy for their complaints. Hopefully they will wise up soon.

Quit worrying about what is changing in the world around you and focus only on what means the most to you personally. Far from being something to fear at least one of those dreaded changes will open up new creative opportunities for you.

You have been far too tense of late and need to loosen up a bit. Mars in the area of your chart that oversees group activities will make it easy for you to work with people who want to force through changes that make the world a better place.

Cosmic activity in the friendship area of your chart will inspire you to help those less fortunate than yourself between now and the end of the week. But don’t lose sight of the fact that charity begins at home. Loved ones need your assistance as well.

You should find it easier to be a little less reserved when Venus moves in your favor tomorrow but that is not an excuse to start running around and making a show of what you can do. The world doesn’t need to know everything you are up to.

The good times just keep getting better and what occurs over the next 24 hours will convince you that there is a major luck factor working in your favuor at the moment. That’s not a cosmic invitation to go mad, but you probably will!

A change of perspective will be needed in how you deal with people on a one-to-one basis. It would help immensely if you could get past the idea that everyone you meet is a potential rival or enemy. Think of them as potential friends instead.

It is a complete waste of time trying to reason with people who don’t want to hear facts that challenge their prejudices. Ignore them completely and get together with groups and individuals who share your desire to change the world for the better.

Take your time and make sure everything you work on over the next 24 hours is done by the book. You may think there are quicker ways to get through your workload but there are no shortcuts to lasting success. It’s worth striving for.

The more those around you lose their heads and behave erratically over the next 12 months the more you must stay calm and keep to your long-term strategy. Your life is unfolding according to a benign cosmic plan, so work with it rather than against it.

Venus in the domestic area of your chart will help you find an improved balance between your work and your family commitments. It doesn’t have to be one thing or the other – with smart planning you can get the best of both worlds.

You may not be the sort to give up or back down but if the task you are finding so difficult to complete is of no particular value to either yourself or other people why not just let it go? You don’t have to finish everything you start.

The message of the stars today is that if you focus on doing what you enjoy you will not only have a fun time but will also bring enjoyment into other people’s lives as well. If you are happy then friends and loved ones will be happy too.

As both Venus and Jupiter are moving through your sign you will know instinctively what is the right course of action. The really good news is that it will not only be right morally but financially as well – they are not contradictory aims.

Your prospects are looking better by the day, the hour, the minute, and what occurs next will surely convince you that some higher power is guiding your journey through life. Hold on to that outlook as long as you can, because it is 100 per cent true.

Someone you meet on your travels will not only be a lot of fun but will open your mind to new possibilities. One way they can improve your life is by showing you how compassion, even for your enemies, can change the world for the better.

As Venus moves into the career area of your chart today any differences you’ve had with employers and colleagues will soon disappear. The fact that you are working toward a common goal means they will be much more open to your ideas.

One of the best phases of the year begins today as Venus joins Jupiter in the most adventurous area of your chart. Now is the time to show the world that your reputation for secrecy and shyness is not in the least bit deserved.

You don’t have to admit that you were wrong about something but you must accept that you were at least partly to blame. Don’t let your desire to be perfect in all things you do get in the way of a more important goal – being human.

This is a great time for relationships of all kinds but affairs of the heart should go particularly well for you over the next few days. Venus in your opposite sign will encourage you to be more open about your feelings, and the results will be magical.

Don’t suffer in silence if you are finding it hard to stay on top of your workload. Friends and colleagues may be busy with their own chores but they will happily make time to assist you. They can’t read minds though, so you have to ask.

The more open you are about your feelings today the more others will open up to you so you can find common ground. The most likely result is that everyone will realize how futile it is to attach blame for issues that have complex origins.

Although mind planet Mercury is strong on your birthday it is also going through its retrograde phase, so you should always get a second opinion before taking action. If you are smart enough to do that it should be a fabulous year.

Although most things seem to be going well for you at the moment you cannot afford to take your good fortune for granted. On the home front, especially, it would be a mistake to believe that everyone is as contented with life as you are.

Venus, your ruling planet, may be doing miracles for your social life but your constant comings and goings are unlikely to please everyone. Make time for the people you love most in life and don’t neglect to invite them along on your travels.

If you observe an injustice taking place today you must make it your business to do something about it. It may be tempting to pretend not to notice and carry on having fun but your conscience will nag at you for weeks to come if you do.

Venus in your sign links with both Saturn and Neptune today, which suggests you may be blaming yourself for a failure of some sort that was never really your fault. You don’t have to take responsibility for other people’s stupid choices.

Sometimes in life you have no choice but to admit that you are moving in the wrong direction and must go back and find the point where you went off course. If you make that your one and only aim today you can still have a great weekend.

The more friends and colleagues shower you with praise today the more you will suspect they are looking to profit at your expense, but you are being suspicious for no good reason. Do whatever it takes to stay positive. An upbeat outlook is a must.

Not everyone can live up to your high standards of behaviour, so make allowances and try not to fall out with friends whose approach to life seems unnecessarily negative. If you judge them too harshly today someone else may judge you harshly tomorrow.

You may be eager to get started on a project you have been planning for ages but it won’t hurt to wait a bit longer. You may have missed an important detail that could trip you up later on, so find out what it is before moving ahead.

It may seem as if you can do no wrong at the moment but don’t be too reckless, especially when dealing with other people’s money. If you make a bad call you could end up in debt to people who are not remotely sympathetic to your plight.

Try not to let minor disputes annoy you today. Some people may be determined to drag you down to their low level but there is nothing they can do if you refuse to play their silly games. Laugh at their foolishness and carry on having fun.

Few things in life are risk-free and if you want something enough today you should just go for it and ignore the potential consequences. The more you think about it the higher the costs will appear to be – so don’t think about it at all.

What you need to tell a loved one today may be painful but you cannot allow them to continue along their current destructive path. You are one of the few people they will listen to, so it is very much your responsibility to speak up.

Your generosity of spirit is such that you would do almost anything for almost anyone, but you have needs like everyone else and your inner needs especially must be given special attention this year. It’s not about fame and fortune, it’s about loving yourself.

Before you splash out on something expensive this weekend ask yourself if it will fulfil a long-term need or just a short-term desire. If it’s the latter you would do well to save your money now and buy something more useful later on.

You may not be able to explain why certain events are taking place but that must not be allowed to stop you from getting involved. Your sense of adventure will make it easy for you to take a deep dive into the unknown this weekend.

You may be wary of committing yourself to an activity that could cost you a lot of money but the planets suggest it will be a worthwhile investment. It will also be worth your time persuading a friend or loved one to come along for the ride.

You may be cautious by nature but with both Venus and Jupiter moving through your sign you will most likely jump in where angels fear to tread this weekend. Cancer is also a cardinal sign, so when you do take a risk you go all the way.

If someone gives you the cold shoulder this weekend it’s probably because you said something recently that offended them. You may have no idea which of your words they found so insulting but apologize anyway and sound as if you mean it.

If a good laugh heals a lot of hurts then you must make it your business over the next 48 hours to get friends and family members smiling again. Let them know that no matter what may have got them down it isn’t worth their tears.

You cannot afford to be reckless with money, be it your own or other people’s. Venus, your ruler, links with Pluto this weekend, which means that someone else’s “sure thing” could be a financial loser for you. You don’t have to take that risk.

A pragmatic approach to a family matter is a must. That means refusing to support either side in an emotional battle, even if you have a clear idea of who is right and who is wrong. Find a way to make both parties feel like they won the argument.

To say that life is hectic at the moment is an understatement but the pace will pick up even more over the next 48 hours. Just be careful you don’t go too fast and give the powers that be an excuse to slow you down a bit.

Serious situations demand serious action and there is no one more serious about life than you. On the other hand, you also possess a zany sense of humour and you should use it now to defuse what could easily become a very messy matter.

Your feelings have been so intense of late that you may be tempted to reveal your feelings to the outside world, but that could be a mistake. For the time being at least it might be better to say nothing and pretend that everything is hunky-dory.

Do something artistic this weekend, something that makes use of the talents you were born with. But don’t do it on your own – instead, get together with people who share your creative vision and build something the whole world can admire.

Whatever your No. 1 ambition may be you must go after it with a level of commitment and enthusiasm that makes success a foregone conclusion. Others may say you are chasing an impossible dream but for Leo all things are possible.

Should you be worried if someone you do not usually get along with sings your praises as the new week begins? It’s possible they are trying to lull you into a false sense of security but more likely they really are impressed by your efforts.

Anyone who promises you a huge financial return for just a small investment is not to be trusted. The more convincing they sound the more you will need to put some distance between you. They certainly don’t have your interests at heart.

Cosmic activity in your sign will make you super mellow over the next 24 hours but you will still need to respond to some kind of challenge. Just because you are in love with the whole wide world doesn’t mean everyone feels the same way about you.

If a colleague wants to have the last word today then let them. It’s no skin off your nose if they have got themselves so worked up about something that they insist they are right and you are wrong. Their self-deception is actually quite amusing.

Because your plans have reached a crucial stage you must make sure that even the smallest step you take moves you in the direction of your dreams. If you go off at a tangent today you could end up many miles from your ultimate goal.

Some people can be ridiculously negative and one such person needs to be kept at arm’s length so their moods don’t drag you down as well. For best results pretend you can’t hear what they’re saying. If you ignore them they may go away.

If what you are told by a supposedly trusted source seems a bit dubious then do some research and come to your own conclusions. They may not be intentionally trying to deceive you but it’s possible they have themselves been deceived.

You have never been the sort to let others coerce you into doing what you know you won’t enjoy and you are not about to change your ways now. Make sure everyone knows you have zero tolerance for those who don’t respect your views.

You must keep a sense of proportion today, especially when dealing with people who tend to magnify every small setback and call it a major disaster. If they want to wallow in doom and gloom that’s up to them but you don’t have to join in.

You may believe that what you are working on is destined to be a huge success, and maybe it is, but don’t get careless. With next weekend’s full moon taking place in your sign you could regret it later on if you act in haste now.

There will be times over the next few days when you fear you may have bitten off more than you can chew. The good news is that even if you have the experience will force you to up your game and find new ways to win.

The more physically and mentally active you are over the coming year the more you will accomplish, but as far as your emotions are concerned you must be cautious. Always think before you speak and always strive to see both sides of every dispute.

If you maintain a positive outlook and insist on seeing a setback as an opportunity in disguise you will accomplish something remarkable today. Ignore those who say you are expecting too much of yourself, because you should be expecting more.

The past few weeks have seen you at your most imaginative and your objective for the next few weeks must be to take your ideas and turn them into something concrete and lasting. Strive to set new standards of creative and artistic excellence.

Nothing in life truly happens by chance and if you look closely at recent events you will realize that they were nudging you along a new path. Once you recognize that fact you can start moving consciously in the right direction.

There has been a lot of coming and going in your life in recent weeks and you could do with a bit of a rest. However, there will be more activity over the next few days, especially on the home front where your affection will be much in demand.

The fact that you are optimistic by nature means you rarely give in to the kind of negative thinking that afflicts some of your friends and relatives. Make it your business today to take the joy you feel for life and extend it to other people.

Your enthusiasm for something you have been working on will wane over the next 24 hours but it’s no big deal, in fact it may even be good. The fact that this project has not brought the rewards you desired suggests it may be time to ditch it.

Energy planet Mars moves into your sign tomorrow and almost immediately the world around you will seem a more vibrant place. If you feel the urge to embark on some kind of adventure don’t try to talk yourself out of it, just go!

The best way to resolve a dispute is to decide that it no longer means anything to you. If others want to get angry and antagonistic about it today that’s up to them but you are under no obligation to follow their example.

If someone makes you the proverbial offer you cannot refuse today you should do your homework and see if the offer is on the level. It could be that on this occasion they are not exaggerating and the financial risk may be worth it.

Try not to push yourself too hard over the next few days. As Mars moves into the career area of your chart there will be opportunities to move up in the world but you don’t have to chase success in one mad rush. Take your time and do it right.

The fact that you have been held back from following your dream will make the events of the next few days even more dramatic and welcome. As Mars moves into the most adventurous area of your chart there will be no stopping you.

If you focus on what you are good at over the next 24 hours you will break through that invisible barrier that has been holding you back. The more your horizons were limited in the past the more expansive your vision will be now.

You need to start asking yourself the sort of questions that appear to have no easy answers. The deeper you look into what is going on in the world the more you will discover there is in fact a pattern behind it, one that is actually quite encouraging.

As Mars moves into the partnership area of your chart today any thoughts you had about taking things easy and enjoying some quiet time will soon fly out the window. It’s going to be noisy and messy, but it will also be fun.

Your capacity for hard work will increase massively today but no matter how energetic you feel you must impose some limits on yourself. Not even a Taurus can keep doing more without hitting a physical wall. Know your limits and stay within them.

One of the most creative times of the year begins for you today as Mars moves into your fellow air sign of Libra. Be sensible about the goals you choose to pursue and make sure they feel right for the kind of person you want to be.

You will have to accept that some kind of aim or ambition is beyond you and it would be better to leave it behind and do something else. Far from being a sign of failure your willingness to make changes is a sign of mental and emotional strength.

If you find yourself grappling with a problem that has no easy solution maybe you should just forget about it and devote your time and energy to resolving a more predictable issue. That applies doubly if the problem is not of your own making.

You must be ruthlessly honest with yourself over the next 24 hours, especially if there is money at stake. Admit that you have spent too much and need to make savings, and don’t try to blame other people for your own wastefulness.

You no longer have to stay in the shadows and watch other people get the applause. Now you can step forward and take your rightful place at the front of the stage. Mars in your sign for the next seven weeks means it’s your turn to shine.

The more other people say you need to respect certain boundaries the more you must question them and ask “Why?” The powers that be may not be happy if you challenge their right to make the rules but that’s the reason you must do it.

A certain individual may deserve a good talking to but is it worth your time and energy to make an example of them? On this occasion it may be better to let them carry on making the same foolish mistakes. It’s not your job to rescue them.

The progress you make on the work front over the days and weeks to come will convince the doubters that you have what it takes to reach the top. It will also demonstrate that you are not as old-fashioned in your thinking as they thought you were.

The more risks you take now the better. With Mars on your side you have the drive and the ambition to overcome any and all odds, so don’t hold back – give what you are working on your very best shot 100 per cent of the time.

As Mars leaves your opposite sign today you should find that people you deal with on a one-to-one basis are no longer so demanding. That is a good sign for partnerships in general and even more so for those that involve joint financial obligations.

Your social life will get a shot in the arm over the next 12 months but you must pace yourself sensibly so you don’t overdo it. Life is supposed to be fun, of course, but remind yourself occasionally that serious issues have not gone away.

There is something in the Aries nature that likes to test limits and the approaching full moon will encourage that over the next few days. Just be careful you don’t test those limits so far that other people take exception and hit back at you.

Only you can decide if now is the right time to follow a hunch of some kind but if you choose not to and discover later on that you missed out on something big you may find it hard to forgive yourself. Go on, it’s a risk worth taking.

The omens are good that anything of a creative nature you start between now and the weekend will work out well, so stop listening to people who urge caution and give it your very best shot. Give your imagination permission to soar as well.

You may prefer to reach a compromise over a disagreement at work but the planets warn that won’t be an option. If a colleague seems determined to push the issue all the way then you must be prepared to go all the way as well.

Your popularity is such that almost anything you do will be met with approval, but as the full moon approaches you must be smart and not push your luck too far. You can get away with a lot but you won’t get away with everything.

A long-running dispute with a work colleague will reach a head by the end of the week, so be ready to defend your position and refuse to back down no matter how much pressure they bring to bear. They don’t have the power to coerce you.

Although the full moon at the weekend won’t affect you directly you will still be challenged in some way. Either at home or at work you will be expected to give ground and, just this once, that might be the right thing to do.

The doubts you have about a certain individual must not be ignored. If your instincts tell you they cannot be trusted you would be wise to act on them. At the very least you should keep them at arm’s length so they cannot influence your decisions.

Do your own thing in your own way over the next 24 hours and don’t worry too much if some people say you are being antisocial. Maybe you are but no one has the right to demand that you put their needs ahead of your own.

If you want something done today you will either have to do it yourself or command a subordinate to do it for you. If you choose the latter approach you must impress on them that this is not a request but an command – otherwise it won’t get done.

What you begin over the next two or three days should be a success in the long term but if you try to push ahead too quickly you could create obstacles for yourself that slow things down. You’re not on the clock, so take your time.

An issue you thought had been resolved is about to rear its unwelcome head again and this time you must get it sorted. If that means you need to talk tough to partners and colleagues then so be it. You cannot let it drag on forever.

You will be extremely vocal this year – no one will be left in any doubt what you think, what you believe and what you desire. You may come across as bossy, even dictatorial, at times but at least you will get important things done.

You may not be the sort to suffer fools but if you want this to be a pleasant day it might be best to ignore people who seem determined to turn an already messy situation into an even worse one. You don’t have to play their silly games.

You will handle what occurs today and over the weekend with ease, but not everyone you have dealings with will be as switched on as you, so make allowances but also make sure that other people’s errors don’t reflect badly on you.

You need to lay down the law to a certain person because if you don’t they could start thinking they can get away with anything. Let them know in no uncertain terms that they are expected to follow the rules like everyone else.

The approaching full moon is likely to blur reality a bit, so make sure what you see and hear is truly there and not just a figment of your imagination. If you get it wrong today you could pay for it heavily over the next few weeks.

A partnership matter will come to a head over the next two or three days and although it may not be a pleasant experience it will at least clear the air. You have spent too much time and energy arguing about something of no real significance.

It does not matter what other people say is true or false, it matters only that you trust your instincts and follow what they tell you to the letter. This is one of those occasions when the so-called facts could turn out to be fantasies.

Mars in your sign links with Uranus and Saturn over the next 48 hours, endowing you with both energy and ambition. If you want to do something big, something that makes the world take notice of you, now is the time. Act swiftly and decisively.

If you go out of your way to treat others with respect today they will go out of their way to open doors and smooth your path to your long-term goal. Don’t try to reach that goal on your own though – success is very much a team effort.

You don’t need to feel guilty just because things are going better for you than they are for friends and colleagues. They will get their chance to shine soon as the approaching full moon upends the status quo. Be careful it doesn’t upend you as well.

Put your own needs first and make sure that whatever money you have in your pocket stays in your pocket. You may be generous by nature but the planets warn you could easily be taken for a sucker by someone with a hard luck story.

Tomorrow’s full moon in your sign will bring to a close a chapter of your life that you may not have enjoyed but which has taught you a lot. Most importantly, it made you realize that your ideas, views and opinions are not unwaveringly perfect.

You may not enjoy confrontations but it is essential that you stand up for what you believe today and over the weekend. Make it clear that you are no longer prepared to back off in the face of opposition from people you do not respect.

Social activities are under excellent stars on your birthday, so put yourself about and make friends with people whose outlook on life excites you. No matter what your own beliefs may be you will be thrilled by ideas you had never previously encountered.

You may be the cenrer of attention at the moment, especially in your social group, but the full moon will be such a searching spotlight that there could be times when you feel a bit exposed and uncomfortable. Why? Do you have something to hide?

A big change on the work front may come as a surprise but looking back on the situation a few days from now you will realize the signs were there all along. Stay calm and strive to stay on the right side of people in positions of power.

The more friends and colleagues run this way and that this weekend the easier it will be for you to pick your way through the confusion and achieve something good. Their doom and disaster scenarios have absolutely no chance of coming true.

You may be tempted to take a short-term profit rather than leave your money where it is and risk losing it all but this weekend’s full moon indicates that your best course of action may be to do nothing at all. Lay low for a while.

Because the current full moon takes place in your opposite sign you cannot expect partners and loved ones to share your outlook on life. Let them do what feels right to them this weekend, even if it means your paths must diverge for a while.

It should by now be clear that you have been pushing yourself too hard and need to slow down a bit. If you carry on at your current pace you may find that what you get out of your efforts is considerably less than what you put in.

It will be easy to get frustrated with people who don’t share either your ambition or your energy but it won’t change a thing. If you want to get ahead in the world you must replace those individuals with people whose dreams match your own.

Someone you are close to emotionally needs your moral guidance. Don’t be afraid to tell them where you think they are going wrong and what they must do to put it right. It may be tough love but they will thank you for it one day.

You can be a bit intimidating at times, especially when you are immersed in a project and moving ahead at breakneck speed. No one wants to get in your way. But if you move too fast and make a mistake today don’t expect any sympathy.

There is no copyright on ideas, so if a friend or colleague or even a family member says something today that stirs your creative juices by all means take it and use it. Likewise, don’t get angry if someone takes and uses one of your own ideas.

You may not be the most emotional member of the zodiac but today’s full moon in your sign will make you unusually sensitive. If you find yourself getting touchy for no good reason you can snap yourself out of it by doing something creative.

You are not about to change the way you look at the world just because someone says you should, but they may have a point when they warn that your current outlook is too narrow. It’s time to raise your sights and take in a wider viewpoint.

The message of your birthday chart is that you don’t have to be the one who takes risks all the time. Let everyone know that you don’t want to be the frontrunner this year. There is no cosmic law that says you must always be the leader.

Something you have been held back from working on in recent weeks can now start moving ahead again, but you must take your time and get it right or there could be more hold-ups in future. Take big steps but take them slowly.

You may not agree with a loved one’s plans but don’t discourage them. If they seem determined to give it a go then do what you can to help them and, most importantly, be there to catch them if they take an unexpected fall.

Now that your ruler Mercury is moving in your favour again you won’t find it hard to come up with new ideas. The only danger is you may have so many of them that they start getting in the way of each other. Be selective in your endeavours.

Cosmic activity in the financial area of your chart will encourage you to believe that you can pay off your debts AND start making some serious money. What is your favourite creative idea? Make that your one and only focus over the coming week.

Now that mind planet Mercury is ending its retrograde phase the doubts that have been holding you back will disappear as if by magic. The more others say your dreams are really just fantasies the more determined you will be to prove them wrong.

You may have struggled in recent weeks to work out what is going on in the world around you but over the next few days the picture will become clearer. Remind yourself often that there is a reason for everything that happens in life.

Efforts you made a month or so back will start to pay dividends now that Mercury is ending its retrograde phase. You will also discover that people you thought were acting against you were in fact acting for you in a very big way.

Honesty will be the best policy on the work front today, especially when dealing with people whose status gives them the kind of power that you clearly lack. You may be a fighter by nature but you don’t have to make an enemy of everyone!

You will now get the opportunity to prove that your critics were wrong and that you do have what it takes to make a name for yourself. You’ve had a lot of time to think over the past few weeks, now you must get on and act.

Is a friend or loved one keeping important things from you? According to the planets you think they are but you need to be extra careful before making accusations. How confident are you that the information you have about them is accurate?

Something that has been worrying you for weeks will no longer be a cause for concern. Looking back you will realize there was no reason why you should have been worried about it in the first place. Next time, be more positive in your outlook.

You won’t lack for ideas today and with mind planet Mercury moving in your favour again you can be confident that some of those ideas will be worth pursuing. Don’t go after them in a mad rush though – take your time and do it right.

The time for doubt is over – now you must go after your No. 1 goal with total commitment and total self-belief. The planets indicate you have what it takes to reach the top of the mountain you most want to conquer, so get climbing!

What occurs today, either in your private life or in the wider world, will help you see the bigger picture and recognize that most things happen for a reason. Once you know that you should find it easier to act, because you know what you do has meaning.

As one of the zodiac’s Earth signs you are not the sort to give up easily, or even at all, and if you keep plugging away at what you are working on it will come good eventually. Staying power is so important, even more so than intelligence.

If you find it difficult to keep your mind on the job today then stop trying so hard and give yourself time to relax. There are some major changes going on behind the scenes at the moment, so you probably won’t be missed if you take a break.

Venus and Jupiter join forces in your sign today, making this the perfect time to get together with friends and loved ones and have a good time. Forget about your chores for a while and do only what makes you feel good about yourself.

Has someone got it in for you or is it just your imagination working overtime? Most likely it’s the latter, so don’t be so suspicious and do make an effort to get to know what they are up to. You may even decide to help them in their efforts.

If you are smart you will resist the urge to answer back at someone who says something incredibly stupid. They are not the kind of individual you can have a reasoned debate with, so why waste your time on them? Pretend they don’t exist.

If you stand back and let other people make the running today you will save yourself a lot of time and effort and still end up at the place you were hoping to reach. Sometimes it pays to be the face in the crowd that doesn’t stand out.

You need to remind yourself today that time is not a factor in what you are doing. In fact, it will pay you to consciously move a bit more slowly than usual, because any mistakes you make will add minutes, maybe even hours, to your journey.

No matter how tempted you may be to let others in on a secret of some kind you must keep it to yourself for the time being. Knowledge is power and the less your rivals know about what is going on the more power you will have.

If you make it your business to assist a friend in need over the next 24 hours the universe will go out of its way to reward you in the future. Not that you need an incentive – you will do it anyway out of the goodness of your heart.

Your good humour will light up whatever social situation you find yourself in today. The more friends and colleagues are feeling a bit down the more determined you will be to cheer them up. Their tears of sadness will soon become tears of joy.

A change of direction in your life is clearly necessary but there is no reason why it should be a scary one. Nothing stays the same forever and what comes next will be more exciting, and more profitable, than what went before, so embrace the change.

Someone you do business with will be assertive and maybe even aggressive today and you may be tempted to end the relationship. Don’t be so hasty. Most likely they are just going through a rough patch and will be more co-operative tomorrow.

You need to get out more and mix with people whose outlook on life is very different to your own. They are the ones who will come up with ideas that you would have been unable to think of by yourself. Diversity of opinion is essential.

If you feel the need to take a risk of some sort today then do so and don’t try to guess what the consequences might be. Now that your ruling planet Mercury is moving in your favour again it’s odds on you’ll back a winner this time.

If you make a wish today it will come true by the weekend. Don’t waste time wishing for world peace or any serious stuff like that because your own material needs must come first. If it’s money you need, it’s money you must ask for.

Your head may be filled with big ideas but how many of them will ever amount to anything? The message of the stars today is that you must focus on the two or three aims that means the most to your personally. Be selective in your ambitions.

The sun in the most sensitive area of your chart, alongside mind planet Mercury, means you will be asking yourself some rather deep questions. But don’t get so caught up with serious matters that you neglect to have fun, because that’s a serious matter too.

If you keep your eyes and ears open over the next 24 hours you will spot something most other people have missed and it could be something that helps you move up in the world. Jupiter’s influence is exceptionally good for career matters now.

Your confidence is such that you genuinely believe there is nothing you cannot accomplish. That may be true but don’t waste your energy trying to achieve stuff that looks good to others but doesn’t help you in any real way. Make every choice and action count.

Cosmic activity in the partnership area of your chart urges you to open up and let friends and family members know how you feel. You may not like putting yourself in such a vulnerable position but by doing so you will earn their trust.

It is a universal truth that everything balances out in the end, so if recent events have worked against you then what happens next should be more encouraging. A lot though depends on your frame of mind, so strive to be positive at all times.

So many things in your life are starting to come together now that you may wonder why you were so despondent just a short time ago. Don’t dwell on it though as this is a time to get stuff done, not lament what you should have done earlier.

Your mind is a powerful tool and if you use it constructively over the coming year there is no limit to the good things you can build. Ignore those who advise a more cautious approach because that is the last thing you need. It’s time to go all-in!

Saturn in your sign may be putting a few obstacles in your path but you can be sure it’s for a good reason. Most likely you have been moving too fast for your own good and need to be reminded that success is as much about stamina as speed.

You may have to do something you don’t much enjoy today but you must make a good job of it. People in positions of power are watching you closely and if you show the right attitude they will give you more agreeable tasks in future.

According to the planets a friend is going through a tough time at the moment and could do with some help. Maybe the best way to assist them is to suggest that they cut their losses and live to fight another day, as this battle appears to be lost.

The only danger today is that in your eagerness to get ahead you come on too strong and scare off people who could have been useful allies. Sometimes you get so intense about what you are working on that those around you start to panic!

You may have endured a setback or two in recent weeks but with both the sun and Mercury now doing wonderful things in your sign you will more than make up for your losses. Aim to be the biggest and the best at what you do.

It may be true that some of your methods and routines need updating but don’t try to do it all at once. Draw up a sensible schedule that will move you gradually from the old way of doing things to the new. You’re not on the clock.

No doubt it is frustrating to be held back from pushing ahead with your plans but Saturn in the most dynamic area of your chart warns you need to pace yourself. You can still work hard and you can still have fun but you must not overdo it.

If you play your cards right over the next few days you could soon be moving up in the world. Someone in a position of authority is impressed by your can-do attitude and your desire to learn and will promote you if they get the chance.

Something of a minor nature seems to be worrying you for no good reason and you need to get past it so you can focus on more important matters. Start the process today by closing your ears to those who enjoy preaching doom and gloom!

Cosmic activity in the most materialistic area of your chart will bring money matters to a head over the next few days and that’s a good thing. You certainly won’t be able to be as free and easy with your cash as you have been of late.

The events of the next 12 months will get you asking some pretty deep questions about who you are and why you are here. The answers the universe sends your way will change your outlook and most likely change your luck for the better as well.

Your way with words will get things done today and over the weekend but don’t be excessively direct when dealing with people who aren’t as quick as you. Sometimes you don’t realize just how aggressive you can sound, so think before you speak.

If your sixth sense tells you to hold back a bit today that is precisely what you must do. You won’t lose anything by going over your plans one last time, and if you find something you missed earlier on you may actually gain.

Mercury, your ruler, is nicely aligned with energy planet Mars today, so get your act together and get busy on those things you know must be done immediately. While your rivals are still trying to make up their minds you will be streaking ahead.

What you need to recognize now is that no one but you can resolve your current problem. You also need to understand that if you limit your actions to what you have done before you won’t change the situation one little bit. Time for some radical thinking.

Don’t bother trying to explain to other people what you intend to do, just get on and do it and let them work it out for themselves. With Mars and Mercury working in harmony today your mind will be operating on a much higher level.

Mercury, your ruling planet, will encourage you to think along lines that are new to you over the next 24 hours. Once you have tried it a few times you will discover ways of looking at the world that are actually very exciting.

You will get through twice as much work as your colleagues today and there may be some jealousy when they see how far ahead of them you are. Don’t let that worry you for even a moment. Why should you care if they can’t keep up?

Money matters and business activities will go well for you this weekend but you must not use that as an excuse to start spending again. You may be in the money at the moment but you know from experience how quickly the financial climate can change.

Most things in life will run smoothly this weekend, and even when you do encounter a bump or two you will get over them with ease. You may not notice them at all if you take your time rather than try to rush ahead at every opportunity.

Why are you wasting so much time and energy getting worked up about issues that have nothing to do with you? Yes, of course, there are a lot of genuine injustices in the world but tears of rage won’t change a single one of them.

Good fortune is coming your way but, like the weather, when it will arrive and how long it will last cannot be predicted with absolute certainty. It is, however, likely to reach your door sooner if you act at all times with total confidence.

If you need to get away from your current environment then book your ticket and go! The sun in Leo at this time of year opens up a whole new world of possibilities, so don’t be foolish and stay where you are. You need a break.

The fact that friends and colleagues and even family members think you have made a poor choice does not mean you must change it. On the contrary, what occurs over the next few days will remind you there are infinite ways to reach the same goal.

In a matter of days the sun will move in your favour, so forget about what went wrong in the past and focus only on the future. If you don’t know precisely what it is you want from life then do some deep thinking about it today.

Life may be full of ups and downs at the moment but a more stable phase is on the horizon. Where both financial and family matters are concerned you need to push past what you consider to be failures and reset your mind to think only of success.

With Mars moving through the travel area of your chart you will go where you want to go and do what you want to do and you won’t care in the slightest if other people do not approve. Go out of your way to be different today.

A more positive phase is coming and in a matter of days you will look back and wonder why you got so worked up about issues that were of only minor importance. Start making plans for the rest of the year, and make them big!

If you allow yourself to get emotional about a situation you cannot change then you will be no good either to yourself or to other people. Instead, stay calm and start making the kind of small changes that will one day add up to something big.

You may feel a bit frustrated today because you are stuck in one place when there are so many interesting things going on in the world at large, but be patient. The planets indicate you will be on the move again very soon.

If there is someone you want to impress then Mercury in your opposite sign will help you find the right words to excite them. But make sure what you tell them is true or they might lose confidence in you later on if you fail to deliver.

A Mars-Mercury link on your birthday will make it easy for you to get your point of view across this year and your powers of persuasion will make a huge and positive difference to other people’s lives. Think big, talk big and act big as well.

You will come to the conclusion today that some of the things you have been fretting over are not worth the effort. Don’t get angry with yourself about it, just put the past behind you and resolve to be less pessimistic in future.

Something of a personal nature needs to be dealt with before the sun changes signs at the end of the week. The last thing you need is to be held back from fulfilling your potential by vague fears from the past that don’t mean a thing.

The more someone talks the less you seem to trust them and on this occasion your instincts are spot on. You may not know why you doubt what they are telling you but you do know better than to take their words at face value.

Steer clear of discussions about topics where your knowledge is limited, because if you make claims that cannot be backed up by facts you could end up looking foolish. No one expects you to know everything, so don’t expect it of yourself.

A flash of inspiration will get you thinking along more adventurous lines today and people may be surprised by how easily you change your outlook. Life moves faster by the day and even the hour and you intend to keep up at all costs.

If you are having second thoughts about a decision you took earlier in the month then stop the clock and think it through from beginning to end. If an adjustment of some kind needs to be made then get on with it and then start moving ahead again.

You will get your chance to make your mark when the sun moves in your favour on Friday. You may not think of yourself as much of an artist but you will have the power to create something that delights both yourself and other people.

A loved one may give the impression that they don’t have a care in the world but you can tell they are hurting inside. Make it your business today to find out what is distressing them and then do whatever it takes to cheer them up.

If you feel the urge to make an impulse buy today then by all means splash the cash, but make it your last big buy for a while. Even if your finances look okay at the moment there could be a costly surprise or two up ahead.

You may be eager to get on in the world but you could easily take on too much between now and the weekend and regret it later on. The message of the stars today is that you will travel faster and further if you choose to travel light.

It’s time to let go of something that is no longer of any real use to you. It may have been fun in the past but now it is holding you back, so be ruthless and trash it. And yes, that could also apply to a long-term relationship.
