If you have to take on a heavy responsibility this weekend you must do so without complaint. A friend or work colleague has done favours for you in the past and now it is your turn to do something for them. Make a good job of it.

Today’s new moon is an omen of future success but it won’t just happen as if by magic. Get your act together over the next 48 hours and decide what it is you want to accomplish, then go for it with total effort and commitment.

You need to assert your authority on the home front this weekend but you also need to be aware that some of your loved ones get emotional more easily than you do. A bit of tough love may be necessary but don’t go too far.

The pace of life is about to speed up considerably but that won’t worry you in the slightest. On the contrary, the faster you move over the next few days the more you will enjoy the ride. Secretly, you’re a bit of a thrill seeker.

The best way to make money fast is to cash in on your artistic talents. What can you do over the weekend that will create something tasteful that you can sell for big bucks with no shortage of buyers? Focus on that and ignore everything else.

A new moon in your birth sign makes this the ideal weekend to start a new project. You have thought about it long enough and no doubt made detailed plans as well – now you must move on to the final stage. In other words, get on with!

Although you may feel a bit unsure of yourself at the moment you cannot allow that to stop you moving up in the world. The more you hold back now the more effort you will have to put in later to catch up on your rivals.

A lot of things in your world will change over the next few weeks and there will be times when you feel a bit uncomfortable, but that’s good because it will keep you sharp. Aim high, move fast and never give less than 100 per cent.

A new moon in the career area of your chart means it won’t be enough to stay out of sight and enjoy your anonymity. There is a world out there that needs your brand of genius, so take a deep breath and step into the spotlight.

Cosmic activity in your fellow Earth sign of Virgo means there is precious little you cannot achieve in the days and weeks to come. The more adventurous you are, both in your career and in your private life, the more successful you will be.

If you need to get to grips with your money situation then now is the time. A new moon in the wealth area of your chart means that any decisions you take now will pay off later in the year, so make your plans and make them big.

Partnerships of all kinds are under excellent stars, so get out and about and let everyone know you are in the mood to make things happen. What you do on your own will be good. What you do with other people will be great.

A new moon on your birthday is a wonderful omen but as Saturn is strong as well you will need to take a disciplined approach to getting things done. The more chaos there is in the world around you the more focused your efforts must be.

As love planet Venus moves into the most energetic area of your chart today affairs of the heart will play an even bigger part in your life than normal. Once you discover how easy it is to turn on the charm there will be no stopping you!

Cosmic activity in and around the domestic area of your chart means you need to pay a lot more attention to family dynamics. Find out what loved ones need from you then go all out to get it for them – assuming it will do them good, of course.

Let other people take care of the serious stuff today while you get out and about and have as much fun as is humanly possible. Someone you meet on your travels will at the very least become a very good friend – and maybe something more!

Information that comes your way over the next 24 hours will encourage you to believe there is money to be made from your artistic and creative talents. What do you do better than most other people? Focus on that and make it pay.

There will be a number of challenging situations to deal with over the next few days but with values planet Venus moving into your sign you can easily find ways to turn those situations to your advantage. Above all, you must stay calm.

The sun in your sign makes you determined to do something special with your life but the wider cosmic picture warns you must not be reckless. The goals you set yourself must be achievable, of course, but they must be ethical too.

Venus, your ruling planet, moves into the friendship area of your chart today, so even though you want to push on with your ambitions you must also make time for social activities. The way to get the best of both worlds is to plan well ahead.

Life doesn’t have to be a battle, not even on the work front, so promise yourself as the new week begins that you won’t get dragged into fights and feuds that do no one any good. Laugh at other people’s tendency to overreact to events.

You’re not in the mood for routine matters or taking care of details, so keep your distance from people you know will tie you down with petty nonsense. If you keep your eye on the bigger picture you will see all sorts of interesting connections.

You have to accept that some people will find fault with everything you do, but you don’t have to put up with it. You can be pretty good at building emotional walls and that’s exactly what you must do over the next 24 hours.

Values planet Venus moves into the partnership area of your chart today, making it easy for even the most restrained Aquarius to reach out and embrace the people they love. It’s safe to allow your affections to guide everything you do and say.

A more relaxed approach to life is a must as the week begins. If you talk tough then friends and rivals alike will expect you to act tough as well and you know you don’t really want to. It can be a mistake to take life too seriously.

The message of your birthday chart is that you must learn to love yourself more and stop being hyper-critical about your own efforts. The universe has placed you in precisely the right time and place to use your talents for the greater good.

You can easily win an argument with a loved one but in doing so you could create a bit of bad feeling. You don’t have to lose the argument on purpose, of course, but you can find a way to call it a draw so they don’t get upset.

Venus, your ruler, makes positive links to three major planets today, so you will be in tune with the spirit of the times. If you can see a way to turn your popularity into cash you must not hesitate – go for it and get rich!

Uranus in your birth sign will fill your head with all sorts of way out and wonderful ideas today and the good news is they will be right on the money. Listen to your sixth sense and act quickly and decisively on what it tells you to do.

You may not have found it easy to express yourself on the work front lately but if you try again today you should be able to get your message across. And if some of your opinions upset people in positions of power … that’s good!

You need to accept that not everyone can be as motivated and ambitious as you. It may be frustrating that colleagues and loved ones seem to be dragging their feet but there is no point trying to hurry them along. It may be easier to travel alone.

There are many things in your life that you would like to change but there is only one thing that MUST be changed and that is your tendency to stick with the old way of doing things. New methods and routines should be embraced, not feared.

As your ruling planet Venus is linked to Saturn, Neptune and Uranus today there is clearly something very special going on in your world. This would be a great time to revisit a project you once had high hopes for. This time it WILL come good.

If you feel the urge to slow down a bit on the work front then do so and don’t feel in the least bit guilty about it. If you conserve your energy now you will be tanked up and ready to go again come the end of the week.

Listen carefully to what a friend or loved one tells you about an issue that may not be important to you at the moment but which is likely to grow in significance over the next few weeks. Their good advice could save you considerable anguish.

Why do you worry so much about situations that you cannot change? Ignore anything and everything that is taking place in the world that does not affect you directly. That may sound selfish but it is also the only way to find peace of mind.

The message of the stars today is that you need to change your outlook in radical ways. You may be a creature of habit but it should by now be clear that some of those habits are seriously holding you back. Let go of the past!

You have no choice now but to be ruthlessly practical in everything you say and do. Don’t waste a moment looking for ways to postpone what you know must be said and done – just do it and ignore the complaints and the tears.

The pressure will be on over the next 12 months and you will love every moment of it. To others your calm in the face of a storm may seem superhuman but to you it’s just business as usual. Setting new standards is what you do best.

Don’t take it personally if a loved one comes on a bit strong today. The planets indicate they are in one of those moods when even the smallest of setbacks is seen as a tragedy. Smile at their dramatics and don’t take anything they say seriously.

Not everyone can be as logical and sensible as you, so make allowances for friends and family members who don’t seem to understand even the simplest of things. If communication is the key to success they are obviously not going to make it.

You may have no choice today but to get tough with someone who has let you down. If this isn’t the first time they have said one thing to you and then done the opposite then maybe your association with them needs to end.

A partnership that has been going through a bad patch can easily be salvaged, but only if you stay calm and refuse to get upset about what recently took place. If there is money involved that is double the incentive to work things out between you.

Venus in your sign at odds with Pluto today means you must make a serious effort to see another person’s point of view. Even if you are 100 per cent certain they have got it wrong you won’t change their outlook by forcing the issue.

You need to think again about something you have taken for granted for many years. It may be a belief or even a lifestyle but new facts and figures have come to light that indicate you may have approached it from the wrong angle.

Mars in your sign means you won’t stand for any kind of interference in your personal affairs. Sadly, someone does not seem to be aware of that fact and will stick their nose in where it doesn’t belong. Try not to be too harsh with them.

If something disrupts your plans today your first reaction will be to get angry about it but there is really no need. You may even find that you prefer the new direction you are expected to move in, not that you will admit it of course.

Your No. 1 priority is to focus on the task at hand and not let anything distract you from getting it finished as quickly as possible. If your attention wanders for even a moment it will take days, maybe even weeks, to get back on track.

You may be inclined to turn up your nose at a business offer, because you don’t trust where it is coming from, but don’t be hasty. Venus in the wealth area of your chart suggests it may be on the level. Make it your business to find out.

Has someone been taking advantage of your generous nature? According to the planets they have and now you must draw a line and make sure they cannot go any further. Don’t shut them out completely but do be less charitable in future.

Steer your mind away from petty matters and focus exclusively on the world around you and what you can do to make it a better place. This is a great time to sign up to a social cause that needs people who possess both intelligence and compassion.

A Venus-Pluto link on your birthday means the dividing line between the personal and the professional will be blurred over the coming year. Everything you say and do in one area will affect other areas too, so you must stay sharp.

There will be times between now and the weekend when it feels as if the whole world is falling apart but you know that’s not true. Don’t sit at home waiting for the sky to fall, get out there and make a positive contribution.

If you try to control each and every little thing that happens in your life you are sure to fail – and why would you want to when the cosmic powers are looking over you and guiding your every step? You need to be more trusting.

All things are possible if you want them enough but you must be sensible about how you use your time and energy. You may be a brilliant multitasker but if you want to succeed you need to focus on your most important objectives only.

You can be a bit distrustful at times and because a recent joint project went wrong you may now be inclined to work on your own. That’s okay for the short-term but don’t make it the new normal. You need other people and they need you.

Keep routine tasks to a minimum over the next 24 hours and focus instead on impressing people whose support you are going to need in the weeks and months to come. They want to hear about your big ideas, not your everyday activities.

You may be aiming for the stars but not everyone shares your success-at-all-costs outlook, so make allowances for those who cannot keep up. Some people are happier with their feet planted firmly on the ground, and you must accept that.

The influence of Mars in your sign does wonders for your confidence but don’t get carried away and believe you are invincible. Even if you really are an unstoppable force there is an immovable object up ahead, so slow down before it gets messy.

There is no point getting worked up about something you know is going to happen and cannot be avoided. Instead of raging at how unfair the situation is, use your time to come up with a strategy that will soften its effects. Think more, worry less.

Are you living up to your highest ideals? Are you pursuing goals that will not only bring material success but spiritual satisfaction as well? If not, make this the day when you make a change of cosmic proportions. You are capable of so much more.

If you are bored with a project that doesn’t seem to be going anywhere then put it on ice for a while and do something different. Later on your passion for it will rekindle and you can work on it again with a renewed spirit of adventure.

Something that has been worrying you for ages will no longer seem so important after today, so start making plans and don’t listen to those who say you need to be cautious. Artistically and creatively you can be as adventurous as you please.

As a water sign you can be overly sensitive at times and someone who knows that is about to target a sore spot in your psyche. Put on a brave face and pretend that you welcome their advice. If you must cry, do it in private.

It’s not just the start of a new solar year but a new era as well. There will be so many changes over the next 12 months that many people won’t be able to keep up, but you will, because you intend to profit from them.

The only pressure you need to worry about is the pressure you put on yourself. A more relaxed approach to life today and over the weekend will work wonders both at home and at work. Life is supposed to be enjoyed, not dreaded.

Forget about the little things that annoy you so much and focus on the bigger picture. If you stand back from what’s going on it won’t be long before you recognize there is a pattern to your existence – and it’s an encouraging one.

You need to get past the idea that life is a zero sum game, that if you win someone else has to lose. In the greater scheme of things that’s not how it works, so stop thinking of others as rivals and work together for your mutual benefit.

There is a lot of fear in the world at the moment and you must not allow yourself to get caught up in it. A positive approach to life is an absolute must, especially when dealing with people who don’t possess your sense of purpose.

This is a time of major changes on a global scale and you are well placed to take advantage of them. As one of the zodiac’s more adventurous signs you enjoy pushing limits, your own and other people’s – so try something different today.

You may be in the mood to take life at a more leisurely pace but some of your colleagues want you to keep moving fast and hard. Ignore them. The only reason they are being so pushy is because they think they might gain from it.

Don’t hold back on what you really think and feel. You may not want to hurt someone’s feelings but sometimes you must tell it like it is and this is one of those occasions. The consequences won’t be anywhere near as bad as you fear.

If you get the chance to enjoy a bit of down time today then take it and forget about your responsibilities for a while. An hour spent sitting quietly and pondering the meaning of life will serve you better than doing chores you don’t enjoy.

Push your worries to one side and focus on what is good in your life. You may not be the sort to let minor irritations get to you but they have been building up of late and you need to remind yourself just how lucky you are.

You may be flavour of the month with most people but one particular friend or colleague does not have such a high opinion of you. Find out what has upset them and do what you can to put it right. It’s probably something very small.

As your ruler Uranus links with Neptune, planet of imagination today you won’t find it hard to come by good ideas, so give your imagination permission to roam as far and as wide as it can. Some of those ideas will be touched by genius.

At some point today you will have to accept that you are never going to be friendly with someone who is as different to you as it is possible to get. Once you have done that you won’t have to waste any more time trying to like them.

A Neptune-Uranus link on your birthday means you must raise your awareness of what’s right and what’s wrong and focus on ambitions that benefit not just yourself but other people as well. You can be a real force for good over the coming year.

Don’t push yourself too hard this weekend because the planets indicate that even if you get a lot done between now and Monday morning it will somehow or other get undone again later in the week. Why make an effort when it’s not worth it?

If someone who makes your heart beat faster every time you see them sends signals of a loving nature this weekend it may be the start of a special relationship. But make sure it’s what you really want before going all the way.

You need to patch things up with a colleague who you fell out with a while ago. As you are so different personality-wise it’s unlikely you will ever be friends, but you can still form a perfectly good, and profitable, working relationship.

You seem to be on everyone’s invitation list at the moment and that’s a good thing, but don’t go mad and burn yourself out at a succession of parties and social events. You are a modest individual by nature so keep a bit of yourself in reserve.

If you get the urge to take a chance of some kind over the next 48 hours then just go for it. You don’t have to ask anyone’s permission, and you certainly don’t need a friend to hold your hand, so give it your very best shot.

The sun in your sign does wonders for your confidence and it also makes you more aware of the wider and long-term trends that are taking place. Keep your eye on the big picture this weekend and be ready to act fast when the opportunity arises.

Although your heart may tell you one thing this weekend it is your head that you must follow. No matter how eager you may be to get out there and make a name for yourself the planets warn if you act too soon your name will be mud!

You know that you are on the right track but how do you convince the doubters? A more relevant question might be, why would you want to convince them? While they are stumbling along the wrong track you will be speeding down the right one.

If you make an effort to be helpful on the work front this weekend your efforts will be noted by people in positions of power. You do have a reputation for a streak of selfishness in your nature but you possess a generous side too.

You may be a bit suspicious about the power of positive thinking but if you hold a vision of the best possible outcome in your mind this weekend there is a very real chance it will come about. Try it. What have you got to lose?

Banish all thoughts of failure from your mind and press ahead with your No. 1 objective. You may not be hugely ambitious but you do want to leave your mark on the world and what happens next will point you in the right direction.

You need to be forceful about what you believe in. You may be a nice guy by nature but now the universe wants you to fight for the right to have thoughts and feelings that the average person might not understand. Don’t be average – be you!

If you know what you want and you know how to get it then why does your objective still seem so far away? Maybe it’s because you are wasting too much time and energy on trivial pursuits. Focus on what matters this year with laser-like intensity.

Cosmic activity in the wellbeing area of your chart makes this the ideal time to start a new fitness regime – but don’t overdo it! Your all-or-nothing Aries nature could easily nudge you into taking on too much too soon, so be sensible.

A new start is not only possible but essential. As mind planet Mercury moves into the most dynamic area of your chart today you can and you must take a hard look at your aims and ambitions. How can you be more consciously creative?

You need to stop worrying about a situation that cannot be resolved in a day, a week or even a month. If others see you are desperate to get it sorted they may take advantage of that to get favors from you that they do not deserve.

This should be a fun time of year for you and as mind planet Mercury moves into the social area of your chart today almost anything you choose to do will work out well. For best results, go somewhere different with a new group of friends.

An opportunity to boost your income is there for the taking and you must not hesitate for even a moment. You are not the only one with their eyes on a lucrative prize, so get your act together and move fast so your rivals don’t beat you to it.

Mercury, your ruling planet, joins the Sun in your sign today, which will do wonders for your confidence and also make it easier to focus on what really matters to you personally. Ignore any and all advice and follow your hunches instead.

It would be nice to turn back the clock and undo a mistake that you made but you know that isn’t possible so get over it and move on. Besides, why would you want to undo that mistake when it has taught you so much about yourself?

You must not hesitate to put your feelings into words, even at the risk of hurting someone’s feelings. You may in fact be surprised by how positive other people react to what you have to say. They need someone like you to tell them the truth.

Cosmic activity in the career area of your chart will help you cut to the chase and focus on your most important ambitions. Few if any of your colleagues can see what is at stake to the same extent as you – so make that work for you.

You are not as set in your ways as some people think and with Mercury now joining the Sun in the most adventurous area of your chart you will go all out to prove it. Watch out world, like it or not Capricorn is coming through!

The more you are tempted to simplify your everyday affairs the more you will need to exercise caution. The planets warn that once you start cutting back on your obligations, both to yourself and to other people, you may not know when to stop!

This may or may not be make or break time for a relationship but you certainly need to give it some thought. According to the planets you have merely been going through the motions of late and need to get serious about your true feelings.

Your mind will be crystal clear over the coming 12 months and that should make reaching your goals so much easier. It will also help you to recognize that what you do in the world makes a difference – so keep doing it.

Try not to be negative about other people’s efforts today because they are doing their best. Colleagues will respond better to praise than criticism, so thank them for what they have done so far and tell them you expect even greater things in future.

You don’t have to be nice to someone who has not been nice to you of late but the planets warn if you keep playing tit for tat your relationship could soon reach the point of no return. Maybe just spend some time apart for a while.

You know what is right and you don’t need to be told how to respond to what is taking place in the world around you. Whoever is trying to change your point of view obviously has an agenda of some kind, so don’t let them fool you.

Your confidence is high at the moment but there are still some issues that need to be dealt with that you would rather put off to another day. You know that can’t be done though, so put a smile on your face and get stuck in.

If someone you work or do business with is behaving in an overly generous manner you need to be on your guard. Mercury in the financial area of your chart is making a series of negative links at the moment, so you cannot afford to take chances.

What other people expect of you is of no importance. What matters is what you expect of yourself. This is a good day to look at your ambitions and decide which of them you are truly committed to and which of them needs to be junked.

You need to be careful today because your eye for luxury items could lead you into making a bid for something you cannot really afford. Not only that but later on you may decide you don’t want it after all. Be sensible and give it a miss.

You know from long experience that when someone you hardly know arrives on your doorstep bearing gifts that there is going to be a catch. No matter how attractive what they offer may be you would be wise to turn it down flat.

If you find it hard to get your brain in gear today then take the hint and take time off. Even a Sag needs some breathing space once in a while, so do something that relaxes you rather than adds to the stress that is already there.

Someone you get along with very well indeed appears to be having an off day and the best way to help them get over it is to stay out of their way. If they don’t want to get out and about and have fun that’s fine. There’s always tomorrow.

Why do you suddenly feel the need to prove yourself? Whatever the reason you need to get past it as quickly as possible. No one expects more of you than you expect of yourself. Though maybe that’s part of the problem – maybe you are expecting too much?

If you put your trust in facts and figures today you may end up making a really poor choice. As a Water sign you know you can rely on your intuition, so listen to what your inner voice says and then act on that advice quickly.

Mercury’s influence on your birthday is strong but to make the most of it your moves must be careful and deliberate. Fortunately you are not the sort to let your heart rule your head, so plan ahead and take the journey a step at a time.

You don’t have to wait for events to disrupt your life, you can do it in a positive way for yourself. Start today by clearing out all the junk you have accumulated. Don’t cling to possessions or relationships you no longer need – let them go.

A friend in need may not be what you need at the moment but the fact is they require your assistance and you are not the sort to let them down. Hopefully they will heed your good advice and stop making life so difficult for themselves.

Feelings will be running high both at home and at work today, so prepare yourself mentally and promise that you won’t overreact no matter how outrageous the provocation may be. Take it all in your stride and no harm will come of it.

The more friends and family members are inclined to panic today the calmer you will be, on the surface at least. Even if the situation they are in is genuinely bad there is no need to get over-excited. Do what you can to ease their fears.

There is a danger you could work yourself into a tizz today because you think a rival is being applauded and rewarded when it should have been you. Maybe that’s true but don’t let it get to you. You will get your revenge later on.

It may shock you to discover that someone you thought you could trust has been spilling your secrets but it was rather silly to confide in them in the first place. Some people just can’t keep quiet. Choose your friends more carefully in future!

You need to ease back on your commitments, especially at work. The planets warn that it could all get a bit too much for you over the weekend if you don’t put your foot on the brake now. There are only so many hours in a day!

If you find yourself at odds with a friend over a creative matter it’s no big deal, so don’t let it get out of hand. If you cannot reach a compromise solution then agree to put it off until next week. Sunday’s eclipse will point the way ahead.

Disruptions of one sort or another are inevitable over the next few days, so promise yourself now that you won’t get angry every time you have to take a diversion or postpone something you were looking forward to. Teach yourself to be patient.

You won’t find it easy to tell fact from fiction today, so be on your guard and be wary of anyone who tries to pin you down to a Yes or No answer. Chances are they know the answer already and are hoping you have no idea!

The lunar eclipse at the weekend could play havoc with your finances but what you lose in the short-term you will get back later on. Between now and then keep telling yourself that it’s only money – there are worse things in life you could lose.

How good is your self-control? The events of the next two or three days could get you more than a little worked up, but now you are aware of that fact you can look ahead and resolve to stay calm. Remember, you don’t HAVE to get upset.

If you focus on your number one ambition over the coming year there is no doubt that it will be a huge success. Professionally, your name will be up in lights. Financially, you will make some serious dosh. Artistically, you will create something to be proud of.

The message of the stars today is that you must identify your goals and stick with them to the exclusion of everything else. You may be tempted to play around with something new that looks interesting but that would be a waste of your time.

There is a lot of tension in the air at the moment, due mainly to the approaching lunar eclipse, but you don’t have to let it affect you. Turn a blind eye to annoying events and a deaf ear to any criticism that might come your way.

What occurs over the next 24 hours will limit your options considerably, but there is nothing you can do about it so you’ve got to work through it. Being the creative sort you should be able to find ways to get around most restrictions.

There may be a dozen things on your mind at the moment but only one thing matters and that is how you are going to get a creative project of some kind off the ground. You’ve done all the thinking and planning you need to do – now act!

Try not to be too aggressive in your dealings with other people today. A powerful Mars-Jupiter link, plus the approaching eclipse, means you could easily come on too strong and turn people against you. Think before you speak before you act!

You may think you know better than a friend or colleague, and maybe you do, but they are unlikely to follow your advice if you sound like a braggart. Explain to them gently and respectfully why you think there may be a better way to proceed.

If you want to withdraw from the hustle and bustle of life today then go right ahead, but don’t be surprised if others disturb your tranquility every few minutes. This could be one of those days when loud and obnoxious people are hard to avoid.

It’s not like you to allow doubts to limit your actions but Mars in the most sensitive area of your chart will nag at your confidence today. Sunday’s lunar eclipse will reset the world in your favour but for now just keep it low key.

You don’t have to prove you are bigger and stronger and braver than everyone else but you will do so anyway, just for fun. Be careful though. As Mars is at odds with your ruling planet Jupiter you could easily overestimate your abilities.

You will have to make some kind of sacrifice today but will do so readily in the knowledge that your efforts will make a positive difference to people in need. The universe will one day find a way to reward you for your kindness.

If you act without thinking today the lunar eclipse will punish you for it over the weekend, so take what you are doing a step at a time and don’t worry if you fall behind in your schedule. Better to fall behind than to fall off the edge!

If someone acts in an aggressive manner today you must stand up for yourself. The last thing you want is for them to think you are an easy target, because then they will be on your case every day. Let them know you’re not having it!

A Mars-Jupiter link on your birthday will do wonders for friendships and group activities but could cost you some serious cash as well. For that reason you need to be picky about who you get involved with. Make sure you always get value for money.

Before you give the brushoff to somehow who has let you down ask yourself if the situation really calls for such a drastic reaction. To what extent have their actions actually damaged your prospects? Maybe you should just forgive them and move on.

You seem to be rushing all over the place at the moment without getting much done – a clear message from the lunar eclipse that moving faster is unlikely to profit you in any meaningful way. Slow down and let others do all the running around.

Not only is there a lunar eclipse this weekend but changes planet Uranus begins its retrograde phase in your sign, which means this is not a good time to start something new. Stick with your current aims, at least for the time being.

Resist the temptation to take risks over the next 48 hours, because almost inevitably they will go wrong in the long-term, even if they seem to go right in the short-term. Despite that sense of urgency you feel there is no need to rush things.

It’s not like you to feel anxious but current events have got you worried that changes in the wider world are going to affect you negatively. Maybe they are, but each challenge you face this weekend will be accompanied by new opportunities.

You may pride yourself on your emotional self-control but this weekend’s lunar eclipse is sure to test that control to the limit. If you feel the need to let off steam, even scream at the sky, it might be best just to let it all out.

The more friends and family members demand to know what you are up to this weekend the more you must refuse to tell them. The less others know about your next big move the less likely it is they will be able to stop you.

Usually when others tell you that something cannot be done you make it a point of principle to prove them wrong, but on this occasion you can sense they are right, so take their advice and postpone your plans to a later date. You won’t regret it.

Everyone’s feelings will be close to the surface over the next 48 hours, so don’t be surprised if a colleague or loved one loses their cool. Strive to look at what’s going on around you from an intellectual rather than an emotional standpoint.

At least 80 per cent of what you are planning to do this weekend is unnecessary, so take another look at your schedule and delete everything that is not an immediate priority. On this occasion, the less you do the more you will accomplish.

The one thing you MUST do this weekend is keep your purse strings tied tight. If you give in to temptation you won’t stop at buying one thing you don’t really need, you will go on a spree and buy everything. That’s a recipe for disaster!

The lunar eclipse in your sign will magnify the little things that go wrong this weekend, so be sensible and don’t overreact to events that pose problems. A few days from now you will look back and wonder what all the fuss was about.

Changes on the home front may catch you by surprise over the coming year but if you stay calm and look at them from a logical point of view you could actually profit from them. All change is good change if you want it to be.

You know you need to make changes to your working routine but seem uncertain how best to go about it. What occurs over the next few days will point you in the right direction, so be patient but be ready to act quickly as well.

If a friend or colleague blames you for something that goes wrong today you must speak up and let them know it was not your fault. They can make all the accusations they want to but they are only words and can’t really hurt you.

You will find your voice today and say something that should probably have been said a long time ago. Not everyone will be pleased with your interpretation of events but that in itself suggests they know you are right, so don’t hold back.

Your fun-loving nature will brighten up not only your own life today but also the lives of the people around you. There is something infectious about the Cancer sense of humour and there will be smiles wherever you go and whatever you do.

A financial decision of some importance needs to be made but if you are smart you will give it some serious thought before deciding what to do next. If possible you should get expert advice from someone who regularly deals with matters like this.

The sun and Mercury in your sign will do wonders for your self-belief this week but don’t start believing that each and every call you make is going to be the right one. You have a deserved reputation for logical thinking and rational behaviour – don’t lose it!

Your charitable instincts will come to the fore over the next 24 hours and that’s a very good thing, but don’t fall into the trap of believing you can solve everyone’s problems because that could bankrupt you financially and exhaust you physically.

A loved one will reveal something today that takes you by surprise, so much so that you may choose not to believe them. However, the planets indicate they are being honest and once you have got over the shock you must offer them your full support.

You may not be cautious by nature but you are smart enough to recognize when you need to ease back a bit for your own self-preservation. You don’t have to push hard and move fast every day of the week, and certainly not every hour.

A problem that has annoyed you for ages has such a simple solution that when you see it you will kick yourself mentally for being so blind. Don’t be too hard on yourself though – you’re not the only one who missed the obvious explanation.

If you get the feeling that a co-worker is trying to manipulate your thinking so you reach the “correct” conclusion you must let them know you won’t be fooled. Let them know too that you won’t be contributing to the costs of their stupidity.

Get together with a like-minded group of people today and draw up a schedule for what you want to be doing together between now and the end of the month. You may be surprised to find that you are all on the same creative wavelength.

If you don’t already have an all-embracing purpose in life then you will get one over the next few months. Events in the wider world will inspire you to stand out from the crowd and speak up about what needs to be done. Lead by example.

The message of the stars today is that you need to be more adaptable, especially on the work front where you won’t get far if you refuse to move with the times. It would be a major error to oppose progress simply because you are afraid of it.

You may give you the impression that everything in your life is fine but the cracks are beginning to show and at some stage today others will ask if you are feeling okay. Don’t deny your feelings. If you open up they may be able to help.

Mars in the most adventurous area of your chart will give your confidence a boost today but you will need to be sensible about what you do. Just because you want to change the world does not mean you are in a position to do so.

Jupiter in your sign does wonders for your outlook on life and no matter what occurs today you won’t let it spoil your positive mood. Not everyone can see the bigger picture the way you do though, so help others find that joyful spirit as well.

Changes are good for you now, so get your act together and get busy changing something that most likely should have been altered a long time ago. It may be a case of better late than never but the planets warn you might not get another chance.

You will have plenty to say for yourself over the next 24 hours but you need to be careful because later in the week you will be called on to put your money where your mouth is. Promise less but aim to deliver a little bit more.

Just because you are excited about what you are doing does not mean other people will be excited as well. The fact that friends and family members could not care less about your plans is actually good news in that it means they won’t get in your way.

You need to stop trying to reconcile ideas and opinions that are clearly at opposite ends of the spectrum. Instead, focus on your own central beliefs and stick with them even if you encounter fierce opposition. You need only be true to yourself.

Stop fussing about something that is of no importance and focus instead on something that could have real-world consequences if it goes wrong. You may look super confident on the outside but sometimes you allow minor worries to get to you.

You may be hugely ambitious but you need to be aware that you are not the only one looking to move up in the world. Use Mars in the career area of your chart to convince employers and senior colleagues that you are the one they should favour.

If you get the nagging feeling today that there is something important you have forgotten to do then you must make it your No. 1 aim to remember what it is. And if you don’t get that nagging feeling? Then maybe you should!

You can come up with a dozen reasons not to take action but there is one overriding reason why you must and that is because there is some serious cash at stake. Money may not be your priority but that doesn’t mean it is not important.

An activity that up until now has been no more than a hobby has the potential to become something much bigger in your life. Focus on what you do best creatively over the coming year and look for ways to expand it in new directions.

For some strange reason you seem compelled to let family and friends in on your innermost secrets, which is not like you at all. Maybe you should take a few minutes and think it through. Do you really want them to know what you’ve been up to?

You will have a hard time today working out what is fact and what is fiction, so maybe it would be best to avoid coming to any firm conclusions. What you think is true over the next few hours may not seem in the least bit true tomorrow.

If a loved one needs your help today then by all means drop what you are doing and assist them in any way you can. However, if it turns out they have been the author of their own misfortune then you must point that fact out to them.

You may be tempted to say something controversial over the next 24 hours, both because you believe it is true and because you enjoy stirring things up. Don’t forget though that a backlash is likely – others could say controversial things about you!

The fact that you are chasing so hard after success could be a contributing factor to why it refuses to be caught. The message of the stars today is that you will achieve more in the long-term if you take life at a less frantic pace.

With both the sun and Mercury in your sign you know what you want and you know how to get it, but not everyone can be as focused as you. If partners and colleagues start to dither today you may need to chivvy them along a bit.

It is sometimes said that attack is the best form of defence and Mars in your sign makes that a philosophy you can happily sign up to. But don’t go to extremes and start fighting with people who should be on your side. You need allies, not enemies.

Recent events have been encouraging in that they forced you to move out of your comfort zone and discover what you are truly capable of, but not everyone will want to follow your example. Sadly, some people will never have what it takes.

What you hear today is likely to be no more than half the story, so make it a priority to find out what the other half is so you can make a sensible decision as to what you must do next. There is always an alternative viewpoint.

You are not the sort to waste your time on trivial things, so it will no doubt annoy you today when friends and family members try to get you involved in their meaningless games. On the other hand, maybe it wouldn’t hurt to take a short break.

You are entitled to express your opinions any way you see fit, but you also need to recognize that other people have the same rights and their conclusions may not be the same as your own. Try not to be so fixed in your outlook.

If you make claims that cannot be backed up by facts you could end up looking silly. When it comes to one topic in particular you may be an enthusiastic amateur but you are by no means a professional. Don’t leave yourself open to ridicule.

If you want to get on in the world you must leave your old ways behind and replace them with methods and routines that might feel unnatural to begin with. Don’t worry, once you get the hang of it there will be no stopping you!

It’s time to get past a restriction that has been limiting your ability to move forward. Do it now while you have the energy to break free. There has been far too much holding back in recent weeks, so give it your very best shot.

Aim to do something a bit out of the ordinary between now and the weekend. Don’t worry that some people might not approve of your gung-ho attitude because those people don’t want to see you succeed. Be sure to disappoint them!

It’s not like you to get so worked up but clearly something is bugging you and until you face up to it and get it sorted it will keep you awake at night. Don’t be surprised though when you discover that it’s really no big deal.

You need to drop the mask that you habitually wear and let other people see the real you – the you that cares deeply about what goes on in the world. If you want to make a difference you must join with people who share your concerns.

The more thought you give to your financial situation over the next few days the more likely it is you will find new ways to make money. If you can find ways to save money as well you should be much better off come the start of next week.

With the sun, Mercury and Jupiter all on your side over the next few days there is no limit to what you can accomplish. Give yourself permission to explore new ideas, as well as ways of doing things that others say cannot possibly work. They will.

You seem to be indulging in all sorts of weird and wonderful mind games and if you don’t bring your imagination back down to earth you could become detached from reality. Never forget that it’s your thoughts which create your world.

You need to get over the idea that playing safe is the best course to take. On the contrary, with so much cosmic activity working in your favor you must take more risks. They don’t have to be reckless but they do have to be brave.

You will be in a hugely adventurous mood today, tomorrow and over the weekend and anyone who tries to limit your activities must be sent away immediately. They may want what’s best for you but they clearly don’t know what that is.

You may not be the sort to act on impulse but cosmic activity in your fellow earth sign of Virgo is urging you to follow your instincts and do something out of the ordinary. Act as if you cannot possibly fail today – and you won’t!

The fact that everyone is being nice to you is no reason to get suspicious. This is one of those occasions when other people’s motives are not in the least bit deceitful, so if someone says they want to help you it may actually be true.

Someone you live or work with will behave in some pretty strange ways over the next day or two but you don’t need to worry about it. According to the planets there is a method to their madness – it’s just that you cannot see it yet.

The message of your birthday chart is that you have reached a crossroads and need to decide whether to continue straight ahead or take a new direction. What does your heart say? Stop thinking so much and let your feelings speak to you.

Don’t bother trying to hide your feelings today because everyone will be able to see by your body language what’s going through both your head and your heart. And why would you want to hide them when they are so wonderfully positive!

The sun in the most dynamic area of your chart links with Jupiter, planet of good fortune today, so one way or another you are going to be the recipient of some seriously good news. Don’t doubt for a moment that you deserve it, because you do!

If you put yourself out for other people today you will get plenty in return over the next few weeks. Don’t hold back if a friend or colleague asks for assistance, in fact go further than you have to and make their No. 1 problem disappear.

If you feel it is time for a change then start making it happen over the next 24 hours. With Jupiter in your sign linked to the sun in one of the more go-ahead areas of your chart there is no power on earth that can stop you.

If you put your mind to it today you can do almost anything you choose. Not only that but there is a very real possibility that you could make some serious money as well. Your success will be limited only by the scope of your imagination.

You won’t lack for advice today and most of it will be good advice, but don’t neglect to listen to what your inner voice is telling you. Most likely your instincts will be in complete agreement with what friends and loved ones say.

If there is something you wish to discuss with a friend or co-worker today then open your mouth and spit it out. You will find that your fear of starting an argument is completely groundless as they are thinking along the same lines as you.

You have never been the sort to duck a challenge and because you know you can beat a rival in a battle of wits you will happily take them on. Don’t start an argument for the fun of it though. You don’t need to prove you are smart.

You may be in an adventurous mood but some people are fearful of getting involved in your schemes. That’s okay. You don’t need anyone’s help to get ahead and, when your efforts prove a success you won’t have to share the spoils with them!

Today’s sun-Jupiter link highlights partnerships of all kinds, so let friends and family members and colleagues know that you want to do something exciting together. Don’t hold back, give it 100 per cent. You’ll get back 200 per cent at least.

If someone in a position of authority takes a shine to you today you can be sure that you fully deserve it. Sometimes you can be a bit too modest for your own good but now you have every reason to celebrate what is special about you.

A situation you have been trying to ignore in the hope that somehow it might just go away will have to be faced and dealt with this weekend. The good news is it won’t be half as traumatic as you expected it to be. You will survive.

Cosmic activity in and around your opposite sign means you need to be a little less gung-ho in your relationships. Both in your personal life and on the work front it’s essential that you make more of an effort to get along with people.

Mars in your sign over the next six weeks or so will endow you with the physical, mental and emotional attributes you will need to get your ambitions off the ground. Those who doubt your abilities won’t doubt them much longer.

Mars in the career area of your chart will bring both opportunities and challenges, so you must be ready to act at a moment’s notice. You don’t need to run your plans past anyone, not even your professional superiors. If it feels right then do it!

No doubt friends and family members are expecting big things of you but you must not allow that to guide your actions. Cancer is a cardinal sign and among other things that means you make your own decisions about what needs to be done.

The situation you are faced with today may be a bit messy but you are the one who can tidy it up with the least amount of fuss. Your no-nonsense approach will cut through all the unimportant stuff and get to the heart of the matter.

There are so many potential pitfalls around you at the moment that the only thing you can realistically do is to trust your instincts and let them guide you to safety. Deep down you already know what must be done, so listen to your inner voice.

Your interest in subjects that many people consider to be way out and whacky will increase sharply over the coming year. That’s because your understanding has expanded to such an extent that you can see what they cannot. Keep searching for the truth.

What occurs today will remind you that everything in life is related and that there is no such thing as a random event. That in turn will improve your mood and make you more accepting of both your own and other people’s failings.

Although not everything in your life is running smoothly at the moment you are still in a far better place than most other people, so stop grumbling, count your blessings and make good use of the many advantages the universe has given you.

If you take stock of your financial situation today you may be surprised to discover that it’s not as bad as you feared. What’s more, luck planet Jupiter in the wealth area of your chart could bring opportunities to add to your riches.
