No matter how confident you may be in your own abilities you must resist the temptation to make promises you don’t know for sure you will be able to keep. It’s better to admit your limits now than to be shown up for them later on.

You may think you can cut a corner or two without anyone noticing but the planets warn you are kidding no one but yourself. Behave as if you are being watched every minute of every day. Make sure your actions are beyond reproach.

If you are feeling a bit down at the moment it could be because you are bored with life. As one of the zodiac’s more mentally active signs you need to be stimulated every minute of every day, so find something new that really excites you.

You may be eager to push ahead with a project that has hit a wall of late but first you must go back and check that what was done earlier is still the best foundation. Leave it any longer and you may have to start again from scratch.

The quickest route to a goal is not always the best route and the message of the stars today is that if you are going to get where you most want to be you must plan ahead. Try taking a slightly different path than all your rivals.

Jupiter’s influence in your chart means that friendships and group associations, while under favourable stars, could bring a few surprises. You may want to be sociable but on this occasion it might be better to keep a bit of yourself in reserve.

What occurs today and over the weekend can be seen as either a challenge or an opportunity, or maybe both together. If you keep your eyes and ears open you will be one of the lucky few who can make events work to their advantage.

If you attempt to force the pace today you could find that you have exhausted yourself come the weekend, so take life at a steady speed and don’t worry about how long it takes you to reach your goal, because it’s not a race.

If a friend tries to interest you in the kind of social event you have never been to before you would be wise to find out a bit more about it. Most likely it will be a lot of fun but don’t jump in with your eyes wide shut!

A task that looks simple today could look a lot more difficult over the weekend, so get on with it and aim to have it done and dusted before the clock strikes midnight. The earlier you start the sooner you will be finished.

You may think that if you don’t push on to your goal right away a rival will beat you to it but on this occasion that might be a good thing. With so many planets moving retrograde now it’s better to be a follower than a leader.

The more others run this way and that preaching doom and gloom the more you must refuse to worry about what’s going on. Deep down you know it will all come good in the end, so start the weekend early and have yourself some fun.

Make it your one and only aim this year to start each day with a smile on your face and to finish each day the same way. Recognize that no matter what other people might say or do you alone are in charge of your fate.

You may think you are in the midst of some kind of personal or professional crisis but compared to most people you’ve got it easy, so stop complaining and set about making this a weekend to remember for all the right reasons.

If a friend or co-worker says something you do not agree with this weekend you should, if you can, keep your opinions about it to yourself. It’s no skin off your nose if they want to believe in something that is clearly untrue.

You must keep your feet on the ground over the next 48 hours, no matter how high up in the clouds your head may be. All those big plans you’ve got won’t come good by themselves – they will need a considerable amount of input from you.

What you hear this weekend may have you jumping for joy but the planets warn it’s not going to be good news all the way. Even if you are delighted with what’s going on friends and loved ones may think it’s the worst thing ever.

Stop worrying about what may be coming up from behind and focus 100 per cent on the goal up ahead. The more time you spend looking over your shoulder the less likely it is you will reach the finishing line ahead of your rivals.

Aim to make the next 48 hours a feast of fun and laughter. The way you choose to look at the world is the sort of world you are going to experience, so look at it with love in your heart and a smile on your face.

Find a place where you can cut yourself off from the noise of the world and think deeply about who you are, where you are going and what you want to be doing in the future. This is an ideal time for making plans – the bigger the better!

Something you thought was going to be difficult will come easily to you this weekend and your first reaction will be to worry that you are doing something wrong. On the contrary, you are doing everything right, so stop being such a misery!

What occurs next will raise your spirits and have you thinking that maybe the world is not so bad after all. Hold on to that feeling as long as you can. A positive state of mind lights up situations that might otherwise seem dark and foreboding.

Aim to do something amazing this weekend and then aim to make it more amazing still moving into next week. If you act as if there are no limits to what you can accomplish you may find the universe sweeps away all those obstacles you were expecting.

Don’t get emotional about a situation that calls for a practical solution. If you feel sorry for yourself because things are not working out the way you intended you will get no sympathy from friends and colleagues, nor will you get a helping hand.

If the solar year now ending was a lot of fun then the upcoming solar year will be a riot of the nicest sort. Anyone who thinks you are too serious by nature will be forced to think again. Life is good and about to get even better.

If someone you work or do business with has disappointed you in some way don’t make a big issue of it. Most likely they did their best and it’s not really their fault that they can’t reach your level of efficiency. That’s what makes you so special.

Someone you meet either today or tomorrow is going to play an important role in your affairs in the near future, so be open to people who approach you out of the blue because one of them will change your life for the better.

You seem to be in an impetuous mood at the moment, maybe because deep down you sense you must make the most of your opportunities before retrograde Mercury slips back into one of the more challenging areas of your chart. Have fun while you can!

It may appear as if other people approve of what you are doing but while Jupiter is moving retrograde through your sign appearances could be very deceptive. Quiet you mind today and listen to what your inner voice is trying to tell you.

What happens today may catch you by surprise but nothing bad will come of it, so don’t panic. If you can pretend that it doesn’t bother you at all then important people may be impressed by your ability to stay calm under pressure.

This is still a good time for romance and social activities but as your ruling planet is going through its retrograde phase you cannot take anything for granted. Above all over the next few days make sure your cash stays in your pocket!

If you need to win friends and influence people as the new week begins the best way to do it is to be open and honest about your strengths and weaknesses. Don’t just be honest with other people, be honest with yourself as well.

Ignore people who try to cast doubts on your plans because they don’t have the first idea what they are talking about. Make use of the sun’s final few days in your sign to double down on your ambitions. And never, ever doubt yourself.

Take a look at the world and identify ways you can do your bit to make it a better place. Start by realizing that getting back at people who have done “bad” things isn’t the best way to go about it. All your actions must be constructive.

A lot of things seem to be coming to a head at the moment but don’t worry because no matter how chaotic events may get over the next few days you will handle them all with ease. Stay as calm on the inside as you look on the outside.

There is no point getting upset if your plans are disrupted today because there are forces at work that are far too big for you to change even a little bit. All you can do is go with the flow and hope you end up some place good.

The events of the next 24 hours may not seem threatening to you personally but there are things going on behind the scenes that will affect people you are close to. Be ready to offer a helping hand or even a shoulder to cry on.

The sun links with both Jupiter and Saturn on your birthday this year, which means that your decisions and actions will have far-reaching consequences. Always think before you act and always act for the greater good, because it’s good for you too.

Your financial situation needs seeing to and with Mercury about to move back into the wealth area of your chart the decisions you make had better be right. A lot rests on what your next move is going to be, so give it some very deep thought.

You may not see eye-to-eye with a colleague or friend but what of it? If they want to accompany you on your current journey then welcome them with open arms, but if they have doubts just tell them you will see them later.

You need to take life at a more leisurely pace. Stop fretting that if you don’t surge ahead now, right this very minute, your rivals will leave you far behind, because it isn’t true. Go and read the story about the tortoise and the hare.

If you have something to say that won’t go down well with the people you work with then promise yourself right now that you won’t sugarcoat it. Get straight to the point and make it clear you are in no mood to be forgiving.

It may seem as if someone is behaving badly just to get under your skin but according to the planets they have their reasons for being difficult. If you find out what those reasons are you will also find there is some common ground between you.

Quit worrying and concentrate instead on the things in life that put a smile on your face. That is the message of the stars today and if you follow it then so many of your so-called problems will just fade away. Focus on having fun.

You can be a bit too laidback at times and that could be a problem today if you assume that a situation will work itself out for the best. If you refuse to engage with it that problem could very quickly turn into a crisis.

You need to make more of an effort to get along with people whose outlook and attitude you don’t much admire. As one of the zodiac’s “fixed” signs you seem to believe that others should adapt themselves to you, but that’s expecting too much.

If your get up and go abandons you today that’s quite okay. If you don’t feel like making an effort then don’t. This is one of those days when if you kick back and do nothing you will be fired up to take on the world tomorrow.

If you are working on something as part of a team you must resist the urge to take control and tell everyone else what to do. Have your say by all means but let others have their say as well. Their plan may actually be better than yours.

What you want to do today and what you are expected to do will be two entirely different things. If you can accept that fact you should be able to fulfil your obligations and still have time to follow your own desires.

You may want to be on the move today but there is a danger you could head off in a direction that brings problems rather than pleasure. On this occasion it might be better to sit tight and wait for others to make their way toward you.

You like being No. 1 and leading from the front but it will pay you to take a backseat over the next few days. Let other people lead the way and make the mistakes. Learn from what they do wrong and then get it right.

If you find yourself involved in some kind of feud over the next 24 hours just remind yourself that in the greater scheme of things it is of no importance at all. Let others get angry while you look at life with a clear and untroubled eye.

You don’t lack for good ideas but do you have the drive and determination to do something with them? The message of the stars today is that if you can keep pushing yourself while others are giving up you will soon be the last man standing!

As one of the zodiac’s water signs you are acutely sensitive to both positive and negative vibes and that talent will come in handy today. While others are tying themselves in emotional knots you will be moving ahead with supreme self-confidence.

No matter how much you have accomplished so far in 2025 there is still a lot you can do between now and the end of the year, so don’t just sit back and let life come to you. Find a new creative objective to pursue.

The changes that are taking place in the world will go ahead whether you like it or not, so accept them for what they are and actively look for ways to make them work in your favour. An optimistic outlook will bring hugely positive results.

Cosmic activity in the financial area of your chart over the next two or three days will give you the chance to put right something you did wrong and in doing so save some serious money. This time, don’t be so reckless with the choices you make.

Tomorrow’s new moon in your sign will help you focus on your No. 1 aim and see it through to a successful completion. Don’t listen to those who urge caution because they don’t know what they are talking about. Follow your instincts all the way.

You seem to be going back to the future of late and what occurs today will give you the chance to make up for an earlier mistake. It’s not often you get a second bite at the cherry, so make sure you get it right this time!

A creative project seems to have hit a wall and the only way you are going to get past it is by consulting someone who has the expertise that you lack. Getting assistance does not mean you have failed, it means you are smarter than your rivals.

Your responsibilities may be huge at the moment but you must keep on top of them and do what is expected of you. People in positions of power are watching you closely and you will benefit enormously if they like what they see.

Make sure you are aware what the consequences of your actions could be if you make a poor decision. At the very least that will give you a chance to reverse that decision before it costs too much. A fallback plan is always a good idea.

Communication is the key to success over the coming year. Make sure everything you say is clear and to the point and insist that others are open and honest with you as well, even when it’s possible you might not like what they say.

If you can learn to be happy with what you have got you won’t waste time and energy chasing after material things that you don’t need and most likely cannot afford. Aim to make your life simpler over the next few days.

A new moon in the partnership area of your chart means you will get on well with just about everyone between now and the weekend. If you are smart you will use this happy phase to heal a relationship rift that opened up recently.

As your sign is ruled by Mercury, planet of reason, you tend not to be as emotional as most other people. Today, however, you must let your feelings guide you because your heart will know better than your head what needs to be done.

If you look hard enough today you will find something to smile about. Also, a new moon in the most dynamic area of your chart means that a creative project of some kind can take a giant step forward, but you’ve got to want it enough.

If you get the opportunity to resolve a domestic dispute today don’t pass it up, even if it means giving a bit more ground than you think is fair. Harmony on the home front is essential if you are to push ahead in other areas.

A new moon in the communications area of your chart makes you eager to get your message across but as your ruling planet Mercury is moving retrograde you must choose your words with care. Minor misunderstandings could have major consequences.

Today’s new moon will open your eyes to new possibilities, especially those of a financial nature. For best results, think of new ways to use your existing skill set to improve your money-making potential. Soon you will be raking in the cash.

Forget about yesterday’s failures and think only of tomorrow’s successes – and start building those successes today. The new moon in your sign makes this the perfect time to translate your dreams into designs that can, and will, transform your existence.

If you let your imagination get the better of you now it may be a while before you rediscover your happy-go-lucky outlook on life. It’s not like you to fear the worst, so put recent setbacks out of your mind and move ahead with confidence.

If you have fallen into a rut creatively then today’s new moon is exactly what you need to pull yourself out of it and get moving again. But why go it alone when you can join forces with like-minded people and build something truly amazing?

Although discretion may be the better part of valour it’s unlikely you will back down if you clash with someone in a position of authority. By all means take them on if you think you are in the right but be warned that victory is not guaranteed.

The situation you face today will be very much like situations you have faced in the past, so there is no reason why you should not be able to cope. Even your rivals will be impressed by your ability to stay calm when everyone else is panicking.

The plans you make for the year ahead must be for other people’s benefit as well as your own. A new moon on your birthday will endow you with so much emotional energy that you can share it around and still have masses to spare.
